Sir घर वालों के phone में सिर्फ़ YouTube है, मैंने बोला rhyme सिखाओ, mummy बोली बाद में. YouTube खोला, एक rhyme से पहले 3 ads आ जाते हैं फिर auto play में cartoon लग जाते हैं. Rhyme कभी सीखी ही नहीं. तो चोरी से phone उठाने की क्या ज़रूरत थी? Sir school में annual day था, सबको stage पर rhyme सुनानी है. मुझे डर लग गया. रात को नींद नहीं आई तो चुपके से phone उठाया. Search किया, सीखो junior app मिली. एक रुपए का trial था, mommy का UPI से हो गया. फिर क्या हुआ? Sir उसी रात मछली जल की रानी देखी, तीन बार देखी, तीसरी बार साथ में गाने लगा. सीखो junior में इतनी मज़ेदार animated rhymes हैं, हिंदी में भी, english में भी. एक हफ्ते में 5 rhymes आ गई, annual day में नानी तेरी मोरनी सुनाई, Teacher ने बोला best performance. मतलब चोरी तो की. Sir चोरी नहीं की investment की है. Mommy का एक रुपए लगाया मेरा future bright किया. अगर आपके बच्चे को भी rhymes नहीं आती, YouTube पर time बर्बाद हो रहा है तो सीखो junior app डाल दीजिए rhymes, alphabets, numbers, stories सब मज़ेदार videos में. तो install button पर click करो और सीखो junior app download करो.

comp_format: AI-Generated: AI-generated auditorium scene of a boy reciting on stage shown on a big screen with an applauding crowd, repeating beats, Hindi voiceover narration
reframe: Copy the '7-day challenge' structure: a confident voiceover dares the viewer to do one tiny thing every day for 7 days, building to a triumphant on-stage reveal before an applauding crowd. Reframe the rhyme-challenge into a savings challenge: 'a 7-day challenge — bachao sirf ₹100 a day for 7 days on Bachatt', with the payoff being the satisfying balance reveal and the realization that a one-week habit becomes a lifelong emergency fund.
hook: 7-din ka challenge — roz sirf ₹100 bachao, satvein din apna balance dekh ke dang rah jaoge.
script: HOOK (0-3s): [bold text '7 DIN CHALLENGE' over a phone] VO: '7-din ka challenge — roz sirf ₹100 bachao, satvein din apna balance dekh ke dang rah jaoge.' | BEAT 1: [Day 1 card, finger taps Bachatt daily SIP] VO: 'Din 1 — bas ₹100, 30 second mein set.' | BEAT 2: [Days ticking 2,3,4, balance rising] VO: 'Roz apne aap kat-ta gaya, pata bhi nahi chala.' | BEAT 3: [Day 7, balance card glowing] VO: 'Saat din mein ₹700 plus return — 3% account se zyada.' | TURN: [person smiling, raising phone like a trophy on stage, crowd claps] VO: 'Ek hafte ki aadat, zindagi bhar ka emergency fund.' | CTA (end): [Bachatt app install screen] VO: 'Aaj se roz ₹100 bachao — Bachatt.'

src.hook: A 7-day challenge: play your child one rhyme a day from Seekho Junior.
src.key_message: In 7 days your child swaps item-songs for rhymes and confidently performs on stage, with Seekho Junior's 1-rupee trial.
src.transcript: सात दिन की challenge, रोज़ अपने बच्चे को एक rhyme सुनवाओ सीखो junior, पर सातवें दिन बच्चा ख़ुद phone मांग कर mommy लकड़ी की काठी लगाओ बोलेगा. आज से एक simple challenge शुरू करो, सिर्फ़ सात दिन का कोई बड़ा investment नहीं, बस रोज़ अपने बच्चे को एक rhyme सुनवाओ. YouTube से नहीं सीखो junior से यहां मज़ेदार animated rhymes हैं लकड़ी की काठी, मछली जल की रानी, नानी तेरी मोरनी जैसी हिंदी rhymes और twinkle twinkle, Jack and Jill, जानी जानी जैसी English rhymes सब actions के साथ day 1 2 में शायद बच्चा bore हो YouTube मांगे. घबराओ मत force मत करो. बस लकड़ी की काठी लगाओ तीन minute का animated video है, रंग बिरंगी animation है, नज़र चिपक जाएगी. Day 3 4 तक बदलाव शुरू होगा. नहाते वक़्त मछली जल की रानी गाएगा, खाना खाते वक़्त जानी जानी yes papa गाएगा, actions के साथ सुनाएगा. Mummy सुनो, Jack and Jiil went up the hill. आप सोचोगे, यह वही बच्चा है जो कल तक item songs गाता था? Day 5, 6 तक बच्चा खुद पूछेगा, mummy आज कौन सी नई rhyme है? YouTube मांगना बंद और english words अपने आप आने लगेंगे, star क्या है, hill क्या है, rhyme से english सीखी, बिना रट्टे के. Day 7 तक routine वन जाएगा school में, annual day आए तो confidently stage पे खड़ा होगा, चुप नहीं बैठेगा और सिर्फ rhymes नहीं, stories, alphabets, numbers भी हैं, पूरा learning एक app में, trial सिर्फ़ एक रुपए में. तो सात दिन की challenge accept करो सीखो junior download करो. पहले item songs गाता था अब लकड़ी की काठी गाएगा वही phone है. बस सही चीज़ डाल दो. तो install button पर click करो और सीखो junior app download करो.

comp_format: Skit: Real-people Q&A skit: a young boy answers rapid-fire maths questions from a teacher at a smart-board, classroom setting, Hindi audio, two speakers
reframe: Copy the real-people rapid-fire Q&A skit (teacher at a smart-board fires quick maths questions, a kid answers all correctly with on-screen tallies). Reframe the maths quiz into a savings-maths quiz with everyday rupee examples: a host fires '₹100 a day = how much a month?', '₹100 a day for 5 years?', 'savings account return?' and a regular person nails each one, proving small daily saving compounds — using the real-bill-example angle Seekho loves.
hook: ₹100 roz = mahine ka ₹3000, paanch saal mein lakhon — ginti aati hai?
script: HOOK (0-3s): [host at smart-board fires question] Host: '₹100 roz = mahine mein kitna?' VO: '₹100 roz = mahine ka ₹3000, paanch saal mein lakhon — ginti aati hai?' | BEAT 1: [person answers instantly] Person: '₹3000 mahina!' VO: 'Sahi.' | BEAT 2: [host] Host: 'Paanch saal? Return ke saath?' Person: 'Lakhon mein — daily SIP se!' | BEAT 3: [host] Host: 'Savings account?' Person: 'Sirf 3% — bohot kam!' | TURN: [smart-board shows Bachatt balance growing] VO: 'Choti ginti, badi bachat — roz ₹100 ka kamaal.' | CTA (end): [Bachatt app screen] VO: 'Aaj se roz ₹100 bachao — Bachatt.'

src.hook: How many runs is a six in cricket? Seven questions, all seven right.
src.key_message: Seekho Junior teaches kids maths visually with animated counting, tables and real bill examples, no rote; 1-rupee trial.
src.transcript: छक्का, cricket में कितने run होते हैं? 6 runs. पांच और तीन कितने होते हैं? 8. दस में से चार घटाओ? 6. दो का table पांच तक? 246, 08:10. सात chocolate हैं और तीन खा लें. तो अब कितनी बचे? 4. सौ रुपए के चार आम, तो एक कितने का? 25 rupees का एक. 12 into 05:60. पचास रुपए दिए सैंतीस सौ रुपए का सामान, तो अब change कितना बचेगा? 30. सात सवालों और सातों के सातों सही. गिनती, घटाना, table, bill सब. बेटा यह कहां से सीखा? Ma'am, tuition नहीं जाता. Sequo Junior app से सीखा. App से maths आ गई? Ma'am, Sequo Junior में numbers का पूरा section है, animated videos में. पांच apples दिखाते हैं, फिर तीन और आते हैं. मैं ख़ुद गिनता हूं, एक बोलता हूं. उंगलियों पर गिनने की ज़रूरत नहीं. Screen पर picture दिखती है. दिमाग में picture वन जाती है. पर 12 into 5 जैसा multiplication भी याद है. Ma'am, tables animated videos में rhyme की तरह गाए जाते हैं. दो दूनी चार, दो तिहाई छह. एक बार गालियां कभी नहीं भूला. रट्टा नहीं, गाकर सीखा. और shopping वाली calculation? Ma'am, app में दुकान वाली videos हैं. 50 rupees का note दिखता है, 37 rupees का सामान, screen पर change count होता है, 13 rupees. ऐसे real example से सीखता हूं, इसलिए दुकान पर bill भी खुद check करता हूं, गलती नहीं होती. और सिर्फ़ numbers ही हैं उसमें? नहीं ma'am, alphabets भी हैं. Rhymes भी लकड़ी की काठी, twinkle twinkle, stories, पंचतंत्र, अकबर बीरबल, हिंदी में स्वर व्यंजन, science में water cycle. पूरा learning एक app में IITians ने बनाई है, एक रुपए में trial. अब एक सवाल सबको, 8 into 7 कितने होते हैं? 56 ma'am. देखा गिनती भी table भी bill भी सब आता है. सीखो junior app download करिए एक रुपए में trial. अपने बच्चे को maths रटाए नहीं दिखाएं. तो install button पर click करो और सीखो junior app download करो.

comp_format: Talking-Head: Raw vertical UGC selfie-style video of a hijab-wearing mother in her kitchen speaking to camera (voiceover testimonial), ending on colorful Seekho Junior app install card
reframe: Copy the raw vertical UGC selfie-testimonial of a relatable mother speaking to camera while doing kitchen chores, voiceover confessing a bad habit she fixed, ending on a colourful install card. Reframe the kids'-bad-habit angle into her own money habit: a homemaker admits 'paisa haath mein aate hi udd jaata tha, bachat kabhi nahi hoti thi', then shares how a ₹100/day Bachatt SIP quietly built her first-ever emergency fund — same authentic, chores-while-talking feel.
hook: Paisa haath aate hi udd jaata tha — ab roz ₹100 apne aap bach jaata hai.
script: HOOK (0-3s): [homemaker in kitchen, talking to camera while washing] VO: 'Paisa haath aate hi udd jaata tha — ab roz ₹100 apne aap bach jaata hai.' | BEAT 1: [she keeps working, candid] VO: 'Har mahine sochti thi bachaungi, par end mein account khaali.' | BEAT 2: [wipes hands, shows phone] VO: 'Ek din Bachatt pe daily SIP lagaa diya — roz ₹100, bina yaad rakhe.' | BEAT 3: [balance card on phone climbing] VO: 'Pehli baar apna emergency fund banta dekha — 3% account se kaafi aage.' | TURN: [she smiles to camera] VO: 'Ghar sambhalte sambhalte ab bachat bhi ho rahi hai.' | CTA (end): [Bachatt colourful install card] VO: 'Aaj se roz ₹100 bachao — Bachatt.'

src.hook: Singing random YouTube songs has become today's fashion; my child was just like that.
src.key_message: Seekho Junior replaces junk YouTube shorts with English rhymes, stories and cartoon lessons across all subjects for kids.
src.transcript: YouTube पर उल्टे सीधे गाने सुनकर उन्हें गुनगुनाना तो आजकल का fashion वन गया है. मेरा भी बच्चा ऐसा ही था मैं तो तंग आ गई थी उसके उल्टे सीधे गाने sun सुनकर पढ़ाई में मन लगता नहीं था दिनभर mobile में लगा रहता था और mobile छीन लो तो ज़ोर ज़ोर से रोने लगता था लेकिन फिर मुझे मिला सीखो junior app जिसने मेरे बच्चे के उल्टे सीधे गाने सुनने और गुनगुनाने की आदत को जड़ से खत्म कर दिया सीखो junior app download करने के बाद मेरा बच्चा उल्टे सीधे गानों को छोड़कर english rhyme को सुनने और गुनगुनाने लगा है वह अब YouTube shorts में अपना time बर्बाद ही नहीं करता बस सीखो junior app open करके english rhymes stories को मजे से सुनता और देखता है इन rhymes और stories को सुनते सुनाते आज मेरे बेटे की english भी बहुत अच्छी हो गई अब वह पढ़ाई करते समय बोर नहीं होता बल्कि मजे से अपनी पढ़ाई को enjoy करता है english, maths, science, GK, moral education हर एक subject अब वह सीखो junior app के मज़ेदार cartoon videos के through ही पढ़ता है अगर आप भी अपने बच्चे के mobile पर users videos की आदत को छुड़वाना चाहते हैं तो अभी download कीजिए सीखो junior app. तो install button पर click करो और सीखो junior app download करो.

comp_format: Presenter-Screen: Animated/illustrated presenter avatar in a circular bubble narrating beside cutaway rhyme illustrations and Seekho Junior app screens, kid-friendly graphics, ends on Install Now
reframe: Copy the friendly explainer-avatar format: a presenter in a circular bubble narrates beside cutaway illustrations and clean app screens, opening with a provocative 'rote vs real understanding' question. Reframe the rhyme-meaning hook into a savings-understanding hook: 'you keep money in a savings account — but do you know it only grows 3% while prices rise 6%?', then the avatar explains, with simple animated cutaways, how a ₹100/day Bachatt daily SIP actually beats it.
hook: Savings account mein paisa rakhte ho — par pata hai woh sirf 3% badhta hai, mehngai 6%?
script: HOOK (0-3s): [presenter in circular bubble, app screen below] VO: 'Savings account mein paisa rakhte ho — par pata hai woh sirf 3% badhta hai, mehngai 6%?' | BEAT 1: [animated cutaway: rupee shrinking in a bank] VO: 'Matlab tumhara paisa actually chhota ho raha hai.' | BEAT 2: [cutaway: coin dropping daily into a jar] VO: 'Roz ₹100 ka daily SIP isse kaafi aage le jaata hai.' | BEAT 3: [clean Bachatt balance screen climbing] VO: 'Apne aap kat-ta hai, emergency fund apne aap banta hai.' | TURN: [presenter smiles, points to phone] VO: 'Samajhke bachao — sirf rakhna kaafi nahi.' | CTA (end): [Bachatt app + Install Now] VO: 'Aaj se roz ₹100 bachao — Bachatt.'

src.hook: Want your child to be successful? Ask them what 'star' means in Twinkle Twinkle.
src.key_message: Seekho Junior teaches rhymes with animated visuals and word meanings so kids understand, not just memorize; Re 1 trial.
src.transcript: अपने बच्चे को successful बनाना चाहते हो तो यह video end तक देखो. एक काम करो अभी अपने बच्चे को बुलाओ और पूछो twinkle twinkle में star का मतलब क्या है? अगर बोल दे great, अगर चुप हो जाए तो यह video आपके लिए है. इसका कारण बहुत simple है. आपके बच्चे ने rhymes सुनकर तो सीखी है लेकिन समझकर नहीं सीखी. जब बच्चा twinkle twinkle गाता है तो वह memory से गाता है जैसे आप कोई गाना गुनगुनाते हो, लेकिन जब meaning पूछो तो blank क्योंकि बच्चे ने सिर्फ याद किया word समझ नहीं आया. यही reason है मछली जल की रानी गाता है पर जीवन का मतलब नहीं जानता. Jack Angel गाता है पर hill क्या है? नहीं पता. सीखो junior app में rhymes को सिर्फ रटाया नहीं जाता. हर rhyme animated video में है, हर word का मतलब visual से दिखता है, action के साथ गाना सिखाया जाता है, जिससे बच्चे rhyme को पूरी तरह समझते हैं सिर्फ याद नहीं करते और यह सब छोटी छोटी मज़ेदार videos में होता है. बच्चे को लगता ही नहीं वह पढ़ रहा है. Summer vacation में दो महीने YouTube पर cartoon देखेगा, school खुलेगा, teacher बोली कि एक crime सुनाओ, बच्चा चुप खड़ा रहेगा. ऐसा नहीं चाहते हैं तो आज ही अभी सीखो junior app download करिए सिर्फ़ एक रुपए का trial और देखिए कैसे twinkle twinkle गाने वाला बच्चा star means तारा भी बोलने लगता है. तो install button पर click करो और सीखो junior app download करो.

comp_format: Micro-Drama: 3D Pixar-style animated story of two daughters-in-law comparison drama
reframe: Copy the Pixar-style 'two daughters-in-law comparison' drama (one bahu seems to have it all, the other feels less, ending on a confident transformation by an arched window at sunset). Reframe the keeping-up comparison into a savings comeback: while one constantly compares lifestyles, the other quietly auto-saves ₹100 a day on Bachatt and ends up with a real emergency fund and her own bike/phone — so the 'jealousy' beat flips into 'I built my own financial cushion'.
hook: Jethani ki life se jalti rahi, ya roz ₹100 bachaa ke apni cushion bana li?
script: HOOK (0-3s): [Pixar-style two bahus, one looking enviously at the other] VO: 'Jethani ki life se jalti rahi, ya roz ₹100 bachaa ke apni cushion bana li?' | BEAT 1: [one bahu sad, comparing on phone] VO: 'Ek din-raat doosron se apni life compare karti rahi.' | BEAT 2: [other bahu calmly setting Bachatt daily SIP, sparkles] VO: 'Doosri ne roz sirf ₹100 chupke se bachana shuru kiya.' | BEAT 3: [balance growing, she buys her own scooty/phone] VO: 'Apna emergency fund, apni pehli kamaai ki bachat — kisi se na maangi.' | TURN: [confident bahu at sunlit arched window] VO: 'Comparison nahi, apni financial pehchaan banayi.' | CTA (end): [Bachatt app screen] VO: 'Aaj se roz ₹100 bachao — Bachatt.'

src.hook: My sister-in-law goes to the gym; I light the stove. Same household, two brides.
src.key_message: I built my own identity and income through Seekho's finance courses instead of envying my rich sister-in-law.
src.transcript: भाभी सुबह gym जाती हैं. मैं सुबह चूल्हा जलाती हूं. दोनों एक ही घर की बहुए हैं. मेरा नाम स्वाति है, जयपुर से. मेरे देवर की शादी दो साल पहले हुई थी. भाभी का नाम ईशा है, builder की बेटी. शादी बड़े धूम धाम से हुई थी. जबकि मैं एक teacher की बेटी हूं और मेरी शादी सादगी से हुई. पहले दिन से ही फ़र्क़ दिख गया. भाभी की विदाई में गाड़ी भरकर सामान आया, designer लहंगे, furniture, crockery सब कुछ और मेरी विदाई में एक छोटा सा trunk और मां के दिए दो suit. असली फ़र्क़ रोज़मर्रा की ज़िंदगी में दिखता है. भाभी के पास driver है, Swiggy का खाना है और वह हर हफ़्ते parlor जाती हैं. जबकि मैं सुबह छह बजे उठती हूं. ख़ुद खाना बनाती हूं और parlor छह महीने में एक बार जाती हूं. भाभी दस हज़ार से पंद्रह हज़ार की shopping करती हैं और मैं पांच सौ से सात सौ में adjust करती हूं. Family functions में रिश्तेदार ईशा की smartness की तारीफ़ करते हैं. ससुराल में उनके कमरे में AC और smart TV है. मेरे कमरे में सिर्फ़ पंखा और पुराना TV. कोई सीधे कुछ नहीं कहता पर सब महसूस होता है. दीवाली पर जब भाभी ने सास जी को इक्कीस हज़ार रुपए का gift दिया और मैंने सिर्फ़ सौ रुपए का तो उनकी आंखों में वह appreciation नहीं था और मैं बहुत रोई. मेरे पति ने कहा कि वह जितना कमा सकते हैं कमा रहे हैं. पर मुझे भी देखना चाहिए कि मैं क्या कर सकती हूं. मैंने सोचा भाभी के पास बाप का पैसा है पर मैं भी कुछ कर सकती हूं. अगले दिन YouTube पर सीखो app का ad आया. मैंने download किया और finance section में finance courses और skills सीखना शुरू किया. रोज़ एक घंटा निकालकर सीखा और दो महीने बाद मेरी पहली कमाई आई. छोटी थी पर अपने दम पर थी. मैंने सास जी को पहला gift दिया और उनकी आंखों में सम्मान देखा. अब पांच महीने हो गए हैं और मैं लगातार कमा रही हूं. अब भाभी की shopping देखकर जलन नहीं होती क्योंकि मैं किसी पर dependent नहीं हूं. Middle class होना कोई excuse नहीं हो सकता. अगर आप भी ऐसे comparison से गुज़र रही हैं तो अपनी पहचान बनाइए. Install now पर click करो और अभी सीखो app download करो. तो install button पर click करो और सीखो app download करो.

comp_format: AI-Generated: AI-generated glossy woman in a luxe room morphing into a cyborg/robot avatar against a neon cyberpunk backdrop, talking-head with Malayalam captions and an end disclaimer card
reframe: Copy the glossy AI 'transformation' visual where a stylish woman in a luxe room morphs into a chrome cyborg against a neon cyberpunk backdrop, talking-head with captions and an end disclaimer card, hook 'got time, but are you doing anything useful with it?'. Reframe the vague self-improvement angle into a concrete money transformation: 'got ₹100 a day, but is it doing anything for you?' — the glossy morph visualizes idle rupees upgrading into a growing Bachatt emergency fund, future-self glow-up.
hook: Roz ke ₹100 hain — par kya woh tumhare liye kaam kar rahe hain?
script: HOOK (0-3s): [glossy woman in luxe room, neon backdrop] VO: 'Roz ke ₹100 hain — par kya woh tumhare liye kaam kar rahe hain?' | BEAT 1: [she scrolls idly, coins slipping away in animation] VO: 'Roz ₹100 chai-snacks mein chup-chaap nikal jaate hain.' | BEAT 2: [morph begins: she taps Bachatt daily SIP, chrome glow] VO: 'Wahi ₹100 roz invest karo — apne aap kat jaata hai.' | BEAT 3: [futuristic balance dashboard climbing past 3% line] VO: 'Savings account 3%, Bachatt usse aage — emergency fund banta hua.' | TURN: [she fully transformed, confident future-self] VO: 'Idle paisa nahi — kaam karta paisa.' | CTA (end): [Bachatt app screen] VO: 'Aaj se roz ₹100 bachao — Bachatt.'

src.hook: Got time, but are you doing even one useful thing with it?
src.key_message: Seekho App will bring change in you; stop wasting time and put it to productive use to transform your life.

Reframe the fantasy-cricket strategy into a 'winning savings team' breakdown: the presenter red-circles '₹100/day = your playing XI', annotates 'Emergency Fund', '3% account = OUT', and ends by drawing a circle around the Bachatt 'Start SIP' button as the game-winning move.
hook: Apni winning team banao — ₹100 roz, emergency fund, aur 3% account ko bench bitha do.
script: HOOK (0-3s): [presenter beside big iPad, red marker over 'WINNING TEAM' graphic] VO: 'Apni winning team banao — ₹100 roz, emergency fund, aur 3% account ko bench bitha do.' | BEAT 1: [he circles '₹100/DAY' with stick] VO: 'Pehla player — roz ₹100 ka daily SIP, auto-kat.' | BEAT 2: [annotates 'EMERGENCY FUND' with red arrow] VO: 'Doosra — emergency fund, jo musibat mein kaam aaye.' | BEAT 3: [crosses out '3% SAVINGS = OUT'] VO: 'Savings account ka 3%? Out — bahut slow.' | TURN: [he circles a 'START SIP' button on screen] VO: 'Aur yeh raha game-changer — bas SIP start karo.' | CTA (end): [Bachatt app screen] VO: 'Aaj se roz ₹100 bachao — Bachatt.'

Usse kaat do.' | BEAT 3: [2-min timer graphic, he points] VO: 'Bas 2 minute — roz ₹100 ka daily SIP set ho jaata hai.' | TURN: [he taps a glowing 'START SIP' / SUBMIT button] VO: 'SUBMIT dabao — future ka corpus jeet lo.' | CTA (end): [Bachatt app screen] VO: 'Aaj se roz ₹100 bachao — Bachatt.'

comp_format: Production-Led: Studio talking-head presenter + app screen demo, branded set
reframe: Copy the polished studio talking-head device: a calm presenter at a clean branded desk, framed CIBIL/credit posters behind him, who holds up a phone showing one shocking on-screen number, then walks through it eyes-closed-confident. Reframe the 'you paid EMI but it still shows due' anxiety into 'your savings account is quietly robbing you' — presenter holds up a phone showing 3% interest vs Bachatt's daily-SIP growth, and reveals roz ₹100 builds an emergency fund so you never beg a bank again.
hook: Aapka savings account 3% de raha hai — aur mehngai 6% kha rahi hai. Samajh aaya?
script: HOOK (0-3s): [presenter at branded desk, holds phone showing '3% p.a.' big on screen] VO: 'Aapka savings account 3% de raha hai — aur mehngai 6% kha rahi hai. Samajh aaya?' | BEAT 1: [graphic poster behind him lights up: ₹1,00,000 idle] VO: 'Bank mein pada paisa har saal chhota ho raha hai.' | BEAT 2: [presenter swaps phone to Bachatt app] VO: 'Bachatt par roz sirf ₹100 — daily SIP, RD, sab automatic.' | BEAT 3: [score-gauge style graphic climbing] VO: 'Wahi ₹100 emergency fund ban jaata hai.' | TURN: [Bachatt screen: ₹36,500 saved in a year, growth above 3%] VO: 'Ab loan ki zaroorat hi nahi — apna paisa apne kaam.' | CTA (end): [Bachatt app open on phone] VO: 'Aaj se roz ₹100 bachao — Bachatt.'

src.hook: You paid your 6,000 EMI three months ago, but CIBIL still shows it as due.
src.key_message: A common payment-not-updated issue tanks your CIBIL; Oolka AI mails the bank and bureau to clear the wrong due. Install Oolka.
src.transcript: छह हज़ार रुपए की EMI तीन महीने पहले pay कर दी थी. पर CIBIL पर अभी भी due दिखा रहा है. यह problem बहुत common है. Payment हो जाता है पर bank या credit report में update नहीं होता. Bank इसे late payment समझ लेता है, CIBIL गिरता है, इससे और next loan महंगा मिलता है या reject ही हो जाता है. अगर आप Ola app use करते हो सिर्फ सौ रुपए के subscription में Ola का AI धुर्वा इस issue को identify करता है और खुद से bank और credit bureau को mail करता है आपको branch जाने की ज़रूरत नहीं ना call पर लड़ने की. AI follow up करता है जब तक due clear नहीं होता. गलत due हट जाता है, cibil score बच जाता है और credit profile clean रहती है. EMI pay कर दी है पर due दिख रहा है Olka use करो, AI से issue solve कराओ. तो install button पर click करो और Olka app download करो.

comp_format: Skit: Creator skit, laborer-with-Thar premise, multiple actors outdoors
reframe: Copy the outdoor creator-skit device: a frustrated young man in a village field jealously points at a flashy Thar/SUV while a woman reacts dramatically, then a phone reveal flips his mood — status-envy hook with a real-app screen close-up. Reframe 'he got a loan, I got rejected' into 'he EMI-traps himself for that Thar, I quietly built savings' — our hero stops envying the loan-funded car and shows Bachatt's daily ₹100 SIP that made him debt-free and richer.
hook: Woh Thar EMI pe chala raha hai — main roz ₹100 bacha ke chain se so raha hoon.
script: HOOK (0-3s): [young man in field points jealously at a shiny Thar passing by] VO: 'Yaar uske paas Thar hai, aur mere paas kuch nahi?' | BEAT 1: [woman reacts loudly, mocking him] VO: 'Loan le ke gaadi — har mahine 40,000 EMI ka tension!' | BEAT 2: [hero pauses, pulls out phone] VO: 'Aur main? Roz sirf ₹100.' | BEAT 3: [close-up Bachatt app: savings climbing, ₹73,000 fund] VO: 'Daily SIP se mera emergency fund taiyaar.' | TURN: [hero smiles, walks confidently as Thar guy looks tense] VO: 'Woh karza chuka raha hai — main aaram se.' | CTA (end): [Bachatt app on phone screen] VO: 'Aaj se roz ₹100 bachao — Bachatt.'

src.hook: A laborer drives a Thar but I can't get a loan? My credit score is so bad.
src.key_message: Check your credit score on Oolka; its AI negotiates with lenders to clear overdue loans and push your score to 800+ for easy loans.
src.transcript: अभी मज़दूर छह feet गहरा गड्ढा खोदना है कितने पैसे लेगा? ठीक है madam खोद दूंगा आठ सौ रुपए लूंगा. चल ठीक है आठ सौ ही ले लिए. अपनी cycle उठाओ मेरे पीछे पीछे आ जा. ठीक है madam. अरे madam मैं कह रहा हूं तुम्हारी गली में मेरी थार चली जाएगी है ना? मतलब तूने मजदूरी कर बैठकर थार ले ली? अरे madam, यह थार तुमने loan पर ली है. अच्छा, तुझे मज़दूर को loan मिल गया और मुझे loan नहीं मिल गया. मेरा credit score तो इतना ख़राब है. अरे तो madam, आपने उल्का पर check? उल्का यह क्या है? आओ madam अपना phone दिखाओ मैं बताता हूं. ठीक है. यह लो. अरे madam तुम्हारा credit score तो बहुत ख़राब है. तो यह कैसे सही होगा भैया? रुको एक minute उल्का से पूछता हूं. Hey उल्का सबा का credit score कम क्यों है? मैंने आपकी credit profile देखी, आपका score चार सौ पचास है और आपके पुराने loans overdue हैं, जिस पर total ब्याज अब पचास percent से ज़्यादा हो गया है. मैं lender को mail भेजकर से negotiate करता हूं, जिससे हो सकता है multiple EMI का option मिल जाए और सिर्फ़ principle amount pay करने से loan clear हो जाएगा और NOC मिल जाएगी आपका score भी 800 plus हो सकता है और आगे loan मिलने में आसानी होगी. यह देखो madam अब तुम्हारा credit score उल्का सा बढ़ेगा अब तुम घर car bike loan कुछ भी कर सकती हो. ठीक है, अब मैं loan लूंगी. तो guys आप किस बात का wait कर रहे हो? आप भी download करो उल्का app.

reframe: Copy the subtitled talking-head-plus-motion-graphics device: a presenter in greenery cuts between his face and bold full-screen branded cards (a rising score gauge '751', a red REJECTED stamp, a bulleted problem list 'Old Overdue / Missed EMIs / Fake Entry') ending on a punchy tagline card. Reframe the 'what's wrong with your credit' diagnosis into a 'what's wrong with your money' diagnosis — bullet cards become 'No savings / Idle in 3% account / Spent before saved', and the fix card becomes daily ₹100 SIP on Bachatt.

script: HOOK (0-3s): [presenter in greenery, bold card 'Account Khaali?' slams in] VO: 'Mahine ke end mein account khaali? Teen galtiyan har koi karta hai.' | BEAT 1: [bulleted card: 'No Savings / 3% Account / Pehle kharch, baad mein bachat'] VO: 'Bachat nahi, paisa idle, aur kharch pehle.' | BEAT 2: [red stamp card 'EMERGENCY = LOAN'] VO: 'Isliye emergency mein loan lena padta hai.' | BEAT 3: [green gauge card climbing] VO: 'Bachatt sab theek karta hai — daily ₹100 SIP.' | TURN: [card: 'Loan-free bano, Bachatt download karo'] VO: 'Pehle bachao, phir kharcho.' | CTA (end): [Bachatt app screen] VO: 'Aaj se roz ₹100 bachao — Bachatt.'

src.hook: Is your CIBIL score low? Oolka's AI shows you exactly what is wrong with your loan.
src.key_message: Oolka AI detects old overdue, missed EMIs and fake unknown entries so you become loan-ready. Download Oolka.

comp_format: Production-Led: Studio bank-office set, talking-head presenter + app screen demo
reframe: Copy the authority-set device: a grey-haired 'bank officer' in a formal shirt-tie sits across a desk with a nameplate and binder shelves behind him, speaking Hindi to an off-camera customer whose hand holds a phone showing the app gauge, with bold subtitle chips ('800 se upar hai to / chehra tak nahi'). Reframe the threshold fear-tactic into savings empowerment — the officer admits banks only respect people with savings, and the customer's phone shows Bachatt's daily-SIP fund instead of a credit score, so you never need the bank's approval again.
hook: Bank wale unhi ko izzat dete hain jinke paas bachat hoti hai — sach hai na?
script: HOOK (0-3s): [bank officer at desk, nameplate, subtitle chip '800 se upar hai to'] VO: 'Bank wale unhi ko izzat dete hain jinke paas bachat hoti hai — sach hai na?' | BEAT 1: [officer leans in, customer's hand visible across desk] VO: 'Bachat nahi to har emergency pe loan, har loan pe byaaj.' | BEAT 2: [customer's phone tilts up — Bachatt app gauge replacing CIBIL] VO: 'Lekin agar daily ₹100 bach rahe ho...' | BEAT 3: [Bachatt screen: emergency fund ₹50,000] VO: '...to bank ke chakkar lagane ki zaroorat hi nahi.' | TURN: [officer nods, impressed] VO: 'Apni bachat — apni taqat.' | CTA (end): [Bachatt app on phone] VO: 'Aaj se roz ₹100 bachao — Bachatt.'

src.hook: If your credit score is above 800 every bank gives a loan; below 600, none will even look at you.
src.key_message: Oolka AI Plus shows all active loans on one screen, finds and closes fake loans, and improves your CIBIL. Download Oolka.
src.transcript: अगर credit score आठ सौ से ऊपर है तो हर bank loan दे देगा लेकिन अगर छह सौ से नीचे हुआ तो कोई bank आपका चेहरा तक नहीं देखेगा. इसलिए Ulka app download करो. यह एक AI powered financial app है जिसमें एक feature है Ulka AI Plus जिसमें ये सारे active loans एक ही screen पर दिखा देगा, fake loans को ढूंढेगा और bank से बंद करवाएगा और आपका CIBIL score improve करेगा. अगर आपका भी score low है या 07:50 plus करना चाहते हो, तो Ulka app download करो.

Reframe the family loan-argument into a family savings-argument — the mother panics about borrowing for an expense, the kids calm her by showing Bachatt's daily ₹100 emergency fund that already has the money saved.

Paisa toh humne pehle se roz ₹100 bacha rakha hai.' | BEAT 1: [mother throws hands up, dramatic] VO: 'Beta, kharcha aa gaya, bank ke alawa kya rasta?' | BEAT 2: [son pulls out phone, selfie-style] VO: 'Rasta yeh — Bachatt par daily SIP chalti rahi.' | BEAT 3: [phone close-up: Bachatt fund ₹40,000 ready] VO: 'Emergency fund taiyaar hai, loan ki zaroorat nahi.' | TURN: [whole family relieved, smiling, walking together] VO: 'Roz thoda bachao, badi tension se bacho.' | CTA (end): [Bachatt app screen] VO: 'Aaj se roz ₹100 bachao — Bachatt.'

comp_format: Non-Skit: Single creator selfie monologue to camera (UGC)
reframe: Copy the raw single-creator selfie monologue device: one relatable guy under a flyover talks straight to a handheld front camera, no set, emotional hand gestures, telling a 'someone in my family' story — pure UGC authenticity, no graphics. Reframe the 'sister-in-law's loan got rejected' worry into 'my friend had no savings for an emergency' — same intimate confession, but the resolution is downloading Bachatt and starting a daily ₹100 SIP so you're never caught short.

script: HOOK (0-3s): [guy under flyover, handheld selfie, serious face] VO: 'Mere dost ke paas emergency mein ₹5,000 bhi nahi the — sirf isliye ki bachat hi nahi thi.' | BEAT 1: [he gestures, frustrated] VO: 'Salary aati hai, mahine ke end tak udd jaati hai.' | BEAT 2: [leans closer to camera] VO: 'Maine bola — yaar, roz sirf ₹100 bacha.' | BEAT 3: [shows Bachatt app on his phone] VO: 'Bachatt par daily SIP, RD, emergency fund — sab apne aap.' | TURN: [he smiles, relieved] VO: 'Ab uske paas backup hai, loan ki begging nahi.' | CTA (end): [Bachatt app screen] VO: 'Aaj se roz ₹100 bachao — Bachatt.'

src.hook: Our sister-in-law's loan got rejected again - why does this keep happening?
src.key_message: Oolka, India's first AI credit expert, analyses why your loan is rejected, improves your CIBIL and mails the bank for you. Download Oolka.
src.transcript: ದೋಷತೆ ಮಣ್ಣೆ ಲೋನ್ ತೆಗೆದುಕೊಂಡು ನೀನುಣಿ ಮುಗಿಯ ಸೇರಿ ಒಂದು ಹೊಸ ಬಿಸಿನೆಸ್ ಆಗಬೇಕಂದ ಮಾಡಿರಲ್ಲ ಲೋನ್ ಬಂತು ಏನ್ ರಿಜೆಕ್ಟ್ ಆಯ್ತು ಯಾಕ್ ಲೇನ ಈ ಸಲನು ಬ್ಯಾಂಕ್ ಗೌರವ ಲೋನ್ ರಿಜೆಕ್ಟ್ ಮಾಡಿಲ್ಲ ನಾನಿಂದ ಆಕಾಶ ಎಲ್ಲಿ ಇದೆಯಾ ಎ ಭೂಮಿ ನಾನೇ ನಮ್ಮ ವೈನಿಮನಗೆ ಬಂದಿದ್ದ ಎಎಂಐ ಮೇಲೆ ಹೊಸ ಪೋನ್ಂದಳ ಅಂತ ರಿಯಲ್ಸ್ ಮಾಡೋಣ ನಾನು ಕರೆದಿದ್ಲ್ಲಾ ಅದಕ್ಕೆ ಬಂದಿದ್ದ ಎೈನ್ ಅವರೇ ತೋರಿಸಿಕೊಟ್ಟಿ ಹೊಸ ಪೋನ್ೇ ಹ ಅದನ್ನ ರಿಯಲ್ವೈನ್ ಅವರೇ ಹೊಸ ಪೋನ್ ಇಟ್ಕೊಂಡು ರಿಯಲ್ಸ್ ಮಾಡುತ್ತಿದ್ದರಂತೆ ಇನ್ನು ಹಳೆ ಬ್ಯಾಕ್ೋರ್ ನೋಡ್ಕೊಂಡು ರಿಯಲ್ಸ್ ಮಾಡಾಕುತ್ತಿರಲಿಲ್ಲ ಯಾಕೆ ಅಂಗಡಿ ಅವರು ಲೋನ್ ಮಾಡಿಸಿ ಫೋನ್ ಕೊಡಲಿಲ್ಲ ಹೋಗಲೀ ಬಿಟ್ಟರಿಯ ವೈ ನೀವ್ ಗ್ಯಾ ತ್ಯಾಕ್ಷನ್ ಮಾಡೋಕೋ ಬ್ಯಾಟರಿ ನಿಮ್ಮಲೂನ ಯಾಕೆ ಪದೇ ಪದೇ ರಿಜೆಕ್ಟ್ ಆಗ ಅಂತ ಅಂತ ಹೇಳಿ ತಿಳ್ಕೋಬೇಬೇಕಾದ್ರೆ ಹುಳಕ ಎಐ ಆಪ್ ನ ಡೌನ್ಲೋಡ್ ಕ್ಯಾಟಗರಿ ಹುಳಕ ಹಂಗೊಂದರಲ್ಲಿ ಹುಳಕನ ಇಂಡಿಯಾದ ಫಸ್ಟ್ ಎಐ ಐತಿ ಈದ ನಿಮ್ಮ ಸಿವಿಲ್ಸ್ ಕೋರಣ ಮನಸ್ಥಿತಿ ಮತ್ತೆ ನಿಮ್ಮಲೋನ್ ಹಗಲೆಲ್ಲಾ ಯಾಕ್ ರಿಜೆಕ್ಟ್ ಆಗಿ ಅಂತತಿ ಅನ್ನೋದನ್ನು ಕೂಡ ತಿಳಾ ತಪ್ಪಕಾನ ಅನಾಲಯಜ್ ಮಾಡಿ ನಿಮ್ಮ ಸಿವಿಲ್ಸ್ ಕೋರಣ ಇಂಪ್ರೂವ್ ಮಾಡುತ್ತೆ ಮತ್ತೆ ನಿಮ್ಮ ಬ್ಯಾಂಕಿಗೆ ಪ್ರೊಫೆಷನಲ್ ಆಗಿ ಮೇಲ್ ಮಾಡಾಕ ಡ್ರಾಫ್ಟ್ ನ ಅವರ ಕಲ್ಶಿ ನಿಮಗೆಲೂನ ಅಪ್ರೊ ಆಗತ್ತರ ಮಾಡ್ತಾರೆ ಒಂದು ವೇಳೆ ನಿಮ್ಮ ಹೆಸರುೊಳಗ ಪ್ರಾಡ್ಲೋನ್ಸ್ ಸಿದ್ಧರ ಅದನ್ನಾ ಡಿಟೆಕ್ಟ ಮಾಡಿ ನಿಮಗೆ ಸ್ಲೋಚನೆ ಕೂಡ ಕೊಡುತ್ತೆ ವಾವ್ ಪದೇ ಲೋನ್ ತೆಗೆದುಕೊಳ್ಳವರ ಈ ಉಲ್ಕ್ಯಾಪ್ನ ಯುವತ್ತೈ ರೌ ಅವರ ಲೋಡ್ ಮಾಡ್ತಾರಂತೆ

comp_format: Skit: Creator skit, matrimony-choice premise, woman + two suitors acting
reframe: Copy the 'matrimony-choice' comparison skit device: a woman on a street weighs two near-identical suitors who differ on one hidden metric, intercut with a Play-Store screen reveal ('Oolka: AI Credit Score App, 4.8 stars') exposing the difference. Reframe 'two grooms, only CIBIL differs' into 'two grooms, only one has a savings habit' — both earn the same 50K, but one quietly runs a daily ₹100 SIP on Bachatt and has a real emergency fund, making him the obvious pick.
hook: Dono ki salary 50K — par ek ke paas bachat hai, doosre ke paas sirf EMI.
script: HOOK (0-3s): [woman on street, arms crossed, two suitors behind her] VO: 'Dono ki salary 50K — par ek ke paas bachat hai, doosre ke paas sirf EMI.' | BEAT 1: [she looks at suitor one, frowns] VO: 'Pehla — har cheez loan pe, account khaali.' | BEAT 2: [phone screen: Bachatt app, daily SIP active, ₹60,000 fund] VO: 'Doosra — roz ₹100 bachata hai, emergency fund taiyaar.' | BEAT 3: [she walks toward the saver, smiling] VO: 'Bina karza, future secure.' | TURN: [rejected suitor looks down] VO: 'Bachat wala hamesha aage.' | CTA (end): [Bachatt app on phone] VO: 'Aaj se roz ₹100 bachao — Bachatt.'

src.hook: Two grooms, both B.Tech software engineers earning 50K - only difference is the CIBIL score.
src.key_message: Oolka AI shows fake/unwanted loans on your PAN; clear them and your score rises automatically. Install Oolka.
src.transcript: ரெண்டு பேரும் என் புரொஃபைல் மேட்டரி மொழில பாத்துட்டு நான் தான் வேணும்னு வந்திருக்கிங்க ஆமா ரெண்டு பேரும் என்ன வேல பாக்குறீங்க சாட்டுதுல இருந்து இருங்க என்ன படிச்சிருக்கீங்க வீட்டுக்கு எவ்வளவு சம்பளம் 15000 ரெண்டு பேரும் ஒரே qualification தான் இருக்கீங்க ஆனா எனக்கு ஒரே ஒரு பிரச்சனை இருக்கே இல்ல ரெண்டு பிரச்சனை ரெண்டு பிரச்சனை அவ்வளவு பெரிய பிரச்சனை எல்லாம் இல்லை நான் எல்லா லோன்னும் கட்டிட்டேன் ஆனா என் சிபில்ஸ் க்கு ஒரு மட்டும் ஏறவே மாட்டேங்குது இது என்ன பிரச்சனைங்க உள்காப்பே இருந்தா தெரிஞ்ச போது உள்காப்புல AI ஹெல்ப் இருக்கறனால உங்க பான் கார்ல எது தேவையில்லாதலோட காமிச்சு கொடுத்துரும், சோ அது சொல்றபடி நடந்திங்கனாலே உங்க பழைய பென்டிங்லோட எல்லாமே கிளியர் ஆயிரும் பாருங்க. ஹேய் ஜூ வாக்கிங் சாலி நான் உங்களதான் சூஸ் பண்ணுறேன் இந்த மாதிரி பேச்சுனா உங்களுக்கு வந்துச்சுன்னா, உள்க்காப்பா டவுன்ல பண்ணி உங்க சிபில்ஸ்குரே ஏத்துங்க, லோன் வாங்கி உங்க வாழ்க்கைய இடத்தா உயர்த்துங்க

comp_format: Skit: (no transcript) Creator skit, multiple actors in a cafe conversation + app reveal
reframe: Copy the cinematic cafe-conversation skit device: tight, well-lit close-ups of three friends at a table — tense reaction shots cutting between a worried man, a concerned friend, and a calm woman who slides a phone (app gauge visible) across the table as the emotional turn. Reframe the credit-score worry into a savings intervention — the broke friend confesses he has nothing saved, and the calm woman reveals Bachatt's daily ₹100 SIP that quietly built her a fund, shifting the mood from panic to relief.
hook: Tu har mahine kamata hai, par bachata kuch nahi — yahi toh asli problem hai.
script: HOOK (0-3s): [cafe, worried man, tight close-up] VO: 'Tu har mahine kamata hai, par bachata kuch nahi — yahi toh asli problem hai.' | BEAT 1: [friend reacts, concerned cut] VO: 'Emergency aayi to phir wahi loan, wahi byaaj.' | BEAT 2: [calm woman slides phone across table] VO: 'Dekh — main roz sirf ₹100 daalti hoon.' | BEAT 3: [phone close-up: Bachatt gauge + fund growing] VO: 'Daily SIP, emergency fund — bina socha-samjha taiyaar.' | TURN: [broke friend's face relaxes, hopeful] VO: 'Itna aasaan?' | CTA (end): [Bachatt app screen] VO: 'Aaj se roz ₹100 bachao — Bachatt.'

src.hook: Now laugh (a tense money conversation between friends at a cafe)
src.key_message: Check and fix your credit score with Oolka's AI to become loan-eligible. Download from Play Store.

comp_format: Skit: (no transcript) Creator skit, two men in a street confrontation + app phone reveal
reframe: Copy the street-confrontation skit device: two men on a rural roadside in a heated face-to-face argument shot handheld, raw emotion, building to one man thrusting his phone forward (chat/app screen) to win the argument. Reframe the loan-trouble fight into a savings wake-up — one man rants that he's drowning because he never saved a rupee, and the other shoves his phone showing Bachatt's daily ₹100 SIP, flipping the shouting match into a calm 'just start saving' moment.
hook: Tu chillata reh — maine roz ₹100 bachaya, isliye aaj mere paas paisa hai.
script: HOOK (0-3s): [two men arguing on a rural road, handheld] VO: 'Tu chillata reh — maine roz ₹100 bachaya, isliye aaj mere paas paisa hai.' | BEAT 1: [first man rants, frustrated gestures] VO: 'Kamai poori udd jaati hai, emergency mein haath khaali!' | BEAT 2: [second man thrusts phone forward] VO: 'Toh Bachatt khol — daily SIP set kar.' | BEAT 3: [phone close-up: Bachatt app, fund built up] VO: 'Roz ₹100, saal mein ₹36,500 — bina loan.' | TURN: [first man goes quiet, takes the phone] VO: 'Itni si baat thi?' | CTA (end): [Bachatt app screen] VO: 'Aaj se roz ₹100 bachao — Bachatt.'

src.hook: His emotional money rant - a street argument turns to credit scores.
src.key_message: Increase your credit score and become eligible for low-interest loans using Oolka. Download now from Play Store.

comp_format: Non-Skit: Single creator talking head to camera + app/email screen demo
reframe: Copy the counter-intuitive talking-head device: a guy at home in a cozy lit room delivers a 'you're doing it right but still losing' hook to camera, then cuts to a real phone screen-grab proving it (here an actual email draft to a bank, then the app gauge). Reframe 'paying EMI on time still overpays interest' into 'keeping money in a savings account still loses to inflation' — show a real bank-statement screen at 3%, then cut to Bachatt's daily ₹100 SIP screen beating it, proving the 'safe' habit is the silent leak.
hook: Paisa savings account mein safe hai? Galat — 3% pe woh har saal chhota ho raha hai.
script: HOOK (0-3s): [guy in cozy room, animated to camera] VO: 'Paisa savings account mein safe hai? Galat — 3% pe woh har saal chhota ho raha hai.' | BEAT 1: [phone screen-grab: bank statement showing 3% interest] VO: 'Mehngai 6%, byaaj 3% — har mahine ghaata.' | BEAT 2: [cut back to guy, leaning in] VO: 'Solution? Roz ₹100 ko kaam pe lagao.' | BEAT 3: [Bachatt app screen: daily SIP, fund growing fast] VO: 'Bachatt daily SIP — RD, emergency fund, sab auto.' | TURN: [guy holds phone up, smiling] VO: 'Idle paisa nahi — badhta paisa.' | CTA (end): [Bachatt app open] VO: 'Aaj se roz ₹100 bachao — Bachatt.'

src.hook: Paying your EMI on time every month? Then you're giving the bank extra interest.
src.key_message: Oolka AI scans your loan record, drafts and sends a proper email to the bank, follows up to cut interest, and chats in Telugu. Install free.
src.transcript: ఇది చాలా ముఖ్యమైన విషయం ప్రతి నెల ఈఎంఐ టైం కి పే చేస్తున్నారా అయితే మీ లోన్ ఇంట్రెస్ట్ రేట్ ని ఈజీగా తగ్గించుకోవచ్చు మీ ట్రాక్ రికార్డ్ క్లీన్ గా ఉంటే డైరెక్ట్ గా బ్యాంక్ ని అడిగి ఈఎంఐ తగ్గించుకోవచ్చు కానీ దీని కోసం బ్యాంకు కి పెద్ద పెద్ద ఇంగ్లీష్ మెయిల్స్ ఎవరు రాస్తా రైట్ టెన్షన్ పడకండి దీని కోసమే ఓల్డ్ కా అనే ఒక ఏఐ వెబ్సైట్ ఉంది. ఇది ఇండియాస్ ఫస్ట్ క్రెడిట్ ఎక్స్పర్ట్. ఈ వెబ్సైట్ ని లోన్ రికార్డ్ ని స్కాన్ చేస్తుంది మీరు అన్ని టైం కి పే చేసి ఉంటే ఈ ఏఐ ఆటోమేటిక్ గా బ్యాంకు కి ఒక ప్రాపర్ ఈమెయిల్ డ్రాప్ చేసి పంపుతుంది. కాదు వాళ్ళు మీ ఈఎంఐ తగ్గించేదాకా ఆ రెస్పాన్స్ ని ట్రాక్ చేసి ఫాలో అప్ కూడా చేస్తుంది మీరు ఒక్క లైన్ కూడా టైప్ చేయాల్సిన అవసరం లేదు అంతా ఆటోమేటిక్ అంతేకాదు ఇది మీ సివిల్ రిపోర్ట్స్ ని జస్ట్ టూ మినిట్స్ లో ఫ్రీగా చేసి ఫేక్ లోన్స్ లేదా రాంగ్ ఈఎంఐ రికార్డ్స్ లాంటి ఇష్యూస్ ని డిటెక్ట్ చేస్తుంది అలాంటి ప్రాబ్లమ్స్ ఉంటే ఆటోమేటిక్ గా బ్యాంకు కి కంప్లైంట్ మీద డ్రాప్ చేస్తుంది మీ పేరు క్లియర్ అయ్యేదాకా ఇంకా మెయిన్ గా దీంట్లో తెలుగు సపోర్ట్ కూడా ఉంది మీరు ఈ ఏఐ తో మన తెలుగులోనే చాట్ చేయొచ్చు పెద్ద ఇంగ్లీష్ రావాల్సిన అవసరం లేదు ప్రతిదీ కూడా మీరు ఫ్రీగా చెక్ చేసుకోవచ్చు కాబట్టి ఎక్స్ట్రా డబ్బులు బ్యాంకు కి ఎందుకు ఇవ్వడం ఈ ఓల్కా ఏఐ వెబ్సైట్ లింక్న బయోలో ఉంది చెక్ చేయండి తప్పకుండా మీ ఫ్రెండ్స్ అండ్ ఫ్యామిలీ మెంబర్స్ కి షేర్ చేయండి.

comp_format: Production-Led: Branded talking-head creator outdoors with Oolka overlays + app screen demo
reframe: Copy the branded outdoor talking-head device: a presenter standing among parked cars with a big animated app logo and bold keyword overlays slamming on ('Missed EMI', 'Credit Score') in the local language, fast cuts, energetic delivery ending with a wagging-finger 'fix it' line. Reframe the step-by-step credit-fix pitch into a step-by-step savings plan — keyword overlays become 'No Fund', 'Daily SIP', '₹100', and the presenter promises Bachatt gives a simple in-your-language plan to build savings so you skip loans entirely.
hook: Salary aate hi udd jaati hai? Ek simple plan se roz ₹100 bach sakta hai.
script: HOOK (0-3s): [presenter among cars, bold overlay 'Salary = Gone' slams in] VO: 'Salary aate hi udd jaati hai? Ek simple plan se roz ₹100 bach sakta hai.' | BEAT 1: [overlay 'No Emergency Fund' flashes] VO: 'Bachat nahi, isliye har problem pe loan.' | BEAT 2: [big Bachatt logo animates up beside him] VO: 'Bachatt App — daily SIP, RD, emergency fund.' | BEAT 3: [phone screen: step-by-step savings plan in Hindi] VO: 'Aapki bhasha mein step-by-step plan.' | TURN: [presenter wags finger, confident] VO: 'Loan-free bano — apni bachat se.' | CTA (end): [Bachatt app screen] VO: 'Aaj se roz ₹100 bachao — Bachatt.'

src.hook: Score above 800 and banks chase you; below 600 they say no - that's why you need Oolka.
src.key_message: Oolka's AI credit expert reads your history, mails the bank to fix errors and gives a step-by-step plan in your language. Download Oolka.
src.transcript: మీ క్రెడిట్ స్కోర్ 800 కన్నా ఎక్కువ ఉంటే బ్యాంకులు మీ వెంటే వస్తాయి అదే 600 కన్నా తక్కువ ఉంటే లోన్ అంటే నో అంటై అందుకే మీకు కావాల్సింది ఉల్కా యాప్ ఇందులోని ఏఐ క్రెడిట్ నిపుణుడు మీ క్రెడిట్ హిస్టరీ ని అర్థం చేసుకుని మీ పెంచడానికి గైడ్ చేస్తాడు. మీ లోన్స్ మిస్ అయిన ఈఎంఐ లో క్రెడిట్ కార్డ్స్ అన్ని ఒకే స్క్రీన్ లో ఏదైనా తప్పు ఉంటే మీ బ్యాంకు కి అదే మెయిల్ పంపించి దాన్ని సరి చేయడంలో సహాయం చేస్తుంది. ఏ కార్డు తీసుకోవాలి ఏ లోన్ క్లోజ్ చేయాలి. స్టెప్ బై స్టెప్ ప్లాన్ అది కూడా మీ భాషలో. మీరు చేయాల్సిందే అంతా షాట్ చేయడం మాత్రమే ఇప్పటికే లక్షల మంది వాళ్ళ క్రెడిట్ స్కోర్ పెంచుకొని లోన్ అప్పుడు కూడా చేసుకున్నారు. మీరు కూడా లోన్ కి అప్లై చేసే ముందు ఉల్కా యాప్ తో మీ క్రెడిట్ కోర్ ఫిక్స్ చేసుకోండి ఇప్పుడే ఉల్కా యాప్ డౌన్లోడ్ చేసుకోండి

comp_format: AI-Generated: AI text-to-video: cinematic owl-mascot 'agent' hero vs Chinese loan-app villains + app chat screen
reframe: Copy the cinematic AI-generated mascot-hero device: a fierce blue owl 'agent' in a trench coat (Bachatt brand on chest) stands as the hero against menacing glowing-red villain figures and a 'loan-app jail' movie-poster aesthetic, narrated like a film trailer, with a phone chat-screen cameo. Reframe the anti-fake-loan war into an anti-debt-trap war — the owl mascot becomes the 'Bachatt Bachao' guardian who defeats the giant red 'Karza/Loan' monster not by fixing scores but by arming you with a daily ₹100 SIP and an emergency fund shield.
hook: Ek hi cheez Karza ke rakshas ko hara sakti hai — roz ki bachat.
script: HOOK (0-3s): [trailer-style title 'KARZA vs BACHAT', blue owl mascot strides forward] VO: 'Ek hi cheez Karza ke rakshas ko hara sakti hai — roz ki bachat.' | BEAT 1: [giant glowing-red 'Loan' monster looms over tiny people] VO: 'Karza aata hai, salary kha jaata hai, neend ud jaati hai.' | BEAT 2: [owl mascot raises a glowing shield labelled 'Emergency Fund'] VO: 'Bachatt ka guardian deta hai daily SIP ka kavach.' | BEAT 3: [phone chat-screen: Bachatt plan, fund growing] VO: 'Roz ₹100 — aur rakshas peeche hatne lagta hai.' | TURN: [monster shrinks, owl stands victorious] VO: 'Bina karza, future surakshit.' | CTA (end): [Bachatt app + logo on phone] VO: 'Aaj se roz ₹100 bachao — Bachatt.'

src.hook: You took just 5,000 and now they demand 50,000, threatening to send your photo to your family.
src.key_message: Oolka's AI doesn't just give advice - it finds fake loans on your PAN and emails the bank and bureau to act. First scan free; download Oolka.
src.transcript: सिर्फ पांच हज़ार लिए थे अब पचास हज़ार मांग रहे हैं. बोले, नहीं दिया तो घर में सबको photo भेज देंगे. पहला दिन, location चीन. Mission सिर्फ एक एक और हिंदुस्तानी को इनके जाल से बचाना. पैसा दे दो, वरना तुम्हारा photo सीधा तुम्हारी मां के पास जाएगा, पूरा समाज देखेगा. आप शांत रहिए इनका पूरा system, मैं अभी बंद करता हूं, दूसरे app सिर्फ़ ज्ञान देते हैं. मैं action लेता हूं. यह देखिए आपके नाम पर चार फ़र्जी loan चल रहे हैं जो आपने कभी लिए ही नहीं. मैं इन्हें अभी bank और credit bureau दोनों को भेज रहा हूं. ULCA का AI ख़ुद email लिखता है और loan process शुरू करवाता है. उल्का है तो कोई आपको उल्लू ना बना सके पहला scan बिल्कुल free है. अभी उल्का download करो.

comp_format: Production-Led: Talking-head creator with motion-graphics overlays (score gauge, AI-chat card) + app demo
reframe: Copy the named-case-study testimonial device: a talking head with floating motion-graphics overlays (a real person's photo + a big number like '30,000', a score gauge swinging to '550', a 'Chat with AI Expert / Reach 800+' app card) tells one specific named person's before-after transformation. Reframe Sonu's EMI-reduction story into a savings success story — 'Sonu from Durg' who had zero savings and one ₹30,000 emergency loan trap, then started a daily ₹100 SIP on Bachatt and in a year had his own fund, so the next emergency cost him zero interest.
hook: Durg ke Sonu ne roz ₹100 bachaya — aur agli emergency mein ek bhi rupiya byaaj nahi diya.
script: HOOK (0-3s): [talking head, overlay photo of 'Sonu' + '₹30,000' card] VO: 'Durg ke Sonu ne roz ₹100 bachaya — aur agli emergency mein ek bhi rupiya byaaj nahi diya.' | BEAT 1: [gauge graphic swings down, red] VO: 'Pehle Sonu ke paas zero bachat thi — har kharch pe loan.' | BEAT 2: ['daily ₹100 SIP' card animates up] VO: 'Phir Bachatt par daily SIP shuru ki.' | BEAT 3: [fund graphic climbs to ₹40,000+] VO: 'Saal bhar mein apna emergency fund taiyaar.' | TURN: [Sonu's photo smiling, 'Loan-free' stamp] VO: 'Agli emergency — apna paisa, zero byaaj.' | CTA (end): [Bachatt app screen] VO: 'Aaj se roz ₹100 bachao — Bachatt.'

src.hook: Sonu from Durg converted his 30,000 EMI into 25,000 - here's how.
src.key_message: Oolka AI fixed Sonu's 550 score with a step-by-step plan, then negotiated his interest down to 10%, cutting EMI by 5,000. Download Oolka.
src.transcript: के रहने वाले सोनू ने अपनी तीस हज़ार की EMI को पच्चीस हज़ार की EMI में convert लिया. मैं बताता हूं कैसे? जब पैसों की ज़रूरत पड़ी तो सोनू को loan लेना सही लगा पर उसका credit score पांच सौ पचास पर ही था. इसी वजह से उसका interest rate बहुत ज़्यादा हो गया. अब उस समय तो उसे पता था कि वह interest rate के जाल में फ़ंस चुका है. तीन महीने बाद सोनू को यह बात समझ में आई तब उसने Ola app download किया और उसके AI से यह सारी बातें बताई. फिर AI ने बताया कि पहले तुम अपना credit score सुधारों और फिर उसने एक plan भी बताया कि कैसे तुम अपना credit score आठ सौ K भी ऊपर ले जा सकते हो. तीन महीने बाद जब उसका credit score सही हो गया तो इसी Olka app के AI ने interest rate की बात bank से और एक हफ़्ते में उसका interest rate गिरकर दस percent पर आ गया और उसकी EMI पांच हज़ार तक कम हुई. अगर आपको भी अपनी EMI कम करवानी है तो एक बार credit score ज़रूर check करें और अभी उल्का app download करें.

comp_format: Skit: Creator skit, credit-repair-agent vs Oolka premise, multiple actors
reframe: Copy the 'industry insider out of business' skit device: a sheepish agent in matching uniform confesses to camera that his old paid service is now dead because an app does it free, intercut with a phone showing the app's report-summary and gauge as proof. Reframe the credit-repair-agent confession into a moneylender/chit-fund agent confession — a local 'byaaj pe paisa dene wala' admits nobody borrows from him anymore because people now build their own emergency fund with Bachatt's daily ₹100 SIP.
hook: 5 saal se byaaj pe paisa deta tha — ab koi udhaar maangne hi nahi aata.
script: HOOK (0-3s): [moneylender in plain shirt, sheepish to camera] VO: '5 saal se byaaj pe paisa deta tha — ab koi udhaar maangne hi nahi aata.' | BEAT 1: [he shrugs, empty ledger book] VO: 'Pehle emergency mein log mere paas daudte the.' | BEAT 2: [cut to a customer's phone: Bachatt app gauge + fund] VO: 'Ab sab roz ₹100 bacha ke apna fund bana lete hain.' | BEAT 3: [Bachatt report-summary screen] VO: 'Daily SIP, RD, emergency fund — bina byaaj.' | TURN: [moneylender closes his shop sign, defeated] VO: 'Mera dhanda khatam — logon ka faayda.' | CTA (end): [Bachatt app screen] VO: 'Aaj se roz ₹100 bachao — Bachatt.'

src.hook: I've been a credit-repair agent for 5 years charging 10,000, but now nobody comes to me.
src.key_message: Oolka AI files disputes by auto-mailing the bank to remove loans you never took and pushes your score to 800+. Download Oolka now.
src.transcript: ನೋಡಿ ಮೇಡಂ ನಾನು ಐದು ವರ್ಷದಿಂದ ಕ್ರೆಡಿಟ್ ರಿಪೇರ್ ಏಜೆಂಟ್ಚೆಗೆ ಕೆಲಸ ಮಾಡ್ತಾ ಇದೀನಿ. ಕ್ರೆಡಿಟ್ ಸರ್ವರು ಸರಿ ಮಾಡೋಕ್ಕೆ ಮತ್ತೆ ಬ್ಯಾಂಕ್ ಅವರ ಜೊತೆ ಮಾತಾಡಬೇಕೆ ನಾನು ಒಬ್ಬರ ಹತ್ರ 10000 ತಗೊಳ್ಳುತ್ತಿದ್ದೆ. ಆದರೆೀಗ ಒಬ್ಬರು ಕೂಡ ಬರುತ್ತೆ ಇಲ್ಲ. ಎಲ್ಲ ಅವರ ಎಷ್ಟಕ್ಕೆ ಸಿ ಬಿಲ್ ಸರಿ ಮಾಡ್ತಾ ಇದ್ದಾರೆ. ನನ್ನ ದಂಧೆ ಹೇಗೆ ಅಳತ್ ಆಯ್ತು ಮಾಡಂಡ್? ಈ ಹೊಸ ಹುಡುಗ ಎಷ್ಟು ದಿನದಿಂದ ನಿಮ್ಮ ಜೊತೆ ಇದ್ದಾನೆ? ನಿನ್ನೆನೇ ಸೇರಿದ? ಇವನ್ ಯಾರಿಗೊತ್ತ ಮಾಡಿಸ? ಇವನ್ ಫೇಮಸ್ ಸೋಶಿಯಲ್ ಮೀಡಿಯಾ ಇನ್ ಫ್ಲೆನ್ ಸರ್? ನೋಡು ಇವನ್ ಎಷ್ಟು ಫೇಮಸ್ ಅಂತ? ಹೈ, ಭಾಗವಹಿಸು! ವೆಲ್ ಕಮ್ ಬ್ಯಾಕ್ ಮೈ ಚಾನೆಲ್. ನಾನು ಇವತ್ತು ಕ್ರೆಡಿಟ್ ಏಜೆನ್ಸಿಸ್ ಅಲ್ಲಿ ಕೆಲಸಕ್ಕೆ ಸೇರಿದ್ದೇನೆ. ಇಲ್ಲಿ ಇವರು ಕ್ರೆಡಿಟ್ ಸ್ ಫೋರ್ ಸರಿ ಮಾಡಲಿಕ್ಕೆ ಜನರ ಹತ್ರ 1000 ರೂಪಾಯಿಚಾರ್ಜ್ ಮಾಡ್ತಾರೆ. ಆದರೀಗ ಅದರ ಗಟ್ಟಿಲ್ಲ. ನಾನು ನಿಮಗೆದು ಸೀಕ್ರೆಟ್ ಹೇಳ್ತಾನೆ. ಓಲ್ ಕ್ಯಾಪ್ ಡೌನ್ೋಡ್ ಮಾಡಿ. ಅದು ಹೇಗೆ ಎಲ್ಲ ವರ್ಕ್ ಮಾಡ್ತಾ ಅಂತ ನಾನು ನಿಮಗೆ ತೋರುತ್ತೇನೆ. ನನ್ನ ಕ್ರೆಡಿಟ್ ಸ್ಕೋರ್ ತುಂಬಾ ಕಡಿಮೆ ಇದೆ ಅದಕ್ಕೆ ಏನು ಕಾರಣ? ನಾನು ನಿಮ್ಮ ಕ್ರೆಡಿಟ್ ಪ್ರೊಫೈಲ್ ನೋಡಿದ್ದೇನೆ ನಿಮ್ಮ ನಿಮ್ಮ ಕ್ರೆಡಿಟ್ ಫೆಫೈಲ್ ವರದಿಯಲ್ಲಿ ನೀವು ತೆಗೆದುಕೊಳ್ಳದ ಒಂದು ಸಾಲ ಕಾಣಿಸುತ್ತಿದೆ ಅದಕ್ಕಾಗಿ ನಾನು ಆಟೋ ಮ್ಯಾಟಿಕ್ ಮೇಲ್ ಕಳುಹಿಸಿ ಡಿ ಸ್ಪ್ಯೂಟ್ ಫೈಲ್ ಮಾಡುತ್ತೇನೆ ಇದರಿಂದ ಆ ಸಾಲ ತೆಗೆದು ಹಾಕುವ ಸಾಧ್ಯತೆ ಇದೆ ಮತ್ತು ನಿಮ್ಮ ಸ್ಕೋರ್ 800 ಪ್ಲಸ್ ವರೆಗೆ ಹೋಗಬಹುದು ಅಂದ್ರೆ ನೀನು ಆಗರಿಗಿಂತ ನಾನು ಬಿಸಿನೆಸ್ ಆಲ್ ಮಾಡಲಿಕ್ಕೆ ಬಂದಿದ್ದ ಒಂದು ನಿಮ್ಸು ಮಾಡಪ್ ಕೊನೆ ನೀಡಿಕೊಳ್ಳುತ್ತಾರಾ ಹೇ ಅನಾಹುತ ಒಂದು ನಿಮ್ಸಾ ನಾನು ಡೈಲಾಗ್ ಬಾಕಿ ಟು ಆ ಹೇಳು ಗೈಸ್ ನಿಮ್ಮಲೂನ ಅಪರಲ್ ಆಗಬೇಕು ಇಂಟರೆಸ್ಟ್ ಉಳಿಸಿಗೆ ಅಂದ್ರೆ ವೋಲ್ ಕಾರ್ಪ್ ಈಗಲೇ ದಾವಣಗೆರೆಯ ಮಾಡಿ ಈ ಬಿಡಿ ಇಷ್ಟ ಆದ್ರೆ ಲೈಕ್ ಮಾಡಿ ಶೇರ್ ಮಾಡಿ ಮತ್ತೆ ಸಭಕ್ಕೆ ಸಭಕ್ಕೆ ಸಭಕ್ಕೆ ಸಭಕ್ಕೆ ಸಭಕ್ಕೆ subscribe ಮಾಡಿ

comp_format: Non-Skit: (no transcript) Single creator talking to camera in rural setting, shows Oolka app on phone
reframe: Copy the rural 'common man' authenticity skit device: a simple young guy in a kurta sits among half-built houses, speaks plainly to a handheld camera, shows the app on his phone, and ends with a 'link in bio' line in the local dialect — low-fi, highly relatable, trust-through-ordinariness. Reframe the '10th-pass guy fixed his money problem' angle into 'a 10th-pass guy started saving' — same humble setting, but instead of fixing a CIBIL score he proudly shows that roz ₹100 on Bachatt gave him his first-ever emergency fund.
hook: Main 10th pass hoon, par roz ₹100 bachaata hoon — aur mere paas ab emergency fund hai.
script: HOOK (0-3s): [young guy in kurta among half-built houses, handheld] VO: 'Main 10th pass hoon, par roz ₹100 bachaata hoon — aur mere paas ab emergency fund hai.' | BEAT 1: [he gestures simply, honest] VO: 'Pehle paisa aata tha, chala jaata tha, kuch bachta nahi.' | BEAT 2: [he holds up phone, Bachatt app] VO: 'Phir Bachatt par daily SIP shuru ki — bas ₹100.' | BEAT 3: [phone close-up: fund growing] VO: 'Ab choti-moti emergency mein loan nahi lena padta.' | TURN: [he smiles, pats his chest] VO: 'Padha-likha kam, par bachat badi.' | CTA (end): [Bachatt app, 'link in bio'] VO: 'Aaj se roz ₹100 bachao — Bachatt.'

src.hook: 10th pass guy explains how he sorted out his money problem
src.key_message: Use the Oolka app (link in bio) to check and improve your credit score; install now.

comp_format: Skit: Creator skit, husband and wife arguing at home about fake loans
reframe: Copy the husband-wife home-argument skit device: a couple fights inside a colourful bedroom over money betrayal ('I trusted you'), high emotion and pointing, resolved when the wife holds up a phone showing the app's report-summary screen. Reframe the 'fake loans in your name' fight into a 'you spent our savings' fight — the wife confronts the husband for blowing the money with nothing saved for emergencies, then they make peace by both committing to Bachatt's daily ₹100 SIP to rebuild a fund together.
hook: Tumne sab kharch kar diya, ek rupiya nahi bachaya — ab emergency mein kya karein?
script: HOOK (0-3s): [couple arguing in bedroom, wife pointing] VO: 'Tumne sab kharch kar diya, ek rupiya nahi bachaya — ab emergency mein kya karein?' | BEAT 1: [husband defensive, hands up] VO: 'Kharcha to hota hi rehta hai!' | BEAT 2: [wife holds up phone, Bachatt app] VO: 'Isiliye Bachatt — roz sirf ₹100, dono milke.' | BEAT 3: [phone close-up: shared fund growing] VO: 'Daily SIP, emergency fund — apne aap banta hai.' | TURN: [couple calms down, nods together] VO: 'Ab loan nahi — apni bachat.' | CTA (end): [Bachatt app screen] VO: 'Aaj se roz ₹100 bachao — Bachatt.'

src.hook: Couple fights: 'I trusted you more than anyone' over loans taken in their name
src.key_message: Download Oolka; it detects fake loans, clears them and boosts your CIBIL score so loans get approved.
src.transcript: ಬಿಡಬೇಡಬೇಡ ಪ್ರೀತಿ ಕೈಬೇಡಬೇಡ ಎ ಭೂಮಿಯು ಸಂತಿ ನಿನ್ನ ನಮ್ಮಿಂದಷ್ಟು ದಾನ ಬೇರೆ ಯಾರಾದ್ರೂ ನಂಬರಿಲ್ಲ ನೀನಿ ತರ ಮಧ್ಯೆಯಾತನಾ ಯಾವತ್ತೂ ಅಂದಕೊಂಡಿರಲಿಲ್ಲ ರೀ ನಾನೇನು ಮಾಡಿದೀನಿ ಯಾರನ್ನೂ ಕೇಳನ ನಸ್ಸೆಲ್ ಅಂತಕೊಂಡ್ವಿ ಏನೀನೋ ರೀ ಏನ್ ಮಾತಾಡ ಇದ್ದೀರಾ ನೀವು ನಿಮ್ಮ ಹೆಸರಲ್ಲಿ ನಾನೇಕಲು ಅಂತಕೊಂಡ್ವಿ ನಿನ್ನ ಬಿಟ್ರೆ ಬೇರೆ ಯಾರ ನನೆಸ್ಲಿ ಅಂತ ಹೋಗ್ತಾರೆ ರೀ ಸ್ವಲ್ಪ ನಿಂತಕೊಳ್ಳಿ ಇಷ್ಟು ವಿಷಯಕ್ಕೆ ನಮ್ಮಿಬ್ಬರ ಮಧ್ಯೆ ಜಗಳ ಯಾಕೆ ನೀವು ಅರ್ಥಜೆಂಟ್ ಆಗಿ ಓಲ್ಕ್ಯಾ ಅಪ್ ನ ಡೌನ್ಲೋಡ್ ಮಾಡಿಕೊಳ್ಳಿ ಓಲ್ಕ್ಯಾ ಅಪ್ ಅಂಗಂದ್ರೆನು ನಿಮ್ಮ ಹೆಸರಿನ ಮೇಲೆ ಎಷ್ಟೇ faಕ್ಕಕೊಂಡಿದ್ದರುನು ಓಲ್ಕ್ಯಾ ಅಪ್ 20ಂಟಾಿಂದಲ್ಲಿ ಕಲಿರಿ ಮಾಡುತ್ತೆ ಮತ್ತೆ ನಿಮ್ಮ ಸಿವಿಲ್ ಸ್ಕೋರ್ ಕೂಡ ಜೀವಚಕ್ರಸ್ ಮಾಡುತ್ತೆ ಹೌದಾ ಹಾಗಿದ್ರೆ ನಾನು ಇವುಗಳಲ್ಲಿ ಡೌನ್ಲೋಡ್ ಮಾಡ್ತೀನಿ ಹೌದು ನಿಜ ಒಳ್ಳೆಕಾಪ್ ನೇ ಎಲ್ರೂ ಡೌನ್ಲೋಡ್ ಮಾಡಿಕೊಳ್ಳಿ ನಿಮ್ಮ ಹೆಸರಲ್ಲಿ ಏನಾದ್ರೂ ಫೇಸ್ೇಕ್ ಲೋನ್ ಇತ್ತು ಅಂದ್ರೆ ಅಟೆಂಡ್ಟಿಕ್ ಒಳ್ಳೆಕಾಪ್ ನಿಮಗೆ ಮೇಲ್ ಮಾಡುತ್ತೆ ನಿಮ್ಮ ಲೋನ್ ಫುಲ್ ಕಲಿರಿ ಅದ ಮೇಲೆ ನೀವೇನು ಬ್ಯಾಂಕ್ ಅಪ್ ಡೇಟ್ ಮಾಡಿಲ್ಲ ಅಂದ್ರೆ ಒಳ್ಳೆಕಾಪ್ ಕಂಡ ಹಿಡಿಯುತ್ತೆ ಬಂಗಾರ ನೀನು ಹೇಳಿದಂಗೆ ನಾನು ವೋಲ್ಕಾ ಅಪ್ ನ ಡೌನ್ೋಣ ಮಾಡಿದೆ ಮತ್ತೆ ನನ್ನ ಸಿವಿಲ್ಸ್ಕೊ ಕೂಡ ಇಂಕ್ರೈಸ್ ಆಯ್ತು ಮತ್ತೆ ನನಗೆ ಕಾರ್ ತೊಳೀಕ್ಕೆ ಲೋನ್ ಅಪ್ ರೋಲ್ ಆಯ್ತು ಬಂಗಾರ ಮತ್ತೆ ಕ ವೇಟ್ ಮಾಡ್ತಾ ಇದ್ದೀರಾ ನೀವು ಕಾರ್ತನಾಗಬೇಕಂದ್ರೆ ನಿಮ್ಮ ಸಿವಿಲ್ಸ್ಕೊ ಅಂದ್ರೆ ನ ನಿರಾಕರಿಸ ಮಾಡಬೇಕು ಅಂದ್ರೆ ವೋಲ್ಕಾ ಅಪ್ ನ ಆಲ್ ಡೌನ್ ಮಾಡಿಕೊಳ್ಳಿ

comp_format: Skit: (no transcript) Malayalam relatable skit, multiple characters acting out a romance/family story around CIBIL score
reframe: Copy the regional rom-com storytelling skit device: a multi-character village love-story with a hero, an angry elder, and a girl looking out a window, shot like a mini-film with dialect subtitles and a phone (app screen) as the plot device that wins approval. Reframe 'the girl who fell for his CIBIL score' into 'the girl who fell for his savings habit' — the elder rejects the suitor until the girl reveals he runs a daily ₹100 SIP on Bachatt and has a real emergency fund, turning him into the responsible, marriage-worthy hero.
hook: Ladki ko uski shakal nahi — uski bachat ki aadat pasand aa gayi.
script: HOOK (0-3s): [village lane, angry elder confronts the hero, girl at window] VO: 'Ladki ko uski shakal nahi — uski bachat ki aadat pasand aa gayi.' | BEAT 1: [elder shouts, dismissive, pointing] VO: 'Iske paas kuch nahi, ladki ka haath nahi doonga!' | BEAT 2: [girl steps out, holds up phone with Bachatt app] VO: 'Inke paas roz ₹100 ki SIP hai — emergency fund taiyaar.' | BEAT 3: [phone close-up: Bachatt fund + daily SIP] VO: 'Karza nahi, bachat — yahi asli daulat.' | TURN: [elder softens, nods approvingly] VO: 'Jisko bachana aata hai, wahi sambhalega.' | CTA (end): [Bachatt app screen] VO: 'Aaj se roz ₹100 bachao — Bachatt.'

src.hook: A comedic Malayalam love story built around a guy's CIBIL score
src.key_message: Check and improve your CIBIL score with the Oolka app.

comp_format: Production-Led: Studio bank-officer talking head across the desk + app screen demo, branded subtitles
reframe: Copy the authority bank-officer-across-the-desk device: a formal grey-haired officer at a binder-lined desk speaks to an off-camera customer with bold Hindi subtitle chips and an inset phone showing the app gauge — borrowed institutional credibility. Reframe 'why a low credit score blocks your loan' into 'why you keep needing loans in the first place' — the officer candidly explains the real problem is zero savings, and points the customer to Bachatt's daily ₹100 SIP and emergency fund so they never sit across his desk begging again.
hook: Sach bataun? Loan tabhi chahiye hota hai jab bachat zero ho.
script: HOOK (0-3s): [bank officer at desk, nameplate, subtitle chip in Hindi] VO: 'Sach bataun? Loan tabhi chahiye hota hai jab bachat zero ho.' | BEAT 1: [officer gestures to customer's file] VO: 'Har baar emergency, har baar aap mere paas — kyunki bachat nahi.' | BEAT 2: [inset phone tilts up: Bachatt app gauge + fund] VO: 'Agar roz ₹100 bachte, to yeh naubat hi nahi aati.' | BEAT 3: [Bachatt daily-SIP screen] VO: 'Daily SIP, emergency fund — apne aap taiyaar.' | TURN: [officer leans back, smiles] VO: 'Phir bank ki nahi — apni bachat ki zaroorat.' | CTA (end): [Bachatt app screen] VO: 'Aaj se roz ₹100 bachao — Bachatt.'

src.hook: A bank officer explains why a low credit score gets your loan blocked
src.key_message: If your score is low, download the Oolka app to clean your report and improve your CIBIL score.
src.transcript: Your credit score, आणि बंकेकडुंती बंद करेल, आणि तुमसा civil score सुधारे. जर तुमचाही score कमी, असेल, किवा, साक्ष्य, पन्ना, उपेक्षा, जास्त, कराईचा, असेल, तर उल्का app download करा.

comp_format: Skit: (no transcript) Single-actor dramatic skit, man takes a loan-rejection call at night then resolves it, English subtitles
reframe: Copy the moody single-actor dramatic device: a man alone at night in blue-lit darkness takes a gut-punch phone call ('they rejected the loan...'), sweat and despair in cinematic close-ups, then a tonal shift to a calm, resolved hero with subtitle chips ('That is it. / Fix it.'). Reframe the night-time loan-rejection drama into a night-time savings epiphany — the man is denied a loan in his lowest moment, then realises the real fix is to never depend on a loan again, opening Bachatt to start a daily ₹100 SIP so the next crisis finds him ready.
hook: Raat ko loan reject hua — aur tabhi samajh aaya: kaash maine roz ₹100 bachaya hota.
script: HOOK (0-3s): [man alone at night, blue light, on a phone call, despairing] VO: 'Raat ko loan reject hua — aur tabhi samajh aaya: kaash maine roz ₹100 bachaya hota.' | BEAT 1: [tight close-up, sweat, he lowers the phone] VO: 'Har emergency mein doosron ke aage haath failana.' | BEAT 2: [he sits up, resolve building, opens his phone] VO: 'Bas — ab koi loan nahi.' | BEAT 3: [Bachatt app on screen, daily SIP being set] VO: 'Bachatt — roz ₹100, apna emergency fund.' | TURN: [man calm, arms crossed, subtitle 'Fix it'] VO: 'Agli baar main taiyaar rahunga.' | CTA (end): [Bachatt app screen] VO: 'Aaj se roz ₹100 bachao — Bachatt.'

src.hook: 'They rejected the loan...' a man gets bad news on a late-night call
src.key_message: You don't have to do anything; Oolka automatically files the dispute and fixes your credit so loans get approved.

comp_format: Skit: (no transcript) Comedy skit, kid and adult joking about credit scores, English subtitles
reframe: Copy the role-reversal comedy device: a precocious kid lectures a grown adult about money with a deadpan 'Brother X friends' caption gag, English subtitle chips, the humour coming from a child schooling an adult who's clearly behind on basics. Reframe the kid's 'what's your CIBIL score' grilling into 'how much do you save every day' grilling — the kid interrogates the broke adult, tells him to stop relying on loans, and prescribes Bachatt's daily ₹100 SIP, with the comedic punch that even a child knows you should save first.
hook: Uncle, roz kitna bachate ho? Kuch nahi? Tabhi har baar loan maangte ho.
script: HOOK (0-3s): [kid deadpan, lecturing seated adult, caption 'Brother X friends'] VO: 'Uncle, roz kitna bachate ho? Kuch nahi? Tabhi har baar loan maangte ho.' | BEAT 1: [adult fumbles, embarrassed] VO (kid): 'Salary aati hai, udd jaati hai — bachpana hai yeh.' | BEAT 2: [kid points firmly, app on phone] VO (kid): 'Bachatt khol — roz sirf ₹100 daal.' | BEAT 3: [phone close-up: daily SIP, fund growing] VO (kid): 'Daily SIP se emergency fund ban jaata hai.' | TURN: [adult nods, schooled; kid smirks] VO (kid): 'Phir loan ki bheek nahi maangni padegi.' | CTA (end): [Bachatt app screen] VO: 'Aaj se roz ₹100 bachao — Bachatt.'

src.hook: 'What's your CIBIL score?' a precocious kid grills an adult
src.key_message: Use the AI-powered Oolka app and your CIBIL score will go up.

comp_format: AI-Generated: AI-animated 3D mascots (menacing 'Loan' money-bag vs friendly Oolka phone character) with narrator VO
reframe: Copy the 3D animated villain-vs-hero mascot device: a menacing burlap 'LOAN' money-bag monster stomping through a bank vault, then a friendly blue Oolka phone-character with sneakers who defeats it. For Bachatt, keep the same cute 3D mascot war but make the villain a snarling 'KHARCH' (Expense/EMI) money-bag monster that eats your salary, and the hero a friendly 'BACHATT' piggy-bank phone mascot who grows a daily-SIP shield so you never need a loan at all.
hook: Main hoon tera Kharch — aadha salary kha jaata hoon. Bachatt bola: ab nahi!
script: HOOK (0-3s): [3D burlap 'KHARCH' money-bag monster stomps through a bank vault, coins scatter] VO: 'Main hoon tera Kharch — aadha salary kha jaata hoon. Bachatt bola: ab nahi!' | BEAT 1: [Monster growls: har mahine khali jeb, koi savings nahi] VO: 'Har mahine jeb khali, emergency aaye to loan ke aage haath failao.' | BEAT 2: [Cute blue Bachatt piggy-phone mascot with sneakers hops in, thumbs up] VO: 'Tabhi aaya Bachatt — roz sirf ₹100 ka daily SIP.' | BEAT 3: [Mascot stacks ₹100 coins into a glowing shield, monster shrinks] VO: 'Roz ₹100 jud-jud ke ban gaya emergency fund — Kharch chhota pad gaya.' | TURN: [Bachatt app screen: daily SIP streak + emergency fund growing past savings-account 3%] VO: 'Loan nahi, apna paisa. 3% wale savings account se kaafi aage.' | CTA (end): [Bachatt app screen, install button] VO: 'Aaj se roz ₹100 bachao — Bachatt.'

src.hook: 'I'm your Loan — I'll eat half your salary and wreck your sleep'
src.key_message: Oolka AI analyzes your credit history, gives a step-by-step plan to push your score above 800 and ends the loan bullying.
src.transcript: मैं loan हूं रे तुझे अभी ख़र्चे दे दूंगा पर जब हर महीने तेरी आधी salary नोचूंगा तब रोते रहेगा तुझे ऐसी औकात दिखाऊंगा कि रातों की नींद उड़ जाएगी रे. मैं Ulka app हूं. मेरा AI तुम्हारी credit history को analyze करता है step by step बताता है, जिससे तुम्हारा credit score आठ सौ से ज़्यादा हो जाएगा. सारे credit cards और loans की जानकारी एक ही screen पर दिख जाएगी. चाहे EMI की date हो, loan amount हो या EMI reminder देना हो, मुझे आज ही download करो और मैं तुम्हें इन सबसे छुटकारा दिलाऊंगा.

comp_format: Non-Skit: (no transcript) Street vox-pop style, woman with phone interviewing/talking to a pair of friends on a bike
reframe: Copy the street vox-pop device: a female host with a phone walks up to a young couple sitting on a bike under a tree and 'interviews' them about a money number, intercut with her solo pieces-to-camera. For Bachatt, the host stops the same relatable couple and challenges them to turn their tiny daily spends into a savings number — '₹100 roz se 1 saal mein ₹36,000' — instead of Oolka's CIBIL 540-to-710 reframe.
hook: Roz ki chai-sutta ka ₹100 — saal bhar mein ₹36,000 ban sakta hai. Bachayega?
script: HOOK (0-3s): [Host with phone stops a couple on a bike under a tree] VO: 'Roz ki chai-sutta ka ₹100 — saal bhar mein ₹36,000 ban sakta hai. Bachayega?' | BEAT 1: [Couple shrugs: paisa bachta hi nahi, mahine ke end mein khali] VO: 'Salary aati hai, ud jaati hai — bachat ka naam nahi.' | BEAT 2: [Host to camera, holds phone] VO: 'Bachao mat sochke — roz automatic ₹100 daily SIP laga do.' | BEAT 3: [Couple looks at Bachatt app on her phone, eyes widen] VO: '₹100 x 365 = ₹36,000, upar se return — bank ke 3% se zyada.' | TURN: [App screen: daily SIP + emergency fund + RD goal] VO: 'Emergency aaye to loan nahi — apni Bachatt kaam aayegi.' | CTA (end): [Bachatt app install screen] VO: 'Aaj se roz ₹100 bachao — Bachatt.'

src.hook: Want to take your CIBIL score from 540 to 710?
src.key_message: Scan your CIBIL report with Oolka, fix issues and clear old enquiries without talking to the bank; install now.

comp_format: Production-Led: Whiteboard hand-drawn explainer with narrator VO + app score-gauge endcard
reframe: Copy the hand-drawn whiteboard explainer device: a hand writes simple marker notes on white paper against a green wall with big bold Hinglish subtitle captions ('750 se upar hai', 'reject') ending on a clean app score-gauge endcard. For Bachatt, the same hand draws a savings math flowchart — '₹100/din' branching into emergency fund, RD and SIP — ending on the Bachatt app dashboard instead of a CIBIL gauge.
hook: Ek kagaz, ek pen — main dikhata hoon ₹100 roz se crorepati kaise banoge.
script: HOOK (0-3s): [Hand starts writing '₹100/din' on white paper, green wall, bold caption] VO: 'Ek kagaz, ek pen — main dikhata hoon ₹100 roz se crorepati kaise banoge.' | BEAT 1: [Hand draws arrow: 3% savings account = paisa so raha hai, caption 'so raha'] VO: 'Bank ka 3% wala account? Tumhara paisa wahan so raha hai.' | BEAT 2: [Draws ₹100 x 365 = ₹36,000/saal] VO: 'Roz ₹100 ka daily SIP — saal mein ₹36,000, aur compounding alag.' | BEAT 3: [Draws three branches: Emergency Fund, RD, SIP] VO: 'Yehi paisa banta hai emergency fund — taaki kabhi loan na maangna pade.' | TURN: [Cut to clean Bachatt app dashboard, score-gauge replaced by savings graph climbing] VO: 'Dheere-dheere, roz ₹100, ban jaoge crorepati.' | CTA (end): [Bachatt app endcard] VO: 'Aaj se roz ₹100 bachao — Bachatt.'

src.hook: Below 500 CIBIL and banks won't look at you; above 700 loans get approved
src.key_message: Download Oolka to remove fake loans and raise your score automatically so banks call you with loan offers.
src.transcript: మీ ఫేక్ లోన్లను తొలగిస్తుంది. మీ స్కోర్ ను 600 నుండి 7500 కి పెంచుకోవాలనుకుంటే ఇప్పుడే ఉల్కా యాప్ ను డౌన్లోడ్ చేసుకోండి.

comp_format: Non-Skit: (no transcript) Single creator talking to camera across cafe/street shots, shows Oolka app on phone
reframe: Copy the single-creator wandering-monologue device: one relatable young man talks straight to camera across multiple punchy locations (cafe table with a drink, storefront, street, electronics shop) with quick jump-cuts and an app reveal mid-way. For Bachatt, the same guy riffs on how his money vanishes at each spot — chai, snacks, impulse buys — then reveals he now auto-saves ₹100/day on Bachatt instead of Oolka's credit-score pitch.
hook: Cafe mein ₹100, kirane pe ₹100 — ud jaata hai. Wahi ₹100 roz bacha lo na!
script: HOOK (0-3s): [Creator at cafe table with cold drink, talks to camera, jump-cut] VO: 'Cafe mein ₹100, kirane pe ₹100 — ud jaata hai. Wahi ₹100 roz bacha lo na!' | BEAT 1: [Cut to storefront, walking] VO: 'Mahine ke end mein poochta hoon — paisa gaya kahan? Account khaali.' | BEAT 2: [Cut to street, holds phone] VO: 'Phir maine Bachatt pe roz ka ₹100 daily SIP set kar diya — automatic.' | BEAT 3: [Cut to shop, shows app screen] VO: 'Ab woh paisa udta nahi — emergency fund ban raha hai, loan ki zaroorat hi nahi.' | TURN: [Close-up app: savings streak, return beating 3% account] VO: 'Bank ke 3% se zyada return, aur dheere-dheere crorepati ka rasta.' | CTA (end): [Bachatt app install screen] VO: 'Aaj se roz ₹100 bachao — Bachatt.'

src.hook: A creator riffs on relatable money troubles before pitching the app
src.key_message: Use Oolka to check and improve your credit score; install now.

comp_format: Skit: (no transcript) Street comedy skit, friends carrying/teasing each other then showing the app
reframe: Copy the slapstick street-skit device: friends literally carrying a 'drowning' buddy piggyback down a colony road while teasing him, a crowd gathers, then one friend whips out the phone app to rescue him ('tag your brother' energy). For Bachatt, the buddy is being carried because he's 'doob gaya' under expenses with zero savings; the friend rescues him by setting up a ₹100/day SIP on Bachatt instead of fixing a CIBIL score.
hook: Yeh banda kharchon mein doob gaya — savings zero! Bachao ise... Bachatt se!
script: HOOK (0-3s): [Two friends piggyback-carry a limp 'drowning' buddy down a colony road, crowd watching] VO: 'Yeh banda kharchon mein doob gaya — savings zero! Bachao ise... Bachatt se!' | BEAT 1: [Buddy groans: salary aati hai, end tak khatam, ek rupiya nahi bachta] VO: 'Har mahine kamai, har mahine khaali — emergency aaye to kaun bachayega?' | BEAT 2: [Friend stops, pulls out phone] VO: 'Ruk! Loan maangne se pehle ek cheez kar.' | BEAT 3: [Shows Bachatt app, sets daily ₹100 SIP, buddy 'wakes up'] VO: 'Roz sirf ₹100 ka daily SIP — automatic bachat shuru.' | TURN: [App screen: emergency fund growing, beating 3% account] VO: 'Ab loan ki zaroorat nahi — apna emergency fund taiyaar.' | CTA (end): [Bachatt app screen, friends point at it] VO: 'Aaj se roz ₹100 bachao — Bachatt.'

src.hook: 'Tag your brother' — friends carry a buddy who's drowning in loan trouble
src.key_message: Check your credit report and improve your score with the Oolka app.

comp_format: Production-Led: Cinematic press-conference set, official/administrator addressing mics + app demo, branded subtitles
reframe: Copy the cinematic authority-figure press-conference device: a distinguished grey-haired 'official' in a Nehru jacket addresses a bank of mics at a govt-style podium (uniformed guards behind, Hindi 'prashasan' banner), holding up the app phone to the press with bold lower-third captions. For Bachatt, the same authoritative spokesperson holds a press conference declaring a 'savings mission' — beat the 3% savings account and build an emergency fund so families never fall into loan traps — instead of fixing rejected-loan CIBIL scores.
hook: Aaj se ek elaan: 3% wale savings account ko chhodo, roz ₹100 bachao!
script: HOOK (0-3s): [Grey-haired official at mic-filled podium, guards behind, raises hand] VO: 'Aaj se ek elaan: 3% wale savings account ko chhodo, roz ₹100 bachao!' | BEAT 1: [Leans into mic, serious] VO: 'Bank aapko 3% deta hai aur mehngai usse zyada kha jaati hai.' | BEAT 2: [Holds up phone toward press, app glowing] VO: 'Iska jawab — Bachatt. Roz ₹100 ka daily SIP, seedha aapke future mein.' | BEAT 3: [Points at app screen, captions flash] VO: 'Yehi paisa banta hai emergency fund — taaki kabhi loan ke aage haath na failana pade.' | TURN: [App dashboard: SIP + RD + return beating 3%] VO: 'Dheere-dheere, roz ₹100 se — crorepati banne ka rasta khula.' | CTA (end): [Bachatt app endcard, '100% safe and secure'] VO: 'Aaj se roz ₹100 bachao — Bachatt.'

src.hook: Above 800 every bank gives a loan; below 600 no bank even looks at you
src.key_message: Download Oolka; its AI reviews your credit history, fixes errors and gives a step-by-step plan in your language to get loans approved.
src.transcript: अगर आपका credit score आठ सौ से ऊपर है, तो हर bank आपको loan दे देगा, लेकिन छह सौ से नीचे है, तो कोई bank आपका चेहरा तक नहीं देखेगा. लोगों की शिकायत होती है कि bank उनके loan बार बार reject कर रहे हैं, लेकिन मैं आपको बता दूं प्रशासन इसमें आपकी कोई मदद नहीं कर सकता और मैं personally आपको एक advice ज़रूर दूंगा. आप अपने phone में उल्का app download कर लें. उल्का का AI feature आपकी credit history को समझेगा. सारे loan, credit card, missed EMI, overdue आपको एक screen पर दिखाएगा और अगर उसमें कुछ भी गलत हो तो उसे report करके सही करवाएगा. फिर यह आपको बताएगा कौन सा loan या credit card लेना है और कौन सा बंद करवाना है. पूरा step by step plan बताएगा वो भी आपकी भाषा में, आपको बस इससे chat करना है. भुल्खा app की मदद से अब तक लाखों लोगों ने अपना credit score बढ़ाकर अपने loan approve करवाए हैं. याद रखें? Loan और EMI की परेशानी में अब आप अकेले नहीं हैं, उल्का app आपके साथ है.

comp_format: Skit: (no transcript) Malayalam couple drama, husband and wife at home, ends on 'Loan Approved' stamp
reframe: Copy the warm couple-at-home micro-drama device: a stressed husband and wife in their bedroom work through a money worry together, intercut with a phone screen showing a number climbing, ending on a big satisfying stamp (Oolka used 'LOAN APPROVED'). For Bachatt, the couple's worry is 'agar emergency aa gayi to?'; the phone shows their emergency fund / savings goal climbing, ending on a 'GOAL ACHIEVED' stamp instead of loan approval.
hook: Emergency aayi to? Pareshan mat ho — roz ₹100 se apna fund khud banao.
script: HOOK (0-3s): [Husband and wife on the bed, tense, phone in hand] VO: 'Emergency aayi to? Pareshan mat ho — roz ₹100 se apna fund khud banao.' | BEAT 1: [Wife worried: hospital ya kuch ho gaya to loan lena padega] VO: 'Har baar emergency matlab udhaar, EMI, tension.' | BEAT 2: [Husband shows Bachatt app, sets ₹100/day SIP] VO: 'Is baar nahi — Bachatt pe roz ₹100 ka daily SIP laga diya.' | BEAT 3: [Phone screen: emergency fund number climbing month by month] VO: 'Thoda-thoda roz judta gaya, ban gaya emergency fund — 3% account se zyada return.' | TURN: [Big satisfying 'GOAL ACHIEVED' stamp over a smiling couple] VO: 'Ab koi emergency dara nahi sakti — loan ki zaroorat hi nahi.' | CTA (end): [Bachatt app screen] VO: 'Aaj se roz ₹100 bachao — Bachatt.'

src.hook: A couple stressed about money and credit work through it together
src.key_message: With Oolka's AI credit score tools the score hits 719 and the loan gets approved.

comp_format: AI-Generated: (no transcript) AI-rendered plush turtle mascot with text overlays narrating a 550-to-700 score story
reframe: Copy the AI-rendered plush-mascot device: a fat, sad plush turtle on pastel solid-color backgrounds tells a transformation story purely through bold Hinglish text overlays ('550 CIBIL SCORE LOAN REJECTED' to '6 mahine mein 550 se 700'), the turtle visibly cheering up and changing color each beat. For Bachatt, the same plush mascot (a chubby piggy-bank turtle) tells a savings glow-up: 'savings zero, emergency mein loan' to '1 saal mein ₹36,000 fund' as it grows fatter and happier with each ₹100 saved.
hook: Savings zero tha, emergency mein loan liya — phir roz ₹100 ne sab badal diya.
script: HOOK (0-3s): [Sad deflated plush piggy-turtle on pastel bg, bold text 'SAVINGS ZERO'] VO: 'Savings zero tha, emergency mein loan liya — phir roz ₹100 ne sab badal diya.' | BEAT 1: [Text overlay 'Bachatt download kiya', mascot perks up] VO: 'Bachatt download kiya aur roz ₹100 ka daily SIP laga diya.' | BEAT 2: [Color shift, text 'Saare paise ek jagah'] VO: 'Saari bachat ek jagah — SIP, RD, emergency fund saath mein.' | BEAT 3: [Mascot fatter/happier, text '3% account se zyada return'] VO: 'Bank ke 3% se zyada return mila — paisa sone ke bajaye badhne laga.' | TURN: [Bright bg, text '1 saal mein ₹36,000 fund'] VO: '1 saal mein ₹36,000 ka apna fund — ab kisi loan ki zaroorat nahi.' | CTA (end): [Plush mascot beams next to Bachatt logo] VO: 'Aaj se roz ₹100 bachao — Bachatt.'

src.hook: 550 CIBIL score — loan rejected
src.key_message: Oolka tells you exactly what to do — which loans to close, which EMI to pay, how to dispute — and raised the score from 550 to 700; install now.

comp_format: Non-Skit: (no transcript) Single creator talking to camera + app screen recordings (chat, score, email-to-bank)
reframe: Copy the polished talking-head-plus-app-screen-recording device: a confident creator speaks to camera in a moody-lit room, intercut with clean phone screen-recordings of the in-app AI chat and a results card (Oolka showed an email-to-bank and a '-1.5% rate reduced' card). For Bachatt, the creator explains how to stop overpaying and start saving, intercut with screen-recordings of the Bachatt daily-SIP setup and a results card showing 'returns beating your 3% savings account'.
hook: Bank ka 3% savings account tumhe loot raha hai — roz ₹100 ka jawab hai.
script: HOOK (0-3s): [Creator to camera, moody-lit room] VO: 'Bank ka 3% savings account tumhe loot raha hai — roz ₹100 ka jawab hai.' | BEAT 1: [Gestures, talks] VO: 'Savings account mein paisa rakhke socha bach raha hai? Mehngai usse zyada kha rahi hai.' | BEAT 2: [Cut to Bachatt app screen-recording: setting ₹100/day SIP] VO: 'Bachatt kholo, roz ₹100 ka daily SIP set karo — bas.' | BEAT 3: [Screen-recording: results card, returns vs 3% account] VO: 'Yeh dekho — return 3% account se kaafi zyada, paisa har din badh raha hai.' | TURN: [Screen: emergency fund + RD goals filling up] VO: 'Yehi banega emergency fund — taaki loan kabhi maangna na pade.' | CTA (end): [Bachatt app install screen] VO: 'Aaj se roz ₹100 bachao — Bachatt.'

src.hook: Struggling to get a loan because of a low credit score?
src.key_message: Oolka's AI finds your report errors, emails banks directly, lowers interest and improves your score, all in Malayalam.

comp_format: Non-Skit: (no transcript) Single creator talking to camera + app screen recordings (report, score, chat)
reframe: Copy the standing-creator-with-bold-colored-caption device: a creator stands in a clean tiled corridor speaking to camera with punchy two-tone subtitle words burned in (blue keyword + white), intercut with crisp app screen-recordings of the report/score/chat. For Bachatt, the same corridor creator with bold captions walks viewers through 'kahan tumhara paisa leak ho raha hai' and the Bachatt daily-SIP fix, intercut with savings-dashboard screen-recordings instead of credit reports.
hook: Tumhara paisa leak ho raha hai roz — ₹100 daily SIP se band karo ye leak.
script: HOOK (0-3s): [Creator stands in tiled corridor, bold two-tone caption] VO: 'Tumhara paisa leak ho raha hai roz — ₹100 daily SIP se band karo ye leak.' | BEAT 1: [Gestures, caption pops] VO: 'Chhote-chhote kharch, har din — mahine mein hazaaron udd jaate hain.' | BEAT 2: [Cut to Bachatt app screen-recording: ₹100/day SIP toggle] VO: 'Bachatt mein roz ₹100 automatic kat jaayega — bina soche bachat.' | BEAT 3: [Screen-recording: savings dashboard climbing] VO: 'Ek jagah SIP, RD aur emergency fund — sab dikhega ek screen pe.' | TURN: [Screen: return beating 3% savings account] VO: 'Bank ke 3% se zyada return — aur emergency mein loan ki zaroorat nahi.' | CTA (end): [Bachatt app endcard] VO: 'Aaj se roz ₹100 bachao — Bachatt.'

src.hook: Banks rejecting your loan because of a low credit score?
src.key_message: Oolka's AI expert checks your report, shows all loans on one screen and contacts banks to fix errors; download before you apply.

comp_format: Skit: Kannada comedy creator skit, friends on a rooftop, app drafts an email demo
reframe: Copy the rooftop comedy-creator device: a high-energy regional creator with meme sunglasses goofs around on a rooftop with exaggerated dance/gestures and a comedic regional-pride caption banner, then pivots to a phone showing the app drafting/sending something. For Bachatt, keep the same funny rooftop swagger and regional-flavor banner, but the comedic punch is him bragging he saves ₹100 daily on autopilot while his friend stays broke — pivot to the Bachatt SIP screen instead of a bank-email draft.
hook: Sab paisa udaate hain, main roz ₹100 udaata nahi — bachaata hoon, boss!
script: HOOK (0-3s): [Creator in meme sunglasses goofing on rooftop, regional-pride banner] VO: 'Sab paisa udaate hain, main roz ₹100 udaata nahi — bachaata hoon, boss!' | BEAT 1: [Exaggerated dance, points at himself] VO: 'Mahine ke end mein sab khaali, aur main? Tension-free.' | BEAT 2: [Friend walks in confused, creator pulls out phone] VO: 'Raaz? Bachatt pe roz ₹100 ka daily SIP — automatic kat jaata hai.' | BEAT 3: [Shows app screen, friend leans in] VO: 'Yehi paisa banta hai emergency fund — loan maangne ka scene hi khatam.' | TURN: [App screen: return beating 3% savings account] VO: 'Bank ka 3% bhool ja — yahan paisa sach mein badhta hai.' | CTA (end): [Both on rooftop pointing at Bachatt app] VO: 'Aaj se roz ₹100 bachao — Bachatt.'

src.hook: Uttara Karnataka comedy creator goofs around before the credit-score pitch
