src.key_message: Oolka's AI drafts and sends emails to your bank and improves your credit score; download the app.
src.transcript: Hello?

comp_format: Skit: Creator skit, two friends on a roadside
reframe: Copy the two-friends-roadside skit device: a worried friend in white kurta paces a rural road, his sharp sunglasses-wearing buddy stops him, calmly pulls out a phone and shows the app to solve his money panic, ending on them confident in front of a parked car. For Bachatt, the worried friend can't afford his goal/car and is about to take a loan; the buddy shows him Bachatt's ₹100/day SIP so he saves up and buys it loan-free instead of fixing a CIBIL report.
hook: Loan mat le bhai — roz ₹100 bacha, apni gaadi apne paise se aayegi.
script: HOOK (0-3s): [Worried friend in white kurta paces rural road] VO: 'Loan mat le bhai — roz ₹100 bacha, apni gaadi apne paise se aayegi.' | BEAT 1: [Friend frets: gaadi chahiye par paisa nahi, loan hi raasta hai] VO: 'Sapna bada hai, par EMI ke chakkar mein phasna nahi.' | BEAT 2: [Sunglasses buddy stops him, pulls out phone] VO: 'Ruk — Bachatt pe roz ₹100 ka daily SIP laga.' | BEAT 3: [Shows app screen, savings goal bar filling] VO: 'Roz thoda-thoda, ban jaayega down payment — bina loan, bina EMI.' | TURN: [Both confident in front of a parked car, app shows return beating 3% account] VO: 'Bank ke 3% se zyada return — gaadi bhi, savings bhi.' | CTA (end): [Bachatt app screen] VO: 'Aaj se roz ₹100 bachao — Bachatt.'

src.hook: Banks won't give you a loan because of a low credit score? Don't panic!
src.key_message: Oolka spots hidden errors in your credit report and files disputes for you, so you raise your CIBIL score and easily get a car or home loan.
src.transcript: ఎవ్వడ సర్పంజ్ గెలుతుడు ఏమో నివ్వ సంతోషంలో లేనిని వాడు ఫోన్ ఏంటో ఇస్తెను ఎవడు ఫోన్ లేకుండా అయితాదని ఎవ బిట్లు కూడా బుద్ధి అనరోలేదా నేను ఎవ బిట్లు కూడా బుద్ధి అనరోలేదా కా కన్రాక్స్ ఏందర్ ఇప్పుడు తెలుస్దావురా మేము మొత్తం దాడులు ఎవడు ఇప్పుడు ఫోన్ కొనుక్కోవడానికి ఇంకా పైసలు ఏందన్న నువ్వు కూతవలసిన ఇంకా ఏవో పెద్ద ఫోన్ కొనుక్కుంటే ఏమైద్దా అన్న ఆల్రెడీ సాప్సాంగ్ s 26 ఉందా అనిరా లోన్ ఫైనాన్స్ స్టార్ట్ వేసిరా ఎవరు లాస్ట్ వరకు వచ్చే వరకు లోన్ రా అతను నువ్వు ఏం టెన్షన్ ఉడకనే ఓల్డ్ క్యాప్ లో చెక్ చేసి చెప్తావు అన్న లేవ్ టూ ఎర్రర్స్ చూపిస్తాది ఒకటేమో క్లోజ్డ్ ఓపెన్ లోన్ చూపిస్తాది ఇంకొకటి ఆ టైం లో ఏమై కట్టలే అని చూపిస్తాది అన్న ఎందుకండి నీకు సిబి లేదా అరే 700 పది ఉన్నారా ఆల్రెడీ నా ఎలాంటి లోన్ తీసుకోలేరా అదే తెలుసుకున్నారు బ్యాంకు వర్డ్ అని ఒక గంటలు గంటలు నిలబడతారు తిక్కర ఇంకా బయటికి వచ్చా ఇంకోసారి మనం బ్యాంకు వదిలేసిన అవసరం లేదు అన్న ఓల్డ్ కే మనకు డెస్క్పోట్ ఫైల్ చేస్తుంది అట్లానే మనకు మెయిల్ కూడా పంపిస్తుంది ఏ బ్యాంక్ వర్డ్ అవసరం లేదురా ఏ బ్యాంక్ వర్డ్ అవసరం మొత్తం ఓల్డ్ కనే చూసుకుంటుంది అర్థమైతా నమస్తే అన్నా నమస్తేరా థాంక్యూ రాలేలేలేలేలే వాళ్ళ ఓల్డ్ క్యాప్ వల్ల సివిల్ స్కోర్ పెరిగింది అట్లానే ఫోన్ లోనో వచ్చింది కార్ లోనో నచ్చిందిరా ఎల్లాలు ఉండడం మన తప్పు కాదు ఎల్లాలు మనం ఫైన్ చేయకపోవడం మన తప్పు అడవేద్దాం సో ఓల్డ్ క్యాప్ వచ్చేసిన instagram బయో లో లింక్ ఉంటది మీకు మీ క్రెడిట్ స్కోర్ మీరు వేయించుకోవాలుకుంటే ఓల్డ్ క్యాప్ ని నా instagram బయో లో లింక్ ఉంటది లింక్ ఓపెన్ చేసి మీరు డౌన్లోడ్ చేసుకోండి

comp_format: Skit: Creator skit, customer and shopkeeper in an electronics store
reframe: Copy the customer-and-shopkeeper skit device: a buyer at a counter complains his loan/EMI got rejected, and the shopkeeper turns financial-advisor, pulling out a phone to reveal the hidden problem and the app fix, ending with a 'comment for the link' CTA. For Bachatt, the customer is short of cash at the shop and reaching for his card/loan; the shopkeeper advises him to start saving ₹100/day on Bachatt so he never runs short again, instead of fixing credit-report errors.
hook: Har baar paise kam padte hain? Card nahi — roz ₹100 ki Bachatt chala.
script: HOOK (0-3s): [Customer at shop counter, wallet empty, reaching for card] VO: 'Har baar paise kam padte hain? Card nahi — roz ₹100 ki Bachatt chala.' | BEAT 1: [Customer: mahine ke end mein hamesha tang, udhaar lena padta hai] VO: 'Salary aati hai, par bachat? Zero. Emergency mein loan hi sahara.' | BEAT 2: [Shopkeeper smiles, pulls out phone] VO: 'Galti yeh hai ki tu bachata pehle nahi — Bachatt isse theek karega.' | BEAT 3: [Shows app: ₹100/day daily SIP set] VO: 'Roz sirf ₹100 automatic — saal mein ₹36,000 ka apna fund.' | TURN: [App screen: emergency fund + return beating 3% account] VO: 'Phir kabhi paise kam nahi padenge — na card, na loan.' | CTA (end): [Bachatt app screen] VO: 'Comment karo "bachat" link ke liye. Aaj se roz ₹100 bachao — Bachatt.'

src.hook: Bro, my personal loan got rejected — did you check your credit score?
src.key_message: Loan rejections often come from credit report errors, not just low scores; Oolka AI detects and helps correct them. Comment 'score' for the link.
src.transcript: అన్న మీరు పెట్టిన పర్సన్ లోని వీడియో వచ్చి లాగిన్ చేసుకున్నాను అన్న అక్కడ రిజెక్ట్ అయిపోయింది అలాగే చాలా పర్సనల్ ని కూడా ట్రై చేశాను అన్న రిజెక్ట్ అయిపోయింది దానికి రీసన్ ఉందో చెప్తారా అన్న కొంచెం అవునా క్రెడిట్ స్కోర్ చెక్ చేసుకున్నావా ఏమో అన్న నా క్రెడిట్ స్కోర్ ఉన్నట్టు ఉందన్న. ఓకే అయితే నీకు ఒక్కరికి అని కాదు ఈ ప్రాబ్లం మన కస్టమర్స్ అందరికీ కూడా ఇదే ప్రాబ్లం చాలా మంది ఇదే డౌట్ అడిగారు నాకు అయితే చాలా మంది లోన్ రిజెక్ట్ అయితే క్రెడిట్ స్కోర్ ఏ కారణం అనుకుంటారు. కానీ కొన్నిసార్లు అసలు ప్రాబ్లం వేరే ఉంటుంది. మీ అందరి కోసం నేను వల్కా ఏఐ వెబ్సైట్ ని తీసుకొచ్చిన ఈ వల్కా వెబ్సైట్ తోనే మనం క్రెడిట్ స్కోర్ కూడా చెక్ చేసుకోవచ్చు. మనకి క్రెడిట్ స్కోర్ లో ఏ సమస్య ఉన్నా సరే మన ఈ వల్కా వెబ్సైట్డే మొత్తం చూసుకుంటుంది. ఇందులో మంచి విషయం ఏందంటే వల్కా ఏఐ మన క్రెడిట్ స్కోర్ తప్పులను గుర్తించి ఆటోమేటిక్ గా మెయిల్ చేస్తుంది. ఇక్కడ చూడండి క్లోజ్ అయిన లోన్స్ ఇంకా యాక్టివ్ లో చూపిస్తే ఇలాంటి రిమార్క్స్ల వల్ల కూడా లోన్స్ రిజెక్ట్ అవుతాయి. ఈ ఉల్కా ఏయ్ అనేది సాధారణమైన యాప్ కాదు మీ లోన్ అప్రూవల్ కు అడ్డుగా ఉన్న క్రెడిట్ రిపోర్ట్లు తప్పులను గుర్తించి వాటిని సరిచేడంలో సహాయపడుతుంది. మీరు ఫ్రీగా స్కోర్ చెక్ చేసుకోవాలనుకుంటే నాకు కామెంట్ లో స్కోర్ అని కామెంట్ చేయండి నేను మీకు లింక్ సెండ్ చేస్తాను

comp_format: Production-Led: Whiteboard explainer with hand-drawn flowchart + subtitles + branded endcard
reframe: Copy the whiteboard hand-drawn flowchart explainer device: a marker hand sketches a simple branching flowchart with subtitles and a branded endcard, framed as 'do this one thing first and you'll save lakhs.' For Bachatt, the flowchart starts at 'before you take ANY loan, do this first' and branches into 'roz ₹100 ka emergency fund' so you avoid the loan entirely — instead of Oolka's pre-loan CIBIL-fix angle.
hook: Koi bhi loan lene se pehle ek kaam karo — roz ₹100 bachana shuru karo.
script: HOOK (0-3s): [Marker hand starts a flowchart box: 'LOAN lene se pehle?'] VO: 'Koi bhi loan lene se pehle ek kaam karo — roz ₹100 bachana shuru karo.' | BEAT 1: [Draws arrow: emergency aayi to loan = EMI + byaaj ka jaal] VO: 'Loan matlab EMI, byaaj, aur saalon ka bojh.' | BEAT 2: [Draws branch: ₹100/din x 365 = ₹36,000 emergency fund] VO: 'Par roz ₹100 jod do to saal mein ₹36,000 ka apna fund taiyaar.' | BEAT 3: [Draws: emergency aaye, apne fund se nikaalo, loan nahi] VO: 'Emergency aaye to apna paisa kaam aayega — kisi ke aage haath nahi.' | TURN: [Cut to Bachatt app dashboard: SIP + return beating 3% account] VO: 'Bank ke 3% se zyada return, aur loan ki zaroorat hi khatam.' | CTA (end): [Branded Bachatt endcard] VO: 'Aaj se roz ₹100 bachao — Bachatt.'

src.hook: Taking any kind of loan — home, business or personal? Do this one thing first; you'll save lakhs.
src.key_message: Use Oolka's AI expert to find what's wrong in your credit score and draft bank emails on your behalf, boosting approval chances and best rates.
src.transcript: अगर आप किसी भी तरह का loan लेने वाले हो, घर, business या personal, तो पहले यह एक काम कर लो. लाखों बचेगा. लोग सीधा bank जाते हैं apply करने, लेकिन bank सबसे पहले CIBIL score और credit history check करता है. कोई EMI miss है, पुराना account अभी भी open दिख रहा है या score low है तो loan या तो reject होगा या बहुत ज़्यादा interest rate लगेगा. यह कोई पहले से नहीं बताता इसलिए लोग पैसा गवा देते हैं. इसके लिए उल्का use करो. इसका AI expert simple भाषा में बताता है exactly क्या problem है आपके credit score में. पुराना account close करना है या better interest rate चाहिए? उल्का bank को email draft करके भेज देता है आपकी तरफ़ से. कोई भी credit issue हो, यहां solution मिलेगा. तो कोई भी loan लेने से पहले उल्का ज़रूर check करो. Score बढ़ाओ, loan approval के chances बढ़ेंगे और best rate मिलेगा. लाखों की बचत होगी. अभी download करो.

comp_format: AI-Generated: (no transcript) Anime-style cartoon (RCB vs CSK cricket meme), AI-generated animation
reframe: Copy the AI-generated anime-meme device: a stylized anime character on a sofa taking a dramatic phone call (cricket-fan-rivalry meme energy with brand-jersey gags and a sudden black-and-white shock-panel reaction), repurposed as a branded promo. For Bachatt, animate the same anime guy reacting in shock on a call when a friend reveals he became 'crorepati slowly' just by saving ₹100/day — keeping the meme format but swapping the credit-app punchline for a daily-SIP flex.
hook: Bro ne roz ₹100 bachake crorepati ka plan bana liya — main shock mein hoon!
script: HOOK (0-3s): [Anime guy on sofa, dramatic phone call, brand-jersey gag] VO: 'Bro ne roz ₹100 bachake crorepati ka plan bana liya — main shock mein hoon!' | BEAT 1: [Anime guy leans in, curious] VO: 'Maine poocha — bina bade paise, ye kaise? Salary to meri se kam hai!' | BEAT 2: [Black-and-white shock-panel reaction, eyes wide] VO: 'Usne bola — roz sirf ₹100 ka daily SIP, Bachatt pe, automatic.' | BEAT 3: [Color returns, app screen pops in] VO: 'Bank ke 3% se zyada return, emergency fund alag — loan kabhi nahi.' | TURN: [Anime guy grins, savings graph climbing behind him] VO: 'Dheere-dheere, roz ₹100 se — crorepati banne ka asli rasta.' | CTA (end): [Bachatt logo endcard] VO: 'Aaj se roz ₹100 bachao — Bachatt.'

src.hook: RCB vs CSK — anime cricket meme reaction
src.key_message: Branded collab cartoon meme promoting the Oolka app via an IPL fan-rivalry skit.

comp_format: Skit: Creator skit, fake-insurance-claim drama between neighbours
reframe: Copy the dark-comedy 'desperate scheme' skit device: a family hatches an absurd, over-the-top plan to get money fast (Oolka: faking a death for insurance), played for shock-comedy in a narrow stairwell home with Hindi captions, before the sane character reveals the legit fix. For Bachatt, the family is plotting some ridiculous get-rich-quick jugaad because savings are zero; the sane one stops them and reveals the boring-but-real fix — roz ₹100 ki Bachatt — instead of an Oolka CIBIL repair.
hook: Paise ke liye itna drama? Roz ₹100 bacha lo, ye nautanki band ho jaayegi.
script: HOOK (0-3s): [Family in stairwell hatching an absurd get-rich scheme, Hindi caption] VO: 'Paise ke liye itna drama? Roz ₹100 bacha lo, ye nautanki band ho jaayegi.' | BEAT 1: [One brother: emergency aa gayi, paisa nahi, kuch to jugaad karo] VO: 'Savings zero thi, isliye har emergency pe yeh paagalpan.' | BEAT 2: [Sane brother facepalms, pulls out phone] VO: 'Ruko! Scheme nahi — Bachatt pe roz ₹100 ka daily SIP lagao.' | BEAT 3: [Shows app, family crowds around] VO: 'Roz thoda-thoda jud ke ban jaata hai emergency fund — bina drama, bina loan.' | TURN: [App screen: return beating 3% savings account] VO: 'Bank ke 3% se zyada return — agli emergency mein koi nautanki nahi.' | CTA (end): [Family points at Bachatt app] VO: 'Aaj se roz ₹100 bachao — Bachatt.'

src.hook: Brother's alive — but the wife showed up to collect his insurance money?!
src.key_message: Instead of insurance scams, fix your low credit score with Oolka AI, which analyzes it, settles old loans and negotiates with banks so loans get approved.
src.transcript: अरे मिश्रा जी का घर यही है क्या? आप लोगों ने insurance claim किया था? हां, हमने ही किया है. लाओ हमारे पैसे दो. कौन से पैसे? अरे भैया ने insurance करवाया था ना. यह देखो अब यह नहीं रहे. लाओ दो हमारे पैसे. पहले किश्त भरो. आज तक इन्होंने एक भी किश्त नहीं भरी है. पहले दो लाख रुपए दो फिर मिलेंगे पैसे. अरे भैया झूठ क्यों बोल रहे हो मैंने तो सारी किश्त भरी है अभी तक. हां मुझे पता था तुम दोनों नाटक कर रहे हो पैसे निकलवाने के लिए. शर्म नहीं आती दोनों को. अरे भैया क्या ही बताऊं वह पैसों की थोड़ी ज़रूरत थी इसलिए यह सब drama करना पड़ा. अरे पैसे की इतनी ज़रूरत है तो loan ले लो ना. Try किया था लेकिन bank वाले बोल रहे हैं हमारा civil score बहुत कम है क्योंकि हमने पिछला loan नहीं भरा था ना. अरे तो ऊल का app download करो ना ऊल का app इससे क्या होगा? अरे ऊल का एक बहुत ही शानदार app है जिसका AI feature तुम्हारे civil score को analyze करेगा और उसे कैसे बढ़ाना उसके steps भी बताएगा और यही नहीं इसका AI feature तुम्हारे behalf पर bank से negotiate भी करता है और तुम्हारे पुराने loan को बहुत ही आसानी से settle भी करवाता है. मतलब सारी मेहनत उल्का का AI feature करेगा और CIBIL score हमारा अच्छा होगा. बिल्कुल सही. फिर तो मैं अभी download करता हूं उनका ad. वैसे भैया आपकी गाड़ी का तो insurance आपने करवा रखा होगा ना? नहीं भैया insurance तो सिर्फ़ मेरा ही चल रहा है गाड़ी का नहीं. चलिए कोई बात नहीं. ऐसे भी गाड़ी में कितना ही ख़र्चा आता है? अरे भाई आप ऐसे क्यों बोल रहे हो? अरे ऐसे ही. चलिए मैं निकलता हूं. भैया बाहर आपके घर में किसी ने टक्कर मार दी है टूट गई है. Cool का app अभी download करें.

comp_format: Micro-Drama: (no transcript) Branded couple/mother-in-law emotional micro-drama, montage of quick clips
reframe: Copy the emotional saas-bahu micro-drama device: a tense mother-in-law vs daughter-in-law family conflict shot in warm domestic close-ups with a montage of quick reaction clips, resolving with a 'Download' brand stamp endcard. For Bachatt, the family tension is over money — the bahu is blamed for not saving / the household scrambling in an emergency — and the resolution is her quietly setting up roz ₹100 ki Bachatt for the family's emergency fund, instead of an Oolka credit-score reveal.
hook: Ghar mein paisa nahi, aur ilzaam mujh par — maine chupke se Bachatt shuru ki.
script: HOOK (0-3s): [Bahu cornered, mother-in-law pointing, warm domestic close-up] VO: 'Ghar mein paisa nahi, aur ilzaam mujh par — maine chupke se Bachatt shuru ki.' | BEAT 1: [Quick reaction-clip montage: emergency aayi, ghar mein hड़चकड़ी, savings zero] VO: 'Har emergency pe ghar mein tension, udhaar, EMI ka bojh.' | BEAT 2: [Bahu calmly opens Bachatt app, sets ₹100/day SIP] VO: 'Maine roz ₹100 ka daily SIP laga diya — bina kisi ko bole.' | BEAT 3: [Months pass, emergency fund grown, family relieved] VO: 'Thoda-thoda roz judta gaya — ban gaya ghar ka emergency fund.' | TURN: [App screen: return beating 3% savings account, saas impressed] VO: 'Bank ke 3% se zyada return — ab koi emergency dara nahi sakti, koi loan nahi.' | CTA (end): ['Download Bachatt' brand stamp endcard] VO: 'Aaj se roz ₹100 bachao — Bachatt.'

src.hook: What a 'lovely' mother-in-law... I'll show you in a bit
src.key_message: Emotional family-drama collab promoting the Oolka app; on-screen 'Download Oolka' branding drives the install.

comp_format: Skit: Creator skit, village couple + explainer at a govt-office set
reframe: Copy the village-couple-plus-explainer skit device: a rural couple faces a money crisis at a govt-office/authority set (a wife waiting at a highway-authority shelter, a stressed husband), then a confident local 'explainer' guy in a checked shirt steps in and walks them through the app fix to camera. For Bachatt, the couple is about to take a loan for a sudden expense; the explainer guy shows them how roz ₹100 ki Bachatt builds an emergency fund so they never need that loan, instead of scanning a credit report.
hook: Achanak kharcha aaya aur seedha loan? Pehle roz ₹100 ki Bachatt lagao.
script: HOOK (0-3s): [Rural wife waiting at roadside shelter, stressed husband arrives] VO: 'Achanak kharcha aaya aur seedha loan? Pehle roz ₹100 ki Bachatt lagao.' | BEAT 1: [Husband: paisa nahi hai, bank se loan lena padega] VO: 'Har achanak kharche pe udhaar — phir mahino EMI ka bojh.' | BEAT 2: [Explainer guy in checked shirt steps in, phone in hand] VO: 'Ruko bhaiya — Bachatt pe roz ₹100 ka daily SIP, automatic bachat.' | BEAT 3: [Shows app screen, savings/emergency fund growing] VO: 'Roz thoda-thoda jud ke ban jaata hai emergency fund — bina loan ke.' | TURN: [App: return beating 3% savings account, couple relieved] VO: 'Bank ke 3% se zyada return — agla kharcha apne paise se, loan nahi.' | CTA (end): [Bachatt app endcard] VO: 'Aaj se roz ₹100 bachao — Bachatt.'

src.hook: I applied for a loan at the bank yesterday, but it got rejected — there's another loan in my name!
src.key_message: Oolka scans your credit report, flags loans wrongly shown active, auto-emails the bank and maintains your CIBIL score so you qualify for new loans.
src.transcript: ಬಯ ಕೈತಿ ಡ್ರಾಪ್ ಮಾಡೋಣ. ಬೈಕ್ ಬೇಡ ಅಂದ್ರೆಗಳ ಕಾರ್ಯಕರ್ತೆ ಬರ್ತಾನೆ ಇಬ್ಬರಜು ಬಸ್ಸಿ ಕೂತ್ಕೊಂಡು ಆರಾಮ ಹೋಗಬಹುದು ಏನಂತೆ ಯಾಕ ಏನಾ ಥರ ಒಂದೋರ್ ಶಾಟ್ ನಾನು ನಿಮಗೆ ಕೆಳಗ ಅರ್ಥ ಸ್ಕೂಟಿ ಕೊಡಶ್ರಿ ಅಂತ ಅಂದ ನಿನ್ನೆ ನಾನು ಬ್ಯಾಂಕ್ ಹೋಗಿ ಲೋನ್ ಅಪ್ಲಿಕೇಶನ್ ಹಾಕಿನಿ ಆದರೆ ನನ್ನ ಹೆಸರಲ್ಲಿ ಬೇರೆ ಲೋನ್ ಇಟ್ಟಿ ಅಂತ ಅದು ಅಪ್ಲಿಕೇಶನ್ ರಿಜೆಕ್ಟ್ ಮಾಡ್ತಾರ ಹೌದಾ ನೀ ಅವಘಲು ಅಂತ ವೇಳೆ ನನಗಾದ ಅರ್ಥ ಒಂದು ನನ್ನ ಹೆಸರೆ ಯಾರ ಫೇಸ್ಲು ಅಂತಕೊಂಡ್ರು ಯಾಕಲೇ ಏನಾತೆ ಏನೇಎಸ್ಎಲ್ೆ ಯಾರ ಪೇಕ್ಲು ನಕೊಂಡ್ರು ಹಂಗಂದ್ರೆನ ವರ್ಕಾ ಮೊಬೈಲ್ ಅಪ್ ಯೂಸ್ ಮಾಡು ಇನ್ನೆ ಓಲ್ಕ ಅಪ್ಪಾ ಓಲ್ಕನ ಹಂಗಂದ್ರೆ ಹೆಣ ಓಲ್ಕನಿನಿಂದ ಕ್ರೆಡಿಟ್ರಿಪೋರ್ಟ್ ನ ಸ್ಕ್ಯಾನ್ ಮಾಡತತಿ ಲೋನ್ ಕ್ಲೋಸ್ ಮಾಡಿ ಬ್ಯಾಂಕಿಗೆ ಅಪ್ ಡೇಟ್ ಮಾಡಿಲ್ಲ ಅದನ್ನ ಕಣ್ಣ ಹಿಡಿಯತಿ ಮತ್ತೆ ಪೆಕ್ ನೌಲಿ ಇದ್ದಂಗರ ಬ್ಯಾಂಕಿಗೆ ಅಟ್ಮೆಟಿಕ್ಲಿ ಮೇಲ್ ಮಾಡ್ತಾತಿ. ಹಂಗ ನಿನ್ನ ಸಿವಿಲ್ಸ್ಕೋಸ್ಕರ ನೈನ್ ಮೇನ್ತೇನ ಮಾಡ್ತಾತಿ? ಹೌದ ಅದರಿಂದ ನಾಯಿ ಈಗ ಒಳ್ಳೆಕಾಯ ಅಪ್ ಡೌನ್ಲೊ ಮಾಡ್ತಾರೆ ಹಂಗರ್ ನ ನೆಕ್ಸ್ಟ್ಮೆಂಟ್ ಹೊಸ ಸ್ಕೂಟಿ ತಗೊಂಡುನೇ ಇವರೆಲ್ಲೇ ಒಳ್ಳೆಕಾಯ ಅಪ್ ನ ಡೌನ್ಲೊ ಮಾಡಿ ಕ್ರೆಡಿಟ್ ಸ್ಕೋರ್ ಎ ಎಕ್ಸ್ ಪಾಲಟರ್

comp_format: AI-Generated: 3D animated talking credit-card villain vs Oolka phone mascot, AI-generated characters
reframe: Copy the 3D animated talking-villain-vs-mascot device: a snarling red 'credit card' monster wrapped in chains stomps a bank vault bullying you about next month's bill, then the friendly blue Oolka phone-mascot with sneakers defeats it. For Bachatt, keep the exact villain-vs-hero 3D format but make the bully a chained red 'CREDIT CARD / EMI' monster that traps you in interest, and the hero a friendly 'BACHATT' piggy-bank phone-mascot whose daily ₹100 SIP builds a fund so you pay cash and break free of the card.
hook: Main tera Credit Card hoon — agle mahine bill aayega, dekhta hoon! Bachatt: nahi aayega.
script: HOOK (0-3s): [Snarling chained red 3D credit-card monster stomps a bank vault] VO: 'Main tera Credit Card hoon — agle mahine bill aayega, dekhta hoon! Bachatt: nahi aayega.' | BEAT 1: [Monster roars: minimum payment bharo, byaaj badhta jaayega] VO: 'Card pe kharch, phir byaaj, phir EMI ka kabhi na khatam hone wala jaal.' | BEAT 2: [Friendly blue Bachatt piggy-phone mascot with sneakers hops in] VO: 'Tabhi aaya Bachatt — roz sirf ₹100 ka daily SIP.' | BEAT 3: [Mascot stacks ₹100 coins into a glowing fund, chains snap, monster shrinks] VO: 'Roz ₹100 jud-jud ke ban gaya fund — ab cash mein kharch, card ki gulaami khatam.' | TURN: [App screen: emergency fund + return beating 3% account] VO: 'Loan nahi, card nahi — apna paisa, 3% account se zyada return.' | CTA (end): [Bachatt mascot beside app screen] VO: 'Aaj se roz ₹100 bachao — Bachatt.'

src.hook: I'm your credit card — next month when the bill comes you'll be begging friends for money.
src.key_message: Oolka AI tracks your card limit, billing cycle and due dates, plans an 800+ score and helps you qualify for better cards. Download Oolka.
src.transcript: मैं credit card हूरे. मुझे payment के लिए use करके मज़े ले रहा है. ले ले ले ले बेटा अगले महीने जब मेरा bill आएगा अपने दोस्तों से उधार मांगता फिरेगा, हां? मैं Ulka app हूं. मेरा AI तुम्हारी credit history को analyze करता है step by step बताता है, जिससे तुम्हारा credit score आठ सौ से ज़्यादा हो जाएगा. सारे credit cards और loans की जानकारी एक ही screen पर दिख जाएगी. चाहे EMI की date हो, loan amount या EMI reminder देना हो, मुझे आज ही download करो और मैं तुम्हें इन सबसे छुटकारा दिलाऊंगा.

comp_format: Non-Skit: Single shopkeeper testimonial to camera with mic + subtitles, branded
reframe: Copy the gritty real-shopkeeper testimonial device: a weathered older shopkeeper behind his counter speaks straight into a held mic with documentary-style burned-in Hindi captions and a branded top banner ('debt se aazadi'), feeling authentic and earned. For Bachatt, the same shopkeeper testifies that roz ₹100 ki Bachatt gave him a stress-free life and an emergency fund so he never had to borrow again — swapping Oolka's debt-clearing plan for a daily-savings origin story.
hook: Agar Bachatt na hoti, main kabhi apna emergency fund nahi bana paata.
script: HOOK (0-3s): [Weathered shopkeeper behind counter, held mic, branded banner] VO: 'Agar Bachatt na hoti, main kabhi apna emergency fund nahi bana paata.' | BEAT 1: [Documentary captions, he speaks] VO: 'Pehle har emergency pe udhaar — pressure roz badhta ja raha tha.' | BEAT 2: [Leans into mic, earnest] VO: 'Phir Bachatt pe roz ₹100 ka daily SIP lagaya — automatic, bina soche.' | BEAT 3: [Captions roll] VO: 'Dheere-dheere paisa judta gaya, ban gaya emergency fund.' | TURN: [App screen insert: return beating 3% savings account] VO: 'Bank ke 3% se zyada return mila — ab kisi loan ki zaroorat nahi.' | CTA (end): [Bachatt app endcard, 'download karein'] VO: 'Aaj se roz ₹100 bachao — Bachatt.'

src.hook: If I hadn't found the Oolka app, I might never have cleared my debt.
src.key_message: Oolka AI Plus analyzes your overdue loans and gives a step-by-step plan to clear them; subscribe now at 75% off (₹99/month). Install now.
src.transcript: अगर मुझे Ola app ना मिला होता, तो शायद मैं कभी अपना कर्ज ना चुका पाता, मेरे loan overdue हो चुके थे, EMI पर EMI miss हो रही थी. और हर दिन calls का pressure बढ़ता जा रहा था, समझ नहीं आ रहा था कौन सा loan पहले चुका हूं, कौन सा बाद में, और कैसे इस situation से बाहर निकलूं. तभी मुझे मिला Ola app, Ola एक AI powered financial app है जिसका feature Ola AI plus आपके overdue loan को analyze करता है और उन्हें step by step handle करने का एक proper plan देता है. इसने मुझे बताया कौन सी EMI priority पर है? कैसे penalty avoid करनी है? और कैसे धीरे धीरे loan clear करना है? मैंने बस उल्का का plan follow किया, loan clear हुए, pressure कम हुआ और आज मैं कर्ज free हो चुका हूं. आप भी आज ही Ola app download करें. तो install now पर click करो और Ola app download करो.

comp_format: Skit: (no transcript) Creator family skit, mother hiding/breaking TV, app reveal endcard
reframe: Copy the collab family-comedy skit device: a mother does something dramatic at home (here, breaking/hiding the TV) and the chaos becomes the hook before a clean app-card reveal endcard ('24x7 expert'). Reframe the panic as a household-money crisis solved by saving, not borrowing: the family is fighting over a sudden expense, and the twist is that the daughter-in-law had quietly built a Bachatt emergency fund with ₹100/day so nobody had to take a loan.
hook: Ghar mein paisa nahi, sab ladd rahe hai? Bahu ki Bachatt ne bachaya!
script: HOOK (0-3s): [Mummy dramatically pulling apart the TV, family shocked] VO: 'Ghar mein paisa nahi, sab ladd rahe hai? Bahu ki Bachatt ne bachaya!' | BEAT 1: [Father shouting, sudden ₹40,000 hospital/repair bill on table] VO: 'Achanak kharcha aa gaya, sab loan ki baat kar rahe the.' | BEAT 2: [Bahu calmly takes out phone, family confused] VO: 'Lekin bahu chup-chap roz ₹100 bacha rahi thi.' | TURN: [Bachatt app screen: emergency fund balance growing] VO: 'Bina kisi ko bole, ek emergency fund taiyaar tha.' | BEAT 3: [Family relieved, hugging, no loan needed] VO: 'Na loan, na byaaj, na ghar ki ladai.' | CTA (end): [Bachatt app screen, clean endcard] VO: 'Aaj se roz ₹100 bachao — Bachatt.'

src.hook: Mom, you really shouldn't have done this...
src.key_message: A relatable family comedy skit promoting Oolka as a 24x7 CIBIL expert app to check and improve your credit score.

comp_format: Non-Skit: Single presenter testimonial to camera with mic, app-screen/email inserts + branded endcard
reframe: Copy the confessional testimonial device: one presenter to camera with a lapel mic and an honest 'I messed up' admission, intercut with phone screen inserts (a credit-card statement) and a branded '₹0 platform fee / 100% safe' endcard. Reframe the credit-card-debt confession into a savings redemption story: 'I kept swiping till I owed 1.5 lakh at 40% interest' becomes 'I had zero savings, so every emergency became a loan' — fixed by starting a ₹100/day Bachatt SIP that became his buffer.
hook: 40% byaaj wale credit card ki jagah, roz ₹100 bachaya hota toh?
script: HOOK (0-3s): [Presenter to camera, mic, serious face, card statement insert] VO: '40% byaaj wale credit card ki jagah, roz ₹100 bachaya hota toh?' | BEAT 1: [Close-up of ₹1.5 lakh outstanding, minimum-payment trap graphic] VO: 'Har emergency pe card swipe kiya, byaaj ne kamar tod di.' | BEAT 2: [Presenter] VO: 'Problem credit nahi thi — problem ye thi ke bachat zero thi.' | TURN: [Bachatt app: daily ₹100 SIP, emergency fund building] VO: 'Maine roz ₹100 bachana shuru kiya, aur ek buffer ban gaya.' | BEAT 3: [Cut card in half, calm smile] VO: 'Ab emergency pe loan nahi, apni bachat use karta hu.' | CTA (end): [Bachatt app screen] VO: 'Aaj se roz ₹100 bachao — Bachatt.'

src.hook: I kept spending on my credit card till I owed 1.5 lakh at 40% interest.
src.key_message: Oolka AI Plus showed the real cost of minimum payments and arranged a 12% personal loan to clear the card — escape the credit-card trap. Subscribe at 75% off.
src.transcript: Credit card ख़र्च करता गया, करता गया, डेढ़ लाख कर्ज हो गया. चालीस प्रतिशत ब्याज लग रहा था भाई minimum payment भर रहा था पर कर्ज कम ही नहीं हो रहा था ऐसे तो दस साल लग जाते. तब uncle ने उल्का AI plus suggest किया. AI expert ने calculation दिखाई अगर सिर्फ़ minimum payment करता रहता तो कुल साढ़े चार लाख सिर्फ़ ब्याज में दे देता. फिर डर लग गया. AI ने तुरंत बारह प्रतिशत पर personal loan arrange करवाया, credit card एक बार में clear हो गया. अब normal EMI आठ हज़ार की है और तीन साल में सब ख़त्म. Credit card का चक्कर ख़तरनाक है उल्टा से बाहर निकलो.

comp_format: Production-Led: Press-conference / official-spokesperson skit set with subtitles, brand creative
reframe: Copy the press-conference / official-spokesperson skit device: a politician-style figure at a podium fielding reporters' questions with bold subtitled one-liners, shot like a news briefing with cameras and mics. Reframe the 'someone took a fake loan on your PAN' fear into a savings public-service announcement: the 'spokesperson' announces a national habit — 'Stop borrowing for every emergency; start saving ₹100/day' — turning Bachatt into the official answer banks don't want you to know.
hook: Aaj se sarkari elaan: emergency ke liye loan nahi, roz ki bachat!
script: HOOK (0-3s): [Spokesperson at podium, press cameras flashing, subtitle 'official announcement'] VO: 'Aaj se sarkari elaan: emergency ke liye loan nahi, roz ki bachat!' | BEAT 1: [Reporter stands, asks] Reporter: 'Par sir, achanak kharcha aaye toh?' | BEAT 2: [Spokesperson confident] VO: 'Roz ₹100 bachao, saal mein ₹36,000 ka emergency fund taiyaar.' | TURN: [Bachatt app screen pinned to podium, fund growing] VO: 'Na byaaj, na loan jaal — sirf apni bachat.' | BEAT 3: [Crowd nodding, flashbulbs] VO: 'Beat karo 3% wala savings account, SIP se badhao.' | CTA (end): [Bachatt app screen] VO: 'Aaj se roz ₹100 bachao — Bachatt.'

src.hook: Someone can take a fake loan in your name using your PAN and Aadhaar.
src.key_message: Oolka AI reviews your full credit history, drafts an objection email to your bank for any errors, and your score rises once they're fixed. Download Oolka.
src.transcript: आपका PAN card और आधार card use करके कोई और आपके नाम पे fake loan ले सकता है. हमारे पास काफी complaints आई हैं कि credit score की calculation में काफी गलतियां हो रही हैं, जिसकी वजह से लोगों के loan reject हो रहे हैं. प्रशासन तो अपना काम कर रही है, लेकिन आप भी इसको ठीक कर सकते हैं. इसके लिए आपको अपने phone में एक app download करनी पड़ेगी, Ulka. Ulka का AI feature आपकी पूरी credit history समझेगा. सारे पुराने और अभी चल रहे loans, credit cards, छूटी हुई EMI, overdues सारी detail एक screen पर दिखा देगा और अगर इसमें से कुछ भी गलत है, तो यह एक objection email तैयार करेगा, जिसे आप इसी app अपने bank को भेज सकते हैं. Department का directive है, bank को एक हफ्ते के अंदर अंदर उस पर action लेना होगा और गलती ठीक होते ही आपका credit score खुद ब खुद बढ़ जाएगा. उल्का app की मदद से अब तक लाखों लोगों ने bank की गलतियां ठीक करवा कर अपना credit score बढ़ाया है. तो आप सभी उल्का app download करें और अपना credit score improve करें. उल्का app download करें.

comp_format: Micro-Drama: Single narrator VO over illustrative B-roll (growth chart, bank email mockup, cash counter) + creator clip
reframe: Copy the micro-drama narrator device: a calm voiceover over cinematic illustrative B-roll — a glowing green growth chart, a cash-counting machine, a hand writing in a ledger — with one short creator clip for a human face. Reframe the 'you're paying way more interest than needed' angle into 'you're saving way less than you could' — the rising chart becomes a ₹100/day SIP compounding past a lazy 3% savings account, narrated in a regional language (Tamil) like the original.
hook: Bank ko byaaj dene se accha, khud ko ₹100 roz do!
script: HOOK (0-3s): [Glowing green chart climbing, cash counter whirring] VO: 'Bank ko byaaj dene se accha, khud ko ₹100 roz do!' | BEAT 1: [Hand writing in ledger, B-roll of money] VO: 'Har mahina kharcha ho jaata hai, bachat zero reh jaati hai.' | BEAT 2: [Savings account showing dull 3%] VO: 'Savings account sirf 3% deta hai, paisa so raha hai.' | TURN: [Bachatt app SIP screen, chart shooting up] VO: 'Roz ₹100 ka daily SIP, paisa kaam karne lagta hai.' | BEAT 3: [Creator clip, smiling, holding phone] VO: 'Saal bhar mein ₹36,000 plus return — bina loan ke.' | CTA (end): [Bachatt app screen] VO: 'Aaj se roz ₹100 bachao — Bachatt.'

src.key_message: Oolka requests interest-rate revisions for you, detects fake/wrong credit entries, and lets you check your report in Tamil. Install Oolka.

comp_format: Production-Led: (no transcript) App screen-recording demo (Oolka credit score 816, Ask Dhruva AI chat, alerts, Play Store page)
reframe: Copy the pure app-screen-recording demo device: hands holding a phone, thumb tapping through the live app — the score gauge (816), the 'Ask Dhruva' AI chat, the alerts list, ending on the actual Play Store listing — all over a calm VO with highlighted-word subtitles. Reframe the credit-score walkthrough into a Bachatt product tour: instead of an 816 CIBIL gauge, show the daily ₹100 SIP being set up, the emergency-fund progress bar, the 'beat 3%' returns card, and the same satisfying tap-through to the Play Store.
hook: Dekho kaise ₹100 roz, ek saal mein crorepati ki shuruaat!
script: HOOK (0-3s): [Hands tapping phone, Bachatt home screen, savings gauge] VO: 'Dekho kaise ₹100 roz, ek saal mein crorepati ki shuruaat!' | BEAT 1: [Thumb sets up daily ₹100 SIP] VO: 'Bas ek baar set karo — roz ₹100 apne aap bach jaata hai.' | BEAT 2: [Emergency fund progress bar filling] VO: 'Emergency fund ban raha hai, loan ki zaroorat khatam.' | BEAT 3: [Returns card: 'beat 3% savings'] VO: 'Savings account ke 3% se zyada return, RD aur SIP ek jagah.' | TURN: [Play Store 'Bachatt' page, install button] VO: 'Aur ye sab ek hi app mein.' | CTA (end): [Bachatt app screen, install] VO: 'Aaj se roz ₹100 bachao — Bachatt.'

src.hook: Is your credit score low? Check it free on the Oolka app.

comp_format: Non-Skit: Single creator talking head to camera (lapel mic) at home
reframe: Copy the frustrated-dad UGC device: a single relatable middle-aged man talking head with a lapel mic at home, gesturing with real money-stress energy, no skit — just authentic 'let me tell you what worked' advice. Reframe his 'how I fixed my credit and cleared dues' into 'how I stopped needing loans': the same dad confesses he was always one emergency away from borrowing, until he started a ₹100/day Bachatt habit that finally gave the family breathing room.
hook: Har mahina tang? Maine roz ₹100 bachana shuru kiya, sab badal gaya.
script: HOOK (0-3s): [Dad talking head, lapel mic, tired but honest] VO: 'Har mahina tang? Maine roz ₹100 bachana shuru kiya, sab badal gaya.' | BEAT 1: [Dad gesturing, frustrated] VO: 'Pehle har choti emergency pe udhaar ya loan lena padta tha.' | BEAT 2: [Dad calmer] VO: 'Phir socha — kharcha ke pehle thodi bachat kyun na ho?' | TURN: [Bachatt app: daily ₹100 SIP + emergency fund] VO: 'Roz ₹100, apne aap kat ke bach jaata hai.' | BEAT 3: [Dad smiling, relaxed] VO: 'Ab loan nahi, apni bachat se kaam chalta hai.' | CTA (end): [Bachatt app screen] VO: 'Aaj se roz ₹100 bachao — Bachatt.'

comp_format: Non-Skit: Single creator talking head to camera outdoors + branded endcard
reframe: Copy the 'India's first' authority-claim UGC device: a confident creator talking head outdoors with a persistent 'Oolka AI Plus' brand watermark top-left and a strong 'guaranteed solution / 100% safe / ₹0 platform fee' endcard. Reframe the 'India's first AI financial app for disputes' boast into a savings positioning: 'India's simplest daily-savings app' — same confident outdoor delivery, same RBI/NPCI-style trust endcard, but the promise is building wealth ₹100 at a time instead of fixing CIBIL.
hook: India ki sabse aasaan daily bachat app — roz ₹100, zero tension.
script: HOOK (0-3s): [Creator outdoors, Bachatt watermark, pointing at camera] VO: 'India ki sabse aasaan daily bachat app — roz ₹100, zero tension.' | BEAT 1: [Creator walking, confident] VO: 'Loan ke liye nahi — bachat ke liye banaya gaya hai.' | BEAT 2: [Creator] VO: 'Daily SIP, RD, aur emergency fund — sab ek jagah.' | TURN: [Bachatt app phone mockup, '100% safe', NPCI-style trust badges] VO: '100% safe, ₹0 platform fee, aur 3% se zyada return.' | BEAT 3: [Creator] VO: 'Aaj se loan ki zaroorat nahi, apni bachat hai.' | CTA (end): [Bachatt app, 'Download now', Google Play] VO: 'Aaj se roz ₹100 bachao — Bachatt.'

comp_format: Skit: Creator skit, nosy-neighbor-auntie comedy, acted characters
reframe: Copy the 'POV: your neighbor aunty 24/7' relatable comedy device: a nosy aunty character peeking, climbing ladders, snooping on the family with an on-screen 'POV' caption, then transitioning into the app pitch. Reframe the snooping aunty into a savings-shaming aunty: she nosily judges everyone's spending and loans, until the young protagonist flips it — 'Aunty, main toh roz ₹100 bachati hu' — making the aunty the punchline and Bachatt the flex.
hook: Aunty har baat mein taang adaati hai — par meri Bachatt nahi dekh paati!
script: HOOK (0-3s): [Nosy aunty peeking over wall, 'POV: neighbor aunty 24/7' caption] VO: 'Aunty har baat mein taang adaati hai — par meri Bachatt nahi dekh paati!' | BEAT 1: [Aunty snooping, judging] Aunty: 'Itna kharcha? Loan le rakha hai kya?' | BEAT 2: [Young woman calm, smiling] VO: 'Maine loan nahi liya, aunty — roz ₹100 bachaya.' | TURN: [Bachatt app: emergency fund + SIP balance shown to aunty] VO: 'Emergency fund taiyaar hai, kisi se udhaar nahi.' | BEAT 3: [Aunty stunned, speechless, walks off] VO: 'Ab aunty ke paas bolne ko kuch nahi.' | CTA (end): [Bachatt app screen] VO: 'Aaj se roz ₹100 bachao — Bachatt.'

comp_format: Skit: (no transcript) Acted couple skit, dream-car premise + app screen reveal

src.transcript: ರೀಫ್ ಆಫೀಸ್ ಹೋಗಿಂತ ಮುಂಚಾನೆ ನನಗೆ ಒಂದು ವಿಷಯ ಹೇಳ್ಬಿಟ್ಟು ಹೋಗಿ ಏನೈತ ಯಾಕೆ ಇಷ್ಟೊಂದು ಸೀರೆಶಗಿ ಇದೆಯಾ? ಟು ವಿಲರ್ ಗೆ ಲೋನ್ ಪ್ಲೇ ಮಾಡಿದೆ ಬ್ಯಾಂಕ್ರ್ ಕುಮಾಬಿಟ್ಟು ರಿಜೆಕ್ಟ್ ಆಗಿದೆ ನೀನು ಹತ್ರ ಬೇರೆ ಲೋನ್ ಇದೆ ಅಂದ್ರೆ ನೀವೇನಾದರೂ ನನ್ನ ಹತ್ರ ಲೋನ್ ತಗೊಂಡು ದೂರ? ತಾನ ಯಾಕೆ ನಿನ್ನೆಸಲಾಲೋನ್ ತಗೊಂಡು? ನಾನು ಯಾವುದು ಲೋನ್ ತಗೊಂಡು? ನನ್ನ ಹತ್ರ ಕ್ರೆಡಿಟ್ ಕಾರ್ಡ್ ಕೂಡ ಇಲ್ಲ ಯಾರೋ ನೆನೆಸ್ಲಿ ಫೇಸ್ ಲೋನ್ ಹಾಕಿದ್ದಾರೆ ವೋಲ್ಕ ಹಕ್ಕು ಫೋನಲ್ಲಿ ವೋಲ್ಕನ ಇನ್ನ ಕ್ರೆಡಿಟ್ರಿಪೋಟ್ ನ ಸ್ಕ್ಯಾನ್ ಮಾಡುತ್ತಾ ಯಾವಲೂನು ಕ್ಲೋಸ್ ಆಗಿ ಬ್ಯಾಂಕ್ ಅಪ್ ಡೇಟ್ ಮಾಡಲ್ಲ ಇದನ್ನ ಖಂಡಿತುತ್ತೆ. ಪೆಕ್ಟರ್ ಇದ್ರೆ ಓಲ್ಕ ತಾನೇ ಆಟೋಮಟಿಕ್ ಅಲ್ಲಿ ಬ್ಯಾಂಕ್ ಗೆ ಮೇಲ್ ಮಾಡುತ್ತೆ ಡಿಸಪ್್ಯೂಟ್ ಫೈಲ್ ಮಾಡುತ್ತೆ ನೀನು ಏನು ಮಾಡಬೇಕಾಗಿಲ್ಲ ನೀನು ಹೌದು ತಗೊಂಡು ಇಲ್ಲ ಯಾರು ಹಾಕಿದ್ದಾರೆ ಓಲ್ಕ ಆಲ್ಡಿ ಡಿಸಪ್್ಯೂಟ್ ಫೈಲ್ ಮಾಡಿದೆ ಬ್ಯಾಂಕ್ ಗೆ ಮೇಲ್ ಹೋಗಿದೆ ನೀನ ಏನು ಮಾಡಬೇಕಾಗಿಲ್ಲ ಓಲ್ಕಾನೆ ಎಲ್ಲ ನೋಡಿಕೊಳ್ಳುತ್ತೆ ವಾವ್ ಸ್ಕೋರ್ 156 ಪಾಯಿಂಟ್ ಜಾಸ್ತಿ ಆಗಿದೆ ಎಲ್ಲ ಓಪನ್ ಅಪ್ರು ಆಯ್ತು ಟು ಇಲ್ಲವೋ ನಿಂದ ನಮ್ಮ ಕನಸಗಳಿಗೆ ಕ್ರೆಡಿಟ್ ಸ್ಕೋರ್ ಅಡ್ಡ ಬರಬಾರದು ಏನು ಕಷ್ಟಕೊಡು ನಮ್ಮ ಜೊತೆ ಇದೆ ಓಲ್ಕಾ ನಿಮಗೂ ಇದೆ ಥರ ಪ್ರಾಬ್ಲಮ್ ಇದ್ರೆ ಓಲ್ಕಾ ಡೌನ್ಲೋಡ್ ಮಾಡಿ ಕಮೆಂಟ್ ಮಾಡಿ ಕಮೆಂಟ್ ಶೇರ್ ಮಾಡಿ ಈಗಲೇ ಓಲ್ಕಾನ ಡೌನ್ಲೋಡ್ ಮಾಡಿ ಕ್ರೆಡಿಟ್ ಸ್ಕೋರ್ ಎಐ ಎಕ್ಸ್ ಪಾರ್ಡ್

comp_format: AI-Generated: AI-generated Vikram-Betaal forest imagery, narrated parable + app screen insert
reframe: Copy the AI-generated Vikram-Betaal forest-parable device: cinematic AI imagery of the king carrying the ghost-on-his-shoulder through a moonlit forest, a narrated riddle-story with on-screen subtitle captions, then a phone-screen insert and the moral. Reframe the 'honest man's score dropped because he guaranteed a loan' parable into a savings fable: an honest hard-working man earned well yet stayed broke because he never saved a rupee — Betaal's riddle answer is 'he never started a ₹100/day habit,' and Bachatt is the moral.
hook: Imaandaar tha, phir bhi kangaal — Vikram, kyun? Kyunki bachaya nahi!
script: HOOK (0-3s): [AI Vikram carrying Betaal through dark forest, subtitle] VO: 'Imaandaar tha, phir bhi kangaal — Vikram, kyun? Kyunki bachaya nahi!' | BEAT 1: [Betaal narrating, forest imagery] Betaal: 'Ek mehnati aadmi tha, kamaata bahut tha.' | BEAT 2: [Imagery of money slipping away] Betaal: 'Par har rupaya kharch ho jaata, bachat zero rehti.' | TURN: [Phone insert: Bachatt daily ₹100 SIP] VO: 'Sahi jawab Vikram — usne roz ₹100 bachana shuru nahi kiya.' | BEAT 3: [Vikram nods, moral lands] VO: 'Roz ₹100 bachao, emergency fund banao, kabhi loan na lo.' | CTA (end): [Bachatt app screen] VO: 'Aaj se roz ₹100 bachao — Bachatt.'

src.hook: Vikram, hear a story: an honest man who always paid on time was still refused a loan.
src.key_message: Hidden defaults (like a guarantor mark) tank your score; check your report on Oolka and dispute before applying for a loan.
src.transcript: विक्रम एक कहानी sun. एक आदमी था सीधा सादा ईमानदार अपनी बेटी की शादी के लिए loan लेने के bank गया. Bank ने बोला तुम्हारा CIBIL score बहुत कम है, loan नहीं मिलेगा. पर विक्रम इस आदमी ने तो अपनी सारी EMI हमेशा time पर भरी थी, कभी एक दिन की भी देरी नहीं की. फिर उसका score क्यों गिरा? विक्रम, अगर जानता है और फिर भी नहीं बोला तो तेरा सिर फ़ट जाएगा. बेताल. इसका जवाब है, इस आदमी ने तीन साल पहले अपने भाई का loan guarantor sign किया था. भाई पर भरोसा किया, पर भाई ने EMI भरना बंद कर दिया. वह default इस आदमी की civil report पर आ गया. इस आदमी ने अपने सारे loan भरे, पर भाई का पाप उसके सिर चढ़ गया. सही जवाब विक्रम. पर एक और सवाल, इस आदमी को तो पता ही नहीं था कि उसकी report पे यह दाग है, तो उसे पता कैसे चलता? उसने उल्का app download करना चाहिए था. उल्का app पे अपनी पूरी report दिखती है कौन सा loan है, कौन सी EMI pending है, किसका guarantor है, सब साफ दिख जाता है. अगर पहले उल्का पर check कर लिया होता, तो उसे पता चल जाता कि भाई का default उसकी report पे है. उल्का से सीधा dispute file करता, score सुधरता और बेटी की शादी का loan मिल जाता. विक्रम, आज तू सच्ची में ज्ञानी निकला. दोस्तों, अपना score जाने बिना loan के लिए मत जाना. Loan लेने से पहले उल्का ज़रूर check करना.

comp_format: Skit: Creator skit, group of friends, 'always at the bank' comedy + app screen reveal
reframe: Copy the 'BOYS MAKING PLANS' friend-group street skit device: a gang of young guys in matching sporty tees joking around a scooter, one is always 'busy at the bank', the others rib him, then the app reveal shows an AI assistant that handles it all, ending on a clean Play Store + app-screen bumper. src.transcript: अरे मिश्रा जी का घर यही है क्या? आप लोगों ने insurance claim किया था? हां, हमने ही किया है. लाओ हमारे पैसे दो. कौन से पैसे? अरे भैया ने insurance करवाया था ना. यह देखो अब यह नहीं रहे. लाओ दो हमारे पैसे. पहले किश्त भरो. आज तक इन्होंने एक भी किश्त नहीं भरी है. पहले दो लाख रुपए दो, फिर मिलेंगे पैसे. अरे भैया, झूठ क्यों बोल रहे हो? मैंने तो सारी किश्त भरी है अभी तक. हां, मुझे पता था तुम दोनों नाटक कर रहे हो पैसे निकलवाने के लिए. शर्म नहीं आती दोनों को? अरे भैया, क्या ही बताऊं? वह पैसों की थोड़ी ज़रूरत थी इसलिए यह सब drama करना पड़ा. अरे, पैसे की इतनी ज़रूरत है तो loan ले लो ना. Try किया था लेकिन bank वाले बोल रहे हैं हमारा CIBIL score बहुत कम है क्योंकि हमने पिछला loan नहीं भरा था ना. अरे तो Uul का app download करो ना. Uul का app, इससे क्या होगा? अरे Uul का एक बहुत ही शानदार app है जिसका AI feature तुम्हारे CIBIL score को analyze करेगा और उसे कैसे बढ़ाना है उसके steps भी बताएगा और यही नहीं इसका AI feature तुम्हारे behalf पर bank से negotiate भी करता है और तुम्हारे पुराने loan को बहुत ही आसानी से settle भी करवाता है. मतलब सारी मेहनत उल्का का AI feature करेगा और CIBIL score हमारा होगा. बिल्कुल सही. फिर तो मैं भी download करता हूं उल्का AI. वैसे भैया आपकी गाड़ी का तो insurance आपने करवा रखा होगा ना? नहीं भैया, insurance तो सिर्फ़ मेरा ही चल रहा है गाड़ी का नहीं. चलिए कोई बात नहीं. वैसे भी गाड़ी में कितना ही ख़र्चा आता है? अरे भाई, आप ऐसे क्यों बोल रहे हो? अरे ऐसे ही. चलिए मैं निकलता हूं. भैया बाहर आपके घर में किसी ने टक्कर मार दी है, टूट गई है. Cool का app अभी download करें.

src.transcript: शेर भाई, बड़ी मुसीबत में फ़ंस गया हूं. क्या हुआ? जंगल के सारे केले ख़त्म हो गए. काश इतनी छोटी problem होती. मेरी बहन की शादी fix हो गई है. थोड़ा पैसा कम पड़ रहा था, तो loan के लिए apply किया, लेकिन loan बार बार reject हो रहा है. Reject? तुम्हारा? तुम तो जंगल के सबसे मेहनती जानवरों में से हो. वही तो कभी EMI miss नहीं की, credit card का bill हमेशा time पर भरा, फिर भी loan reject. समझ ही नहीं आ रहा problem क्या है? अरे तो उल्का app download करो ना. App, वह क्या करेगा? सबसे पहले यह बताएगा की तुम्हारा civil score कितना है और उससे भी ज़्यादा ज़रूरी यह बताएगा की वो score कम क्यों है. हो सकता है कोई पुराना loan pending हो, हो सकता है किसी payment में issue हो या फिर तुम्हारे नाम पर कोई fraud loan चल रहा हो. यह देखो, तुम्हारे नाम पर किसी ने loan लिया था जिसके बारे में तुम्हें पता ही नहीं था. इसी वजह से तुम्हारा credit score ख़राब हो रहा था. उल्का अभी bank को mail करके इस fake loan को close करवाने में भी मदद करेगा. मतलब problem मुझ में नहीं थी? नहीं, problem यह थी कि तुम अंधेरे में तीर चला रहे थे. उल्का app तुम्हें दिखाता है problem कहां है, उसे ठीक कैसे करना है, कौन सा loan पहले close करना smart होगा, और credit score improve कैसे करना है? शेर भाई, आपने मेरी tension ही खतम कर दी. हाँ. तो आप भी उल्का app download करो और अपना credit score सुधारो.

script: HOOK (0-3s): [Presenter at desk, split card 'MAN A vs MAN B'] VO: 'Same salary, do alag future - farq sirf roz ₹100 bachane ka!' | BEAT 1: [Points to Man A] 'Man A ka paisa bank mein, 3% byaaj, bas pada raha.' | BEAT 2: [Points to Man B] 'Man B roz ₹100 ka daily SIP karta raha.' | BEAT 3: [Hand-drawn graph on desk, two lines diverging] VO: '5 saal baad Man B lakhs aage, Man A wahi ka wahi.' | TURN: [Presenter holds Bachatt phone] 'Difference? Ek ne bas bachaya, daily.' | CTA (end): [Bachatt app screen, growth comparison] VO: 'Aaj se roz ₹100 bachao - Bachatt.'

src.hook: Two brothers, same Fortuner, same loan - why is one's EMI Rs10K higher every month?
src.key_message: EMI follows interest rate, which follows your credit score; Oolka's AI finds fixable issues and gives a plan to cross 800. Install now.
src.transcript: Is Bainel a fortune or is Bainel a fortune? EMI or EMI civil score civil score art school. EMI decide interest rate

comp_format: AI-Generated: AI-generated animated vegetable characters (Potato/Tomato/Cauliflower) in dialogue
reframe: Copy the charming AI-animated vegetable-mascot device: a Pixar-style Potato, Tomato and angry Cauliflower 'parents' in a cosy living room negotiating a marriage on the condition of building a house, with sunset bench moments and a happy dream-home reveal. Reframe the home-loan-rejection plot into a 'build your ghar fund yourself' story - the young Potato-Tomato couple save ₹100 a day on Bachatt and earn their dream house without any loan or rejection.
hook: Ghar ka sapna? Roz ₹100 bachao, bina loan ke ghar banao!
script: HOOK (0-3s): [Animated cauliflower dad scolding potato-tomato couple in living room] VO: 'Ghar ka sapna? Roz ₹100 bachao, bina loan ke ghar banao!' | BEAT 1: [Cauliflower dad] 'Chhe mahine mein ghar banao, warna shaadi nahi.' | BEAT 2: [Potato-Tomato on sunset bench, worried] 'Loan to milega hi nahi, score kam hai.' | BEAT 3: [Phone shows Bachatt daily SIP, ghar-fund badhta hua] VO: 'Roz ₹100 ka daily SIP - ghar ka fund khud banao.' | TURN: [Reveal: glowing dream cottage, couple + cauliflower smiling] VO: 'Bina loan, bina rejection - apna ghar.' | CTA (end): [Bachatt app screen, ghar goal tracker] VO: 'Aaj se roz ₹100 bachao - Bachatt.'

src.hook: Build your own house in six months or we marry our daughter Tomato to someone else.
src.key_message: Oolka pulls your full credit report, finds missed EMIs/overdue accounts and mails the bank to resolve them so your loan gets approved. Install now.
src.transcript: मेरी बेटी टमाटर पसंद है तुम्हें. ठीक है, पर शादी के बाद कहाँ रहोगे? तुम्हारा अपना घर है. मैं तो rent पर रहता हूँ. जब तक तुम्हारे पास अपनी छत नहीं है, तब तक हम अपनी बेटी कैसे दे दें? तुम्हारे पास छह महीने हैं अपना घर बनाने के लिए. अगर उसके बाद नहीं हुआ, तो हम टमाटर की शादी किसी और से कर देंगे. आलू, तुम मेरे लिए कितनी मेहनत कर रहे हो, एक दिन ज़रूर साथ होंगे. हां, मेरे पास अब down payment के पैसे हैं, बस home loan के लिए apply करूंगा और फिर हमारा अपना घर होगा. Sorry, आलू, तुम्हें loan नहीं मिल सकता. तुम्हारा credit score साढ़े पांच सौ है, इतने घटिया score पर हम तुम्हें loan नहीं दे सकते. अरे आलू, इतना क्यों दुखी हो? Home loan reject हो गया अब मेरी और टमाटर की शादी कैसे होगी? अरे इसमें क्या है? तू उल्का download करना पूरी credit report आ जाएगी. कौन सी EMI miss हुई? कौन सा account overdue है? उल्का bank को mail करके सब solve कर देगा. अरे यह क्या? पुराना overdue account और unpaid credit card bills please bank को mail करके यह solve कर दो. अरे इतना बड़ा घर हमें तुम्हें अपनी बेटी टमाटर का हाथ देने में कोई problem नहीं होगी.

comp_format: Production-Led: Staged press-conference talking-head + app screen demo, narrator/official addressing public
reframe: Copy the staged press-conference device: a grey-haired 'official' in a Nehru jacket addressing reporters at a podium with mics and police behind him, intercut with a phone score demo and a clerk noting things down - an authority/newsflash format that signals 'big announcement'. Reframe the 'govt changed credit-score rules' fake-news angle into a savings public-service announcement: 'a new daily-savings habit is changing middle-class futures' - roz ₹100 on Bachatt beats the 3% account.
hook: Bada elaan: roz ₹100 ki bachat aapka future badal degi!
script: HOOK (0-3s): [Official at press-conference podium, mics, flashbulbs] VO: 'Bada elaan: roz ₹100 ki bachat aapka future badal degi!' | BEAT 1: [Official addresses crowd] 'Middle class ka paisa 3% account mein mar raha hai.' | BEAT 2: [Clerk noting on clipboard] VO: 'Ab ek naya tareeka - roz ₹100 ka daily SIP.' | BEAT 3: [Phone held up showing Bachatt gauge climbing] VO: 'Bachatt mein roz thoda bachao, 3% se kahin zyada badhaao.' | TURN: [Official confident to camera] 'Loan ki bheekh nahi, apni bachat ka raaj.' | CTA (end): [Bachatt app screen, savings vs 3%] VO: 'Aaj se roz ₹100 bachao - Bachatt.'

src.hook: The government has changed the rules for credit scores - now you can raise yours easily.
src.key_message: Oolka AI reads your full credit history, flags errors, emails the bank, and gives a step-by-step plan in your language. Check free today.
src.transcript: Government ने civil score के नियमों में बदलाव किए हैं. अब आप भी अपना civil score आसानी से बढ़ा सकते हैं. लोगों की शिकायत होती है कि bank उनके loan बार बार reject कर रहे हैं, लेकिन मैं आपको बता दूं प्रशासन इसमें आपकी कोई मदद नहीं कर सकता और मैं personally आपको एक advice ज़रूर दूंगा. आप अपने phone में उल्का app download कर लें. उल्का का AI feature आपकी credit history को समझेगा. सारे loan, credit card, missed EMI, overdue आपको एक screen पर दिखाएगा और अगर उसमें कुछ भी गलत हो तो उसे report करके सही करवाएगा. फिर यह आपको बताएगा कौन सा loan या credit card लेना है और कौन सा बंद करवाना है. पूरा step by step plan बताएगा वो भी आपकी भाषा में, आपको बस इससे chat करना है. भुलका app की मदद से अब तक लाखों लोगों ने अपना credit score बढ़ाकर अपने loan approve करवाए हैं. याद रखें? Loan और EMI की परेशानी में अब आप अकेले नहीं हैं उल्काह app आपके साथ हैं.

comp_format: Skit: Creator skit, man arguing with talking-rupee-note character at home, plus app screen
reframe: Copy the talking-object skit device: a man at home arguing with a cheeky little animated talking-rupee-note character (with eyes and legs) that lectures him, intercut with a phone 'Report Summary' screen and the man finally downloading the app. Reframe the credit-report scolding into the rupee-note begging not to be wasted: the note tells him to stop blowing ₹100 a day on chai-sutta and instead save it on Bachatt so it can multiply.
hook: Note bola: roz mujhe udaao mat, ₹100 bachao - main badhunga!
script: HOOK (0-3s): [Man at home, tiny talking-rupee-note with eyes scolds him] VO: 'Note bola: roz mujhe udaao mat, ₹100 bachao - main badhunga!' | BEAT 1: [Man frustrated] 'Mahine ke end mein paisa bachta hi kyun nahi?' | BEAT 2: [Rupee-note hops on table] 'Roz ₹100 chai-sutta mein uda dete ho, problem yahi hai.' | BEAT 3: [Phone shows Bachatt daily SIP growing] Note VO: 'Mujhe Bachatt mein daalo, roz ₹100 - main lakhs ban jaaunga.' | TURN: [Man nods, opens app] 'Aaj se main Bachatt download kar raha hoon.' | CTA (end): [Bachatt app screen, SIP balance rising] VO: 'Aaj se roz ₹100 bachao - Bachatt.'

src.hook: Why do you always go to Sharma Ji? My loan gets rejected every single time.
src.key_message: Oolka's AI credit expert scans your report and tells you exactly why your score is dropping. Fix the score first, money follows. Install now.
src.transcript: यार एक बात सच सच बता. क्या? तू हमेशा शर्मा जी के पास क्यों चला जाता है? जब मैं bank से loan मांगता हूं तो reject हो जाता है और तू कभी मेरे पास नहीं आता. अब मैं कैसे आऊं? तेरा loan तो हर बार reject हो जाता है. पर क्यों? Exactly, यही तो problem है. तुझे पता ही नहीं है कि क्यों? तो तो फिर कैसे पता करूं? उल्का app download कर. उल्का? उल्का app में एक AI credit expert है. यह तेरी credit report को scan करके exactly बता देता है कि तेरा credit score नीचे क्यों जा रहा है? Seriously? Mised payments हों, कोई पुराना loan अभी भी active दिख रहा हो या कोई भी credit issue सब बता देता है. अरे यार मुझे तो इतने time से लगता था कि bank वाले बस मुझसे hate करते हैं. नहीं bro, तेरा credit score issue है. तो उल्का इसको improve करने में help करता है? हां, अब आया ना line पे पहले problem को समझ अपना credit score fix कर फिर मैं automatically तेरे पास आने लगूंगा. Ok boss मैं अभी उल्का download कर रहा हूं.

comp_format: AI-Generated: Synthetic talking-phone mascot with morphing animated face in a luxury store, narrator VO
reframe: Copy the surreal AI talking-phone-mascot device: a luxury showroom where a morphing-faced premium phone literally talks to the shopper ('Excuse me, will you buy me?') and roasts him, plus 100% safe/secure RBI-NPCI trust badges and an app endcard. Reframe the 'even no-cost EMI rejected, beyond your means' roast into a savings flex: the gadget says 'you can't afford me on EMI - but save ₹100 a day on Bachatt and buy me with cash, no EMI, no interest.'
hook: EMI pe nahi - roz ₹100 bachao, cash mein khareedo, no byaaj!
script: HOOK (0-3s): [Luxury store, talking phone-mascot with morphing face turns to shopper] Mascot VO: 'EMI pe nahi - roz ₹100 bachao, cash mein khareedo, no byaaj!' | BEAT 1: [Shopper reaches out] Mascot: 'Tera no-cost EMI bhi reject ho gaya, bhai.' | BEAT 2: [Shopper embarrassed] 'Toh kaise loon tujhe?' | BEAT 3: [Bachatt screen, daily SIP fund growing] Mascot VO: 'Roz ₹100 Bachatt mein jodo, 6 mahine mein cash ready.' | TURN: [Trust badges flash, RBI-NPCI safe] VO: 'Na EMI, na byaaj - sirf apni bachat.' | CTA (end): [Bachatt app endcard, ₹0 platform fee] VO: 'Aaj se roz ₹100 bachao - Bachatt.'

src.hook: Excuse me, will you buy me? Even your no-cost EMI got rejected - it's beyond your means.
src.key_message: Oolka AI scans your report, catches hidden errors, files disputes with the bank by email, and follows up. Higher score, lower interest, all on one screen.
src.transcript: Excuse me, मुझे ख़रीदेगा? रे तेरी तो no cost EMI भी reject हो गई औकात से बाहर है. पहले अठारह प्रतिशत ब्याज वाले personal loan से अपना score तो ठीक करवा ले. Ulka का AI पूरी report scan करके छिपी ग़लती पकड़ता है, ख़ुद bank को email करके dispute file है, और follow up भी करता है. Score आठ सौ के पार, ब्याज कम, और सारे loan, cards, और EMI reminders एक ही screen पर. सिर्फ एक email से इस झंझट से छुटकारा. Welcome, sir. आपका सारा data आपके पुराने devices से transfer हो चुका है. अब मैं आपकी सेवा में हूँ. तो किसी भी चीज़ का loan लेने से पहले, ULCA से अपनी report ठीक करवाओ. जितना score ज़्यादा, उतना ब्याज कम.

comp_format: AI-Generated: Vikram-Betaal style AI-animated characters in a forest, narrator-driven story illustrated by synthetic visuals
reframe: Copy the Vikram-Betaal AI-animated storytelling device: a king carrying a grinning ghost-spirit on his shoulder through a misty forest, narrating a moral parable with regional subtitles - a mythic 'kahani ka sabak' format. Reframe the parable from 'an honest man's loan was rejected over a hidden default' into 'an honest man had no savings when his daughter's wedding came' - the Betaal's lesson is that had he saved ₹100 a day on Bachatt, he'd never have needed to beg for a loan.
hook: Betaal ki kahani: jo roz ₹100 bachata, use loan ki zaroorat na padti!
script: HOOK (0-3s): [King walks misty forest, ghost-spirit grinning on shoulder] Betaal VO: 'Betaal ki kahani: jo roz ₹100 bachata, use loan ki zaroorat na padti!' | BEAT 1: [Betaal narrates] 'Ek imaandaar aadmi tha, beti ki shaadi aayi, jeb khaali.' | BEAT 2: [Flashback man at bank, head down] Betaal: 'Bank gaya, loan reject - kyunki bachat kabhi ki hi nahi.' | BEAT 3: [Phone glows with Bachatt daily SIP] Betaal VO: 'Agar roz ₹100 ka daily SIP karta, aaj fund taiyaar hota.' | TURN: [King nods, understanding] 'Toh sabak yeh - pehle bachao, phir maango mat.' | CTA (end): [Bachatt app screen, wedding goal fund] VO: 'Aaj se roz ₹100 bachao - Bachatt.'

src.hook: Vikram, listen to a story: an honest man went to the bank for his daughter's wedding loan, but his CIBIL was too low.
src.key_message: Hidden defaults (like a brother's loan you guaranteed) can wreck your score. Check your full credit report on Oolka and dispute errors before applying for any loan.
src.transcript: ವಿಕ್ರಮ್ ಒಂದು ಕಥೆ ಕೇಳು, ಒಬ್ಬ ಮುಗ್ಧ ಪ್ರಾಮಾಣಿಕ ವ್ಯಕ್ತಿ ಇದ್ದ, ಮಗಳ ಮದುವೆಗೆ ಸಾಲ ಪಡೆಯಲು ಬ್ಯಾಂಕಿಗೆ ಹೋದ, ನಿನ್ನ ಸಿವಿಲ್ಸ್ಕೊರಿ ತುಂಬಾ ಕಡಿಮೆ ಇದೆ ಸಾಲ ಸಿಗಲ್ಲ ಅಂದ್ರು. ಆದರೆ ವಿಕ್ರಮ್ ಈ ಮನುಷ್ಯ ತನ್ನೆಲ್ಲ ಎಂಐಗಳನ್ನ ಯಾವಾಗಲೂ ಸಮಯಕ್ಕೆ ಸರಿಯ ಕಟ್ಟಿದ್ದ ಒಂದು ದಿನವೂ ತರ ಮಾಡಲಿಲ್ಲ ಆದರೂ ಅವನ್ಸ್ಕೋR ಯಾಕುಸಿತು. ವಿಕ್ರಮ್ ನಿನಗ ಉತ್ತರ ಗೊತ್ತಿದ್ದು ಹೇಳದಿದ್ದರೆ ನಿಂತಲೇ ಸಿಡಿದೂ ಹೋಗ್ತದ ಬೇಟೆಗಾರ? ಇದಕ್ಕೆ ಉತ್ತರ ಇಲ್ಲಿದೆ ಈ ಮನುಷ್ಯ ಮೂರು ವರ್ಷಗಳ ಹಿಂದೆ ತನ್ನ ಸಹೋದರನ್ನ ಸಾಲಕ್ಕೆ ಗ್ಯಾರಂಟರಾಗಿ ಸಹಿ ಮಾಡಿದ್ದ. ಅಣ್ಣನ್ನ ಮೇಲೆ ನಂಬಿಕೆ ಇಟ್ಟಿದ್ದ. ಆದರೆ ಅಣ್ಣ ಈಎಂಐ ಕಟ್ಟುದನ್ನು ನಿಲ್ಲಿಸಿದ. ಆ ಸುಸ್ತಿದಾರಿಕೆ ಈ ಮನುಷ್ಯನ ಸಿವಿಲ್ ವರದಿಯಲ್ಲಿ ಬಂತು. ಇನ್ನೂ ತನ್ನೆಲ್ಲ ಸಾಲ ತೀರಿಸಿದ್ದರೂ ಅಣ್ಣನ ಪಾಪ ಇವನ ತಲೆಗೆ ಸುತ್ತಕೊಂಡಿತು ಸರಿಯಾದೋತ್ರ, ವಿಕ್ರಮ. ಆದರೆ ಇನ್ನೊಂದು ಪ್ರಶ್ನೆ. ತನ್ನ ವರದಿಯಲ್ಲಿ ಈ ಕಲೆ ಇದೆ ಎಂದು ಆ ಮನುಷ್ಯನಿಗೆ ಗೊತ್ತೇ ಇರಲಿಲ್ಲ. ಹಾಗಾದರೆ ಅವನಿಗೆ ಅದು ಹೇಗೆ ತಿಳಿಯುತ್ತಿತ್ತು? ಅವನು ೪ ಅಪ್ ಡೌನ್ ಲೋಡ್ ಮಾಡ್ಕೋಬೇಕುತ್ತು. ೪ ಅಪ್ ನಲ್ಲಿ ನಿಮ್ಮ ಸಂಪೂರ್ಣ ಕ್ರೆಡಿಟ್ ವರದಿ ಕಾಣಿಸುತ್ತದೆ ಯಾವ ಸಾಲ ಇದೆ ಯಾವ ಇಎಂಐ ಬಾಕಿ ಇದೆ ಯಾರಿಗೆ ಗ್ಯಾರಂಟರ ಆಗಿದ್ದೀರಿ ಎಲ್ಲವೂ ಸ್ಪಷ್ಟವಾಗಿ ತಿಳಿಯುತ್ತದೆ. ಮೊದಲೇ ಉಳ್ಕದಲ್ ಚೆಕ್ ಮಾಡಿದ್ರೆ, ಅಣ್ಣನ್ನ ಸುಸ್ತಿದಾರಿಕೆ ತನ್ನ ವರದಿಯಲ್ಲಿದೆ ಎಂದು ತಿಳಿಯುತ್ತಿತ್ತು. ಉಳ್ದಿಂದ ನೇರವಾಗಿ ದೂರ ಸಲ್ಲಿಸಬಹುದಿತ್ತು, ಸ್ಕೋರ್ ಸುಧಾರಿಸಿತ್ತು, ಮಟ್ಟ ಮಗಳ ಮದುವೆಗೆ ಸಾಲ ಸಿಗುತ್ತಿತ್ತು. ವಿಕ್ರಮ್ ಇಂದು ನಿನ್ನ ನಿಜವಾಗಿಯೂ ಜ್ಞಾನಿ ಎಂದು ಸಾಬೀತಾಯಿತು ಗೆಳೆಯರೇ ನಿಮ್ಮ ಸ್ಕೋರ್ ತಿಳಿಯದೆ ಸಾಲಕ್ಕಾಗಿ ಹೋಗಬೇಡಿ ಸಾಲ ಪಡೆಯುವ ಮೊದಲು ಉಳ್ಳಕ ಆ್ಯಪನ್ನು ಖಂಡಿತಾಗಿ ಚೆಕ್ ಮಾಡಿ

comp_format: Non-Skit: UGC app screen demo, hands operating Oolka app on phone with voiceover
reframe: Copy the clean UGC app-demo device: just a pair of hands operating the app on a phone over a moody dark desk with red laser-line backdrop, voiceover narrating a 'same loan, lower rate' comparison while real app screens (813 score, savings) are tapped through. Reframe the '14% vs 18% loan' comparison into '3% account vs Bachatt daily SIP' - hands scroll through Bachatt showing how the same ₹100/day grows far more than it would in a savings account.
hook: Same ₹100 - bank mein 3%, Bachatt mein kahin zyada. Faisla aapka!
script: HOOK (0-3s): [Hands holding phone over dark laser-line desk, app opening] VO: 'Same ₹100 - bank mein 3%, Bachatt mein kahin zyada. Faisla aapka!' | BEAT 1: [Finger taps savings-account screen] VO: 'Yahi ₹100 roz bank mein - bas 3% byaaj, mushkil se badhta hai.' | BEAT 2: [Swipes to Bachatt daily SIP screen] VO: 'Aur yahi ₹100 Bachatt ke daily SIP mein - tezi se badhta hai.' | BEAT 3: [Returns graph +25, +280 shown] VO: 'Har din thoda, saal bhar mein bada antar.' | TURN: [App store screen, rating taps] VO: 'Isliye loan se pehle, bachat shuru karo.' | CTA (end): [Bachatt app screen, growth chart] VO: 'Aaj se roz ₹100 bachao - Bachatt.'

src.hook: An 18% loan is available, should I take it? If only he used Oolka, he'd get the same loan at 14%.
src.key_message: Oolka's AI shows all your loans and EMIs in one place, tells you the interest you'll pay, and lowers high interest. Try Oolka before taking any loan.
src.transcript: এই 18% এর লোন পাওয়া যাচ্ছে, নিয়ে নেব? ওকে আমি কি করে বোঝাবো যে ও যদি উলকা অ্যাপ ব্যবহার করতো তাহলে এই একই লোন 18% এর জায়গায় 14% এ পেয়ে যেত তো এই হল উলকা অ্যাপ এর এআই তোমাকে তোমার ক্রেডিট স্কোর বাড়ানোর জন্য অনেক হেল্প করবে সব লোন আর EMI একই জায়গায় দেখিয়ে দেয় এবং এটাও বলে দেয় যে কত টাকার লোন নিতে হলে আমাকে কত টাকার ইন্টারেস্ট দিতে হবে, আর যদি তিনি বেশি ইন্টারেস্ট লোন নিয়ে থাকো তাহলে সেটাকে কমও করে দেবে। এই যদি লোন নেওয়ার দরকার পরে তাহলে অবশ্যই উল্কা অ্যাপ ট্রাই করো।

comp_format: AI-Generated: AI-generated 'ghost loan' zombie monster and owl mascot, dramatic VO + app screen demo
reframe: Copy the AI horror-mascot duel device: a terrifying 'ghost loan' zombie made of LOAN-stamped bandages and statements rising out of a phone in the dark, then a heroic blue owl mascot swooping in to defeat it, plus app-screen and endcard - a villain-vs-mascot rescue format. Reframe the 'paid-off ghost loan still haunts your report' angle into 'the loan you'll never need to take' - the owl mascot guards the man because his daily ₹100 Bachatt emergency fund keeps the loan-zombie buried forever.
hook: Loan ka bhoot? Roz ₹100 ka fund banao, woh kabhi jaagega hi nahi!
script: HOOK (0-3s): [Dark room, LOAN-bandage zombie rises out of a phone] Zombie VO: 'Loan ka bhoot? Roz ₹100 ka fund banao, woh kabhi jaagega hi nahi!' | BEAT 1: [Zombie lunges] 'Bachat nahi hai? Toh tu mujhe bulayega hi.' | BEAT 2: [Blue owl mascot swoops down glowing] Owl VO: 'Jiske paas emergency fund hai, use loan nahi chahiye.' | BEAT 3: [Phone shows Bachatt daily SIP + Emergency Fund] VO: 'Roz ₹100 ka fund - bhoot dafan, hamesha ke liye.' | TURN: [Zombie crumbles, owl perches victorious] VO: 'Bachat hai, toh dar nahi.' | CTA (end): [Bachatt app endcard, emergency fund balance] VO: 'Aaj se roz ₹100 bachao - Bachatt.'

src.hook: I'm the ghost loan - the old loan you paid off long ago, but I'm still alive in your report.
src.key_message: Oolka's AI scans your report for every hidden error, files disputes with the bank by email and follows up. Fix your report with one email. Download now.
src.transcript: मैं ghost loan हूं रे. वह पुराना loan जिसे तू कब का चुका चुका है, पर मैं तेरी report में अभी भी ज़िंदा हूं. हर नया loan, हर credit card मैं ही reject करवाता हूं. तू बस bankओं के चक्कर काटेगा और तेरे सपने एक एक करके टूटेंगे. पता भी नहीं चलेगा तुझे. बस. बहुत हुआ. Ulka का AI पूरी report scan करके ऐसी हर छिपी हुई गलती पकड़ लेता है. आपके सारे loan, card और EMI एक ही screen पर दिखाई देते हैं. उल्का ख़ुद bank को email करके dispute file करता है और उसका follow up भी करता है. सिर्फ़ एक email से इस पूरे झंझट से छुटकारा है. आप बस उल्का app से अपनी report ठीक करवाइए. अभी download कीजिए मैं रात भर जागता हूँ ताकि कोई आपको उल्लू ना बना सके.

comp_format: Skit: Creator skit, two friends bantering outdoors over chai about a loan
reframe: Copy the two-friends-over-chai banter skit device: caption 'That One Farzi Hawabaaz Friend', one mate loudly boasting big plans (a VIP restaurant, making the other his manager) outdoors near a bike, while the grounded friend reacts and the twist lands. Reframe the loan-rejection punchline into a savings flex: the hawabaaz friend brags about a fancy plan with no money, while the chill friend reveals he quietly built real savings with ₹100 a day on Bachatt.
hook: Hawabaazi band kar - main to roz ₹100 bachke chup-chaap aage nikal gaya!
script: HOOK (0-3s): [Two friends by a bike, caption 'That One Farzi Hawabaaz Friend'] VO: 'Hawabaazi band kar - main to roz ₹100 bachke chup-chaap aage nikal gaya!' | BEAT 1: [Hawabaaz friend boasting] 'District ka sabse VIP restaurant kholunga, tujhe manager banaunga!' | BEAT 2: [Grounded friend smirks] 'Paisa hai tere paas? Ya phir loan ka plan?' | BEAT 3: [Pulls out phone - Bachatt daily SIP, real savings] VO: 'Main roz ₹100 Bachatt mein daalta hoon, sach mein fund bana liya.' | TURN: [Hawabaaz friend speechless, chai spills] VO: 'Baatein nahi, bachat kaam aati hai.' | CTA (end): [Bachatt app screen, SIP balance] VO: 'Aaj se roz ₹100 bachao - Bachatt.'

src.hook: Shyam bhai, I'm thinking of opening the district's most VIP restaurant and making you the manager.
src.key_message: Oolka AI tells you why your loan was rejected, analyses your mistakes to improve CIBIL, and even talks NIL with the bank. Install now.
src.transcript: श्याम भाई. हां भाई. मैं सोच रहा हूं अपने जिले का सबसे VIP restaurant और तुझको बनाऊंगा उसमें manager. एकदम मस्त पैसा कमाएंगे, एकदम राजा की तरह हम लोग ice करेंगे. साले चाय पी रहे हो हमारे पैसे का. अचानक से तुम्हारे पास इतना पैसा कहां से आ गया कि तुम VIP restaurant खोलने वाले हो? Loan तो तुम ही दोगे ना. साले मैं दोस्त हूं bank नहीं जो loan दूंगा. अरे तो क्या करें यार bank वाले loan ही reject कर दे रहे हैं. अबे तू उल्का ही आई try करना. उल्का ही आई बताता है कि तेरा loan क्यों reject हुआ और ओलका तेरी सारी गलतियों को analysis करके CIBIL score improve करता है और bank से तेरे लिए nil पर बात भी करता है. ऐसा बात है तो? हां, तो ओलका ही आई try करो, क्योंकि loan के सफर में ओलका का साथ ज़रूरी है. हां, यार तो अभी try करते हैं. हां?

comp_format: Non-Skit (multi-turn): Multiple real people (child, women, young man) speaking to camera at home, vox-pop style
reframe: Copy the multi-voice vox-pop testimonial device: a chain of different real people at home - a small kid, two women, a young man - each speaking one line straight to camera, stacking up a relatable 'everyone says it' montage with no actors or set. Reframe the credit-dispute talking points into a savings chorus: each person confesses they never saved, then the closer reveals the simple habit - roz ₹100 on Bachatt - that finally got them saving and beating the 3% account.
hook: Bachpan se sunte aaye - 'bachat karo'. Ab roz ₹100 se shuru karo!
script: HOOK (0-3s): [Kid to camera at home, bright eyes] VO: 'Bachpan se sunte aaye - bachat karo. Ab roz ₹100 se shuru karo!' | BEAT 1: [Woman 1] 'Mahine ke end mein kuch bachta hi nahi tha.' | BEAT 2: [Woman 2] 'Bank mein paisa rakha, bas 3% mila - kuch khaas nahi.' | BEAT 3: [Young man, arms folded] 'Phir maine roz ₹100 ka daily SIP shuru kiya.' | TURN: [Quick cuts of all smiling, phones showing Bachatt growth] VO: 'Roz thoda, dheere dheere crorepati.' | CTA (end): [Bachatt app screen, savings climbing] VO: 'Aaj se roz ₹100 bachao - Bachatt.'

src.hook: Error detection, automatic dispute filing, bank email drafting - here's what to think about before you act.
src.key_message: Oolka detects credit report errors, auto-files disputes, drafts emails to your bank and tracks resolution. Download the app.
src.transcript: Error rate detection, automatic dispute filling, bank email drafting, resolution tracking, download link.

comp_format: Skit: Creator skit, two friends outdoors with a twist ending, plus phone app reveal
reframe: Copy the two-friends-outdoors skit with a 'don't-miss-the-end' twist: one friend panics, monologues to camera in a doorway, then a phone reveal flips the situation, with a 'comment Bachatt' co-host endcard for engagement bait. Reframe the loan-rejection plot into a savings-FOMO twist: friend stresses he had to borrow for an emergency, the twist reveals the other friend never needed a loan because he quietly saved ₹100/day on Bachatt and built an emergency fund.
hook: End tak ruko — emergency aayi, usne loan liya, maine apni bachat se nikal gaya!
script: HOOK (0-3s): [Do dost ghar ke darwaze par, ek pareshan] VO: 'End tak ruko — emergency aayi, usne loan liya, maine apni bachat se nikal gaya!' | BEAT 1: [Dost 1 sir pakad ke] 'Yaar hospital ka kharcha, EMI pe loan lena pada, ab 18% interest bhar raha hoon.' | BEAT 2: [Dost 2 muskura ke] 'Maine loan nahi liya... mera emergency fund tha.' | BEAT 3: [Phone reveal] Bachatt par roz ₹100 daala, 2 saal mein chhota fund ban gaya. | TURN: [Bachatt screen — daily savings + emergency fund jar] 'Loan nahi, apni bachat kaam aayi.' | CTA (end): [Bachatt app screen, co-host] VO: 'Aaj se roz ₹100 bachao — Bachatt.'

src.hook: Don't miss the end - real end twist as two friends argue over a loan and credit score.
src.key_message: When a low credit score blocks your loan, download Oolka to check and fix your score. Install now.
src.transcript: Loan credit score score problem download

comp_format: Non-Skit (multi-turn): (no transcript) Street vox-pop with two real young men talking about being 'MIDDLE CLASS', ends on Oolka app reveal
reframe: Copy the street vox-pop device where two real young men are tagged with a bold yellow 'MIDDLE CLASS' lower-third label and candidly vent about the everyday money squeeze, ending on a phone app reveal. Reframe the credit-fix payoff into a savings payoff: the 'MIDDLE CLASS' guys admit they never save because 'kuch bachta hi nahi', then one reveals he automated ₹100/day on Bachatt and now beats his 3% savings account.
hook: Middle class ka rona: kuch bachta hi nahi — par roz ₹100 to bachta hai na?
script: HOOK (0-3s): [Sadak par do ladke, 'MIDDLE CLASS' yellow tag] VO: 'Middle class ka rona: kuch bachta hi nahi — par roz ₹100 to bachta hai na?' | BEAT 1: [Pehla ladka] 'Salary aati hai, kharch ho jaati hai, mahine ke end mein zero.' | BEAT 2: [Dusra ladka] 'Bachat? Bhai bachega tab na.' | BEAT 3: [Phone nikalta hai] 'Maine roz ₹100 set kar diya Bachatt pe — pata bhi nahi chala.' | TURN: [Bachatt screen — daily SIP, 3% se zyada return] '3% savings account se aage, chhota SIP roz.' | CTA (end): [Bachatt app screen] VO: 'Aaj se roz ₹100 bachao — Bachatt.'

src.hook: Middle class - a candid street chat about the everyday money squeeze.
src.key_message: Oolka helps the middle class check and improve their credit score and loan eligibility. Download the app.

comp_format: AI-Generated: AI-generated talking PAN-card mascot in a crowded mall, narrator VO + app screen demo
reframe: Copy the AI-generated talking-mascot stunt: a giant walking PAN-card character on a pedestal in a crowded mall, a cheering crowd filming on phones, a screen overhead, narrator VO and a first-person 'I'm your PAN card' confession hook. Reframe the fake-loans-on-PAN reveal into a piggy-bank/gullak mascot that confesses 'I'm your savings — and you've been ignoring me; ₹100 a day on Bachatt would have made me crorepati'.
hook: Main hoon tumhari gullak — roz ₹100 daalte to aaj crore ban gaya hota!
script: HOOK (0-3s): [Mall mein chalti hui gullak/piggy-bank mascot, bheed phone se shoot karti] VO: 'Main hoon tumhari gullak — roz ₹100 daalte to aaj crore ban gaya hota!' | BEAT 1: [Mascot udaas] 'Tum chai, OTT, swiggy pe roz ₹100 uda dete ho.' | BEAT 2: [Overhead screen] 'Wahi ₹100 roz mujhe do — main badhti rahungi.' | BEAT 3: [App screen reveal] Bachatt daily SIP + RD — chhoti rakam, badi aadat. | TURN: [Mascot khush, score jaisa savings-meter upar] 'Slowly crorepati — bina loan, bina tension.' | CTA (end): [Bachatt app screen, '24x7 Savings Buddy'] VO: 'Aaj se roz ₹100 bachao — Bachatt.'

src.hook: Going for a loan? First watch this - I'm your PAN card, and two loans you never took got added to me.
src.key_message: Oolka scanned the report, caught the error and emailed the bank and bureau to file a dispute - score went up. First scan is free. Download now.
src.transcript: Loan लेने जा रहे हो? पहले यह देखो मैं हूं आपका PAN card. मेरे ऊपर भी दो loan चढ़ गए थे जो आपने कभी लिए ही नहीं थे. किसी ने मेरी details leak कर दी, बेचारा मेरा मालिक bike loan लेने गया और reject हो गया. आप bank के चक्कर लगाने ही वाले थे लेकिन पहले उल्का app try किया. सही किया, उल्का ने खुद मालिक की report scan की, गलती पकड़ी और bank व bureau को email करके dispute file कर दिया. अब मेरा कोई गलत इस्तेमाल नहीं कर सकता और मालिक का score भी बढ़ गया. मेरी मानो अपनी report ठीक करवाओ. उल्का से पूछो पहला scan बिल्कुल free है. अभी उल्का download करो.

comp_format: AI-Generated: AI-generated talking-car mascot, Before/After Oolka transformation, narrator VO + app screen
reframe: Copy the AI-generated talking-luxury-car mascot with a sharp 'Before Oolka' (red tag) vs 'After using oolka' (blue tag) split-screen transformation: a valet/showroom snubs a guy ('aukaat ke baahar hai'), then after the app he poses confidently with the car. Reframe the credit-score glow-up into a savings glow-up: 'Before Bachatt' he can't afford the down payment and eyes a loan, 'After Bachatt' his daily ₹100 SIP became the down payment — no loan needed.
hook: Pehle: aukaat ke baahar. Baad mein: apni bachat se down payment ready!
script: HOOK (0-3s): [Showroom, talking-car, 'Before Bachatt' red tag] VO: 'Pehle: aukaat ke baahar. Baad mein: apni bachat se down payment ready!' | BEAT 1: [Salesman taunt] 'Iski EMI? Pehle loan to mil jaaye.' | BEAT 2: [Guy soch mein] 'Loan lekar phasna nahi hai.' | BEAT 3: [App screen — daily ₹100 SIP badhta hua] Roz ₹100 jamaa karke down payment khud bana liya. | TURN: ['After Bachatt' blue tag, car ke saath confident pose] 'Bina loan, apni bachat se.' | CTA (end): [Bachatt app screen] VO: 'Aaj se roz ₹100 bachao — Bachatt.'

src.hook: Don't touch it, it's beyond your means - what EMI? Have you seen your score?
src.key_message: Oolka scanned the report, caught hidden errors and emailed the bank itself. Score above 800, lower interest, everything on one screen. Fix your report before any loan.
src.transcript: अरे हाथ मत लगाना, औकात के बाहर है, क्या EMI पे लेगा? अपना score देखा है? Sorry मैं rejected caseओं से बात नहीं करती. सुनो auto ले लो वही है तुम्हारी class. ऊलका ने report scan की, छिपी गलती पकड़ी, bank को खुद E mail भेजा. Score आठ सौ के पार, ब्याज कम और सब कुछ एक ही screen पर. बस एक E mail काम खतम. आप? आइये, आइये. AC on कर दिया है, आपकी favorite playlist भी लगा दी. सब तैयार हैं. तो किसी भी चीज़ का loan लेने से पहले, तू उल्का से अपनी report ठीक करवाओ. जितना score ज़्यादा, उतना ब्याज कम.

comp_format: Production-Led: High-production studio talking-head presenter + app screen demos
reframe: Copy the high-production studio device: a single polished, recognizable presenter (kurta + scarf, celebrity-grade) walks toward camera delivering confident burned-in-caption claims, intercut with crisp app-screen demos, ending on a glowing app logo card. Reframe the 'we don't just give advice, we fix your EMI/score' authority pitch into 'other apps just track spends — Bachatt actually saves for you, ₹100 a day, beats your 3% savings account'.
hook: Baaki apps sirf kharcha dikhate hain — Bachatt roz ₹100 bacha ke deta hai.
script: HOOK (0-3s): [Presenter kurta-scarf, camera ki taraf chalte hue] VO: 'Baaki apps sirf kharcha dikhate hain — Bachatt roz ₹100 bacha ke deta hai.' | BEAT 1: [Burned caption] 'Savings account deta hai sirf 3% — usse aage socho.' | BEAT 2: [App demo screen] Daily SIP auto-set, RD, emergency fund ek screen par. | BEAT 3: [Presenter] 'Chhoti rakam, roz — bina socha samjha bachat.' | TURN: [Score-jaisa savings graph upar jaata] 'Slowly slowly — crorepati banne ka asaan rasta.' | CTA (end): [Glowing Bachatt logo card] VO: 'Aaj se roz ₹100 bachao — Bachatt.'

src.hook: If you want to lower your EMI, download this app on your phone.
src.key_message: Oolka's AI understands your full credit history, closes wrong/disputed loans, raises your score step by step and emails the bank to cut your interest. Built by IITians, 50 lakh users. Download now.
src.transcript: अगर तुम्हें अपनी EMI कम करवानी है तो यह app अपने phone में download कर लो. दूसरे app तुमको credit score और loan के बारे में केवल ज्ञान देते हैं पर यह app तुम्हारा credit score भी बढ़ाता है और EMI भी कम करवाता है. App का नाम है उल्का. उल्का का AI तुम्हारी पूरी credit history को समझता है. कोई dispute हो या तुम्हारे नाम पर कोई गलत loan चल रहा हो तो उसको बंद करवाता है और step by step credit score बढ़ाने में तुम्हारी मदद करता है. यह app तुम्हारी तरफ से bank को email भेज कर तुम्हारा interest rate भी कम करवाएगा. यह समझ लो कि उल्का तुम्हारा financial advisor है और इससे तुम अपनी भाषा जैसे कि हिंदी, बंगाली, गुजराती जो भी हो उसमें आसानी से chat कर सकते हो. इस app को IITians ने बनाया है और पचास लाख लोग इसको use करते हैं. तो तुम भी उल्का app download करो और loans, EMIs से जुड़ी सारी problems को solve करो. उल्का app download करें.
