src.transcript: अगर तुम्हारा loan reject हो गया है तो बार बार apply मत करो. यह app अपने phone में download कर लो. दूसरे app तुमको credit score और loan के बारे में केवल ज्ञान देते हैं पर यह app तुम्हारा credit score भी बढ़ाता है और EMI भी कम करवाता है. App का नाम है उल्का. उल्का का AI तुम्हारी पूरी credit history को समझता है, कोई dispute हो या तुम्हारे नाम पर कोई गलत loan चल रहा हो तो उसको बंद करवाता है और step by step credit score बढ़ाने में तुम्हारी मदद करता है. यह app तुम्हारी तरफ से bank को email भेजकर तुम्हारा interest rate भी कम करवाएगा. यह समझ लो कि उल्का तुम्हारा financial advisor है और इससे तुम अपनी भाषा जैसे कि हिंदी, बंगाली, गुजराती जो भी हो उसमें आसानी से chat कर सकते हो. इस app को IITians ने बनाया है और पचास लाख लोग इसको use करते हैं. तो तुम भी उल्का app download करो और loans, EMI's से जुड़ी सारी problems को solve करो. उल्का app download करें.

comp_format: Non-Skit: Single creator talking to camera, subtitled UGC testimonial
reframe: Copy the UGC testimonial device: a relatable young creator talks straight to camera on a street/balcony with yellow-highlighted keyword captions, cuts to a 'frustrated me at laptop' B-roll, then holds up the phone with the app open. Reframe the '3 loan rejections, no reason given' testimonial into a savings origin story: 'I kept thinking I'd start saving next month and never did, until ₹100/day on Bachatt did it automatically'.
hook: 3 saal 'agle mahine se' bolta raha — Bachatt ne roz ₹100 khud bacha diya.
script: HOOK (0-3s): [Creator sadak par, keyword captions] VO: '3 saal agle mahine se bolta raha — Bachatt ne roz ₹100 khud bacha diya.' | BEAT 1: [B-roll: laptop pe sir pakad ke] 'Salary aayi, kharch ho gayi, bachat zero.' | BEAT 2: [Creator] 'Har baar socha next month start karunga.' | BEAT 3: [Phone uthata hai, app open] Bachatt pe auto daily ₹100 set kiya — soch-na hi nahi pada. | TURN: [Savings screen badhta hua] '6 mahine mein chhota fund tayyar, bina tension.' | CTA (end): [Bachatt app screen] VO: 'Aaj se roz ₹100 bachao — Bachatt.'

src.hook: Loan rejected 3 times, the bank only said 'sorry, can't approve' — reason? Never told.
src.key_message: Oolka's AI scanned my report in 10 seconds, found the exact reason, emailed the bank to fix it, and guided my score from 550 to 700+. Check yours on Oolka.
src.transcript: तीन बार loan reject हुआ. तीनों बार bank ने सिर्फ एक ही line भेजी, sorry, approve नहीं कर सकते. क्यूँ? बताया ही नहीं. India में हर तीसरा बंदा यही झेल रहा है. Loan reject और reason का कोई पता नहीं. तुम बस guess करते रह जाते हो इसीलिए मैंने ulka download किया. इसके AI credit expert ने report scan की और दस 2nd में मुझे exact reason बता दिया. मेरा एक पुराना loan अभी तक open दिख रहा था जबकि मैंने पूरी amount pay कर दी थी. यही मेरा credit score नीचे खींच रहा था. Ulka ने bank को email भेज के इसको बंद करवाया. फिर इसने मुझे step by step guide करके मेरा credit score 05:50 से 700 के ऊपर ले जाने में मदद. अगर तुम्हारा भी loan बार बार reject हो रहा है, तो ऊलका पे अपना credit profile ज़रूर check करो. Download the app now.

comp_format: Micro-Drama: Single narrator VO over illustrative clips (chai-stall man, stopwatch graphic, app shot)
reframe: Copy the cinematic micro-drama device: a single narrator VO over moody illustrative clips (chai-stall man, a cut-out hand holding a stopwatch on a green screen, a glowing phone on black) with the punchy 'even your chai has an EMI pending' line. Reframe 'which loan eats the most interest, close it first' into 'even your daily chai is a leak — redirect that ₹100 into Bachatt and watch it compound'.
hook: Teri chai pe bhi kharcha pending hai — wahi ₹100 roz Bachatt mein daal.
script: HOOK (0-3s): [Chai-stall par aadmi, narrator VO] VO: 'Teri chai pe bhi kharcha pending hai — wahi ₹100 roz Bachatt mein daal.' | BEAT 1: [Stopwatch cut-out, green BG] VO: 'Roz ka chhota kharcha — saal mein ₹36,000 udd jaata hai.' | BEAT 2: [Chai-stall guy soch mein] VO: 'Samajh hi nahi aata tha paisa jaata kahan.' | BEAT 3: [Glowing phone on black] Bachatt wahi ₹100 roz SIP mein lagata hai. | TURN: [Savings graph compound hota] VO: 'Wahi leak ab badhti bachat ban gayi.' | CTA (end): [Bachatt app screen] VO: 'Aaj se roz ₹100 bachao — Bachatt.'

src.hook: Brother, let me drink my tea in peace for a minute — Sir, your tea also has an EMI pending.
src.key_message: Oolka's AI shows which loan charges the most interest and which to close first; plan your EMIs and cut interest. Install Oolka.
src.transcript: भाई, एक minute chain से चाय तो पीने दो. भैया, आपकी चाय की भी EMI बाकी है. क्या? पांच EMI भर रहा था हर महीने, पर दो में सैंतालीस हज़ार रुपए ज़्यादा दे चुका था. पता भी नहीं था. Salary आती थी, सीधा EMI में जाती थी. कौन सा loan ज़्यादा खा रहा है? समझ ही नहीं आता था. फिर Olka app का पता चला. सौ रुपए का subscription लिया, AI plus feature use किया. Olka ने दिखाया कौन सा loan सबसे ज़्यादा interest ले रहा है? कौन सा पहले close करना चाहिए? सब एक screen पर clear. अब EMI planned है, interest कम हो रहा है और चाय भी सुकून से पीता हूं. और हां, चाय की EMI बंद. अब cash में दूंगा. अगर आप भी EMI का झमेला समझ नहीं पा रहे, Olka use करो, loan management simple बनाओ. तो install button पर click करो और Olka app download करो.

comp_format: Skit: Creator skit, 'When Mama Bhanja are same age', multiple characters in dialogue
reframe: Copy the trending 'When Mama & Bhanja are the same age' comedy-skit device: a captioned meme premise, character name-tags ('Mama', 'Bhanja', 'Mami') on each person, an OTP/phone gag, and a punchy two-location format (park + pink living room). Reframe the fake-loan/OTP-fraud plot into a savings rivalry: the same-age mama and bhanja argue over who's richer, and the bhanja wins because he's been quietly putting ₹100/day into Bachatt while mama blew it.
hook: Mama-bhanja same age, par crorepati wahi banega jo roz ₹100 bachayega!
script: HOOK (0-3s): ['When Mama Bhanja are same age' caption, name-tags] VO: 'Mama-bhanja same age, par crorepati wahi banega jo roz ₹100 bachayega!' | BEAT 1: [Mama akadta] 'Main bada hoon, mere paas zyada paisa.' | BEAT 2: [Bhanja phone dikhata] 'Mama, main roz ₹100 Bachatt mein daalta hoon.' | BEAT 3: [Living room, Mami impressed] Bhanja ka chhota fund mama se zyada nikla. | TURN: [Bachatt screen — daily SIP + savings graph] 'Umar nahi, aadat jeetti hai.' | CTA (end): [Bachatt app screen] VO: 'Aaj se roz ₹100 bachao — Bachatt.'

src.hook: Uncle, give the OTP! OTP? What OTP? — comedic banter between same-age mama and bhanja.
src.key_message: Oolka is an AI that actually fixes your credit score — it emails the bank about a fake/wrong loan and tracks the complaint. Just install and add details.
src.transcript: मां बाप OTP दियो. OTP? कैसे OTP? अरे वो chow मंगाई है ना तो उसका OTP आया हुआ है ना. Chow नहीं का OTP कब से आने लगा भाई? अरे यार मेरा OTP use हो चुका है discount के लिए अब तेरा चाहिए थे ना? दस रुपए बचा के हम बहुत महान वन जाएंगे हैं. बड़ी बड़ी बात है chow mein खाते हैं. कुछ बड़ा कर ले ज़िंदगी में. अरे कर लूँगा यार बड़ा और देखूँ एक दिन ऐसा आएगा जब मैं आगे आगे भागूंगा और तू मेरे पीछे पीछे होगा. समझा? आप OTP दे यार तू. OTP नहीं दे रहा मैं. क्यूँ नहीं दे रहा? मैं नहीं दूंगा. ठीक है मत दे. फिर तेरे पैर छुए गरीब भर दूंगा फिर मत बोलिए मेरी. Blackmail नहीं, blackmail नहीं, नहीं नहीं. Oh no. ठीक है? देख देख देख. सिखs marks ले जाओ. अरे क्या हुआ? आप इतना परेशान क्यों हो? अरे यार loan लेने गया था आज मैं. पता चला कि सारा का सारा CIBIL गिरा हुआ है मेरा. पर कैसे? वही तो नहीं पता कैसे? तो एक काम करो ना, उल्का app पर check कर लो. उल्का? यह क्या है अब? उल्का is an AI that actually fixes your credit score और वह बाकी app की तरह नहीं है जो सिर्फ़ score बताते हैं. वह कैसे? मैं दिखाती हूं. एक 2nd, यह तो सुशील के loan की वजह से गिरा हुआ है तुम्हारा score. पंजे, अब इसे मैं ठीक कैसे करूं? तुम्हारे इस fake loan के लिए ना उल्का खुद bank को email करेंगे और वो complaint को track भी करेगा. तुम्हें कुछ नहीं करना, बस app को install करना है, उसके बाद उसमें details जाना बाकी सब उल्का AI कर देगा. क्या बात है यार. निनाई ना भांजे के साथ थोड़ा हिसाब कर रहा हूँ अपना, है ना? जब मैं आगे आगे भागूंगा, अब तुम मेरे पीछे पीछे होगा. समझा?

comp_format: Production-Led: Cinematic branded drama with actors in dialogue (mentor/loan-officer scene)
reframe: Copy the cinematic branded drama device: a warm mentor figure (vest, authoritative) counsels a worried working-class man across a desk/office, calm dialogue-driven beats with clean burned captions building to an emotional resolution. Reframe 'can't pay full EMI, build a plan, settle without dropping score' into 'don't take a loan you can't repay — the mentor shows him daily ₹100 savings on Bachatt so the emergency is handled without borrowing'.
hook: Loan mat le jo chuka na sake — roz ₹100 bacha, emergency khud sambhal jayegi.
script: HOOK (0-3s): [Office, mentor aur pareshan aadmi] VO: 'Loan mat le jo chuka na sake — roz ₹100 bacha, emergency khud sambhal jayegi.' | BEAT 1: [Aadmi udaas] 'Sir, achanak kharcha aa gaya, loan lena pade.' | BEAT 2: [Mentor shaant] 'Loan se pehle apni bachat banao — roz thoda.' | BEAT 3: [Phone par Bachatt — daily ₹100 SIP + emergency fund] 'Yeh dekho, har din ₹100, bina dard.' | TURN: [Aadmi ke chehre par sukoon] 'Agli baar bank nahi, apni bachat kaam aayegi.' | CTA (end): [Bachatt app screen] VO: 'Aaj se roz ₹100 bachao — Bachatt.'

src.hook: If you can't pay the full EMI, don't default either — it wrecks your credit score and future loans.
src.key_message: Chat with Oolka's AI in your language; it builds a payment plan, drafts an email to your bank officer, gets it approved and settles loans without hurting your score. 50,000+ loans settled.
src.transcript: अगर पूरा EMI नहीं दे सकते हो तो default भी मत करो, नहीं तो तुम्हारा credit score भी खराब होता है और आगे जाके तुमको loan भी नहीं मिलेगा. सच सच बताओ क्या स्थिति है तुम्हारी? तीन महीने बाद payment कर दूंगा. तब तक कुछ कर सकते हो? जी. तो एक काम करो, अपने phone पे एक app download करो. उल्का. उल्का app पर chat करके अपनी भाषा में बताओ कितना दे सकते हो, बाकी का कब दे पाओगे. उल्का का AI तुम्हारे लिए एक payment plan बनाएगा. अगर सही लगे, तो फिर एक email तैयार करेगा, जिसको तुम इसी app से अपने bank के loan officer तक पहुंचा सकते हो. Bank वाले plan को approve करेंगे और सबसे पहले यह वसूली वालों को तुम्हारे पीछे से हटाएंगे. हमारे business partner भी एक loan नहीं चुका पा रहे थे, तो उल्का app ने उनका भी settlement करवाया है. वह भी बिना credit score गिराए. उल्का app अब तक पचास हज़ार से ज़्यादा लोगों का loan settle करवा चुकी है. तो तुम भी उल्का app download करो, अपना loan settle करो. हर बार हम नहीं आऐंगे तुमको बचाने के लिए. उल्का app download करें.

comp_format: Skit: (no transcript) Creator skit, group of friends arguing outdoors + Oolka app endcard
reframe: Copy the raw, real-feeling street-confrontation skit device: a group of friends in a heated outdoor argument over money, escalating dialogue and shoves, then a hard cut to a clean blue 'Download Oolka' loading-screen endcard. Reframe the credit-score quarrel into a savings quarrel: friends fight because one borrowed money from the group and can't return it, until one reveals the fix is everyone saving ₹100/day on Bachatt instead of lending and borrowing.
hook: Udhaar maango mat — roz ₹100 bachao, dosti aur jeb dono bachegi!
script: HOOK (0-3s): [Doston ki garma-garam bahas, dhakka-mukki] VO: 'Udhaar maango mat — roz ₹100 bachao, dosti aur jeb dono bachegi!' | BEAT 1: [Ek dost] 'Tune mera paisa wapas nahi kiya!' | BEAT 2: [Dusra] 'Emergency thi yaar, kya karta.' | BEAT 3: [Teesra phone nikalta] 'Bachatt pe roz ₹100 daalo — apna fund banega, udhaar ki zaroorat hi nahi.' | TURN: [Sab shaant, Bachatt screen — emergency fund] 'Apni bachat se kaam chal jaata hai.' | CTA (end): [Blue 'Download Bachatt' loading screen] VO: 'Aaj se roz ₹100 bachao — Bachatt.'

src.hook: Group of friends in a heated street argument over money/loan trouble.
src.key_message: Fix your CIBIL score fast with Oolka — one smart step to financial freedom. Download Oolka.
src.transcript: Bye

comp_format: Skit: (no transcript) Emotional family skit (son & father) with Oolka app screens (Report Summary, AI chat)
reframe: Copy the emotional family skit device: a stressed young son in a humble home, an old father in the next room, and a cut to phone app screens (a 'Report Summary' and an AI-chat conversation) used as the emotional turn, with the Oolka badge top-right. Reframe 'high credit-card utilisation, fix your score' into a father-son savings moment: the son confesses he has no savings cushion for the family, and the Bachatt app shows him how ₹100/day builds an RD/emergency fund the family can lean on.
hook: Appa, ab tension nahi — roz ₹100 se ghar ke liye fund bana raha hoon.
script: HOOK (0-3s): [Bete ka chehra pareshan, ghar mein] VO: 'Appa, ab tension nahi — roz ₹100 se ghar ke liye fund bana raha hoon.' | BEAT 1: [Beta] 'Achanak kharcha aaye to apne paas kuch bachat hi nahi hoti.' | BEAT 2: [Pita chinta mein darwaze par khade] 'Beta, hamesha bank ke chakkar?' | BEAT 3: [Phone — Bachatt savings summary + AI chat] Roz ₹100 RD/emergency fund mein jaata hai. | TURN: [Pita-beta ke chehre par sukoon] 'Ab parivaar ke liye apni bachat hai.' | CTA (end): [Bachatt app screen] VO: 'Aaj se roz ₹100 bachao — Bachatt.'

src.hook: Appa — an emotional family moment over money / credit trouble.
src.key_message: Oolka's AI analyses your report, flags high credit-card utilisation and gives a score-improvement plan. Download Oolka.

comp_format: Skit: Family skit (husband, wife, mother-in-law) dialogue-driven comedy + app endcard
reframe: Copy the three-character domestic comedy device (husband, wife, mother-in-law) with envy-driven dialogue in a middle-class home, ending on a phone holding up a glowing score gauge (here '801') as the satisfying payoff endcard. Reframe 'relatives bought cars, we fixed our CIBIL and got the loan' into savings envy: the wife taunts that relatives flaunt new things, and the husband flips it by revealing their quiet ₹100/day Bachatt savings is growing into real wealth — no loan, no show-off.
hook: Padosi gaadi dikhate hain — hum chup-chaap roz ₹100 bacha ke crore banayenge.
script: HOOK (0-3s): [Patni taunt karti, pati aata hua] VO: 'Padosi gaadi dikhate hain — hum chup-chaap roz ₹100 bacha ke crore banayenge.' | BEAT 1: [Patni] 'Sab ke rishtedaar nayi cheezein laaye, hum hi atke.' | BEAT 2: [Saas taana marti] 'Kuch jod ke rakha bhi hai?' | BEAT 3: [Pati phone dikhata] Bachatt pe roz ₹100, savings graph badhta hua. | TURN: [Phone par badi savings/goal-meter '801'-jaisa] 'Dikhawa nahi, asli bachat — slowly crorepati.' | CTA (end): [Bachatt app screen] VO: 'Aaj se roz ₹100 bachao — Bachatt.'

src.hook: Everyone's relatives bought new cars, only we're stuck — they keep flaunting it.
src.key_message: Oolka's AI analyses your credit profile, tells you why CIBIL is low and negotiates with the bank on your behalf — score fixed, loan approved. Download Oolka.
src.transcript: यह लो खाना खा लो. सब्ज़ी का है? सब्ज़ी नहीं है. Mummy चलो सब्ज़ी लेने चलते हैं बाज़ार. मैं नहीं जाऊंगी, इसे ले जा. क्या problem क्या है आप लोगों को? इतने घर में वह कम जाएगा, हम छुंचे खा लेंगे. मतलब? मतलब सारे रिश्तेदारों ने car ले लिए हैं, सिर्फ हम ही लटके हुए हैं और सब दिखा दिखा के बाज़ार जाते हैं, घूमने जाते हैं. अच्छा. कहां जा रहे हो इतना बड़े पहनकर? Showroom जा रहा हूं, नई car ले ली. 2nd hand ले लेना. अब तो इस घर भी नई car आएगी. चाहे मुझे finance भी नकारना पड़ेगा. Finance, कौन देगा आपको loan? सब देंगे क्योंकि मेरा credit score सही हो गया और loan भी approve हो गया है. अच्छा वो कैसे? क्योंकि पहले मुझे Allka app के बारे में नहीं पता था. Allka Allka KI आपका credit profile analyze करके बता देता है कि आपका CIBIL score क्यों down है? चाहे बंद लोग active दिख रहा हो या फिर EMI miss हुई हो Allka KI आपके behalf के हिसाब से bank के साथ negotiate भी करता है. तो मेरा भाई का भी credit score सही हो जाएगा. हां उसे बोलो और क्या app download करें और अपना cibil score सही करें, वैसे भी मैं late हो रहा हूं.

comp_format: Skit: (no transcript) Creator skit 'POV Indian Mom when siblings fight' + Oolka credit-card-usage app screen
reframe: Copy the viral 'POV: Indian Mom when siblings are fighting' meme-skit device: two brothers physically scuffle outdoors, the angry mom storms in to break it up (captioned POV), then a phone reveals an app screen (here a 72% credit-card-usage stat). Reframe the credit-utilisation fix into a sibling money fight: the brothers fight over who wasted the shared money, mom settles it by making both save ₹100/day on Bachatt, shown as a growing savings screen.
hook: POV: Mummy jab bhai-bhai ladte hain — dono ko roz ₹100 bachat pe laga deti hai!
script: HOOK (0-3s): [Do bhai ladte hue, POV caption] VO: 'POV: Mummy jab bhai-bhai ladte hain — dono ko roz ₹100 bachat pe laga deti hai!' | BEAT 1: [Bhai 1] 'Tune saara paisa uda diya!' [Bhai 2] 'Tune kaunsa bachaya?' | BEAT 2: [Mummy gusse mein aati hai] 'Bas! Dono suno.' | BEAT 3: [Phone — Bachatt daily ₹100 SIP dono ke liye] 'Roz thoda bachao, ladna band.' | TURN: [Savings screen badhta hua] 'Mahine baad dono ke paas apna fund.' | CTA (end): [Bachatt app screen] VO: 'Aaj se roz ₹100 bachao — Bachatt.'

src.hook: POV: Indian moms when the siblings are fighting.
src.key_message: Oolka (24x7 AI credit score expert) shows your credit-card usage and helps fix your score. Download Oolka.

comp_format: Non-Skit: Single man testimonial to mic + Oolka app screen demo (report, dispute email)
reframe: Copy the rural 'Viral News'-style mic testimonial device: a weathered everyman speaks into a branded reporter mic in a village lane with a money-bag prop, big bold Hindi number captions ('710 tha', '780 pe aa gaya') marking the before/after, plus a clean email/app-screen insert. Reframe the 'score dropped 90 points, restored to 780' arc into a savings arc: 'I used to have ₹0 saved, now I have a real fund because I put ₹100/day into Bachatt and it beats my 3% bank account'.
hook: Pehle ₹0 bachat thi — ab roz ₹100 se chhota fund, 3% account se aage!
script: HOOK (0-3s): [Gaon ki gali, mic pe aadmi, paise ki potli] VO: 'Pehle ₹0 bachat thi — ab roz ₹100 se chhota fund, 3% account se aage!' | BEAT 1: [Bada caption: 'Bachat ₹0 thi'] 'Mahine ke end mein kuch bachta hi nahi tha.' | BEAT 2: [App screen — daily SIP set] 'Bachatt pe roz ₹100 auto laga diya.' | BEAT 3: [Bada caption: 'Fund ban gaya'] 'Bina mehnat ke jamaa hota gaya.' | TURN: [Savings graph + 3% se zyada return] '3% wale account se behtar.' | CTA (end): [Bachatt app screen, '100% safe'] VO: 'Aaj se roz ₹100 bachao — Bachatt.'

src.hook: See this 620 score? Yesterday it was 710 — three loan applications in one month tanked it.
src.key_message: Oolka AI Plus (24x7 AI CIBIL expert in Hindi) tells you which inquiries to dispute and emails the bureau itself — score back to 780 in 3 months. Download now.
src.transcript: भैया यह छह सौ बीस score देख रहे हो? कल तक सात सौ दस था. तीन जगह loan के लिए apply कर दिया एक ही महीने में दिया. TV लेना था, bike upgrade करना था और business के लिए थोड़ा पैसा चाहिए था. सब जगह inquiry हो गई और score 90 points गिर गया. अब कोई loan ही नहीं दे रहा. फिर उल्का AI Plus लिया. उसमें AI civil expert जो 24 7 हिंदी में बात करता है, उसने बताया कि एक एक करके सही तरीका क्या है, कौन सी inquiry dispute करनी है, bureau को कैसे email लिखना है, सब कुछ वो खुद कर दिया. भई तीन महीने में score वापस सात सौ अस्सी पे आ गया और अब TV भी आ गया, bike भी upgrade हो गई. उल्का AI plus तुम्हारा AI expert जो score बढ़ाना जानता है, अभी download करो.

comp_format: AI-Generated: 3D-animated synthetic characters (caricatured 'Debt King' recovery agent vs Oolka phone mascot) with narrator VO
reframe: Copy the AI-animated villain-vs-hero device: a grotesque caricatured 'Debt King' recovery-agent villain (crown of overdue bills, gold chains, baseball bat) menaces the viewer, then a friendly blue phone-mascot superhero zaps him in a comic street fight, ending on a clean logo card. Reframe the recovery-harassment plot into 'Loan-Rakshas vs Bachat-Hero': the debt monster threatens you, and the Bachatt savings-hero defeats him because you already built an emergency fund at ₹100/day and never needed his loan.
hook: Loan-rakshas se darna band — roz ₹100 ka Bachat-hero usse bhaga deta hai!
script: HOOK (0-3s): [Vikrat 'Loan-Rakshas' villain, bills ka taj, bat] VO: 'Loan-rakshas se darna band — roz ₹100 ka Bachat-hero usse bhaga deta hai!' | BEAT 1: [Villain dhamki deta] 'Loan lega, EMI mein phasega, main aaunga vasooli ko!' | BEAT 2: [Blue phone-mascot Bachat-hero udta aata] 'Isko loan ki zaroorat hi nahi!' | BEAT 3: [App screen — emergency fund + daily ₹100] Hero villain ko zap karta hai. | TURN: [Villain bhaagta, savings graph chamakta] 'Apni bachat hai to kisi ke loan ka dar nahi.' | CTA (end): [Bachatt logo card] VO: 'Aaj se roz ₹100 bachao — Bachatt.'

src.hook: I'm the loan agent — I'll fry your brain with calls and barge in to take your stuff.
src.key_message: Oolka's AI analyses your credit history, manages all cards/EMIs on one screen, and with one email helps stop recovery harassment while pushing your score past 800. Install now.
src.transcript: मैं loan agent हूं रे पहले तो call कर करके तेरा भेजा पूरी तरह fry कर दूंगा और अगर पैसे नहीं मिले ना तो घर में घुसकर तेरा पूरा सामान उठा लूंगा. तेरे मोहल्ले के सामने तेरी ऐसी बेइज्जती करूंगा कि तू सड़क पर घूमने लायक भी नहीं रहेगा. Form, document, reminder, follow up इतना भेजूंगा कि तेरे phone की घंटी भी मुझसे डरने लगेगी. मैं उल्का app हूं. मेरा AI तुम्हारी credit history को analyze करता है, step by step बताता है, जिससे तुम्हारा credit score आठ सौ से ज़्यादा हो जाएगा. सारे credit cards, loans, EMI dates और reminders सब कुछ एक ही screen पर. और अगर loan, EMI या वसूली वाले तुम्हें परेशान कर रहे हैं तो मैं सिर्फ़ एक email से उनसे छुटकारा दिलाने में मदद कर सकता हूं. तो आज ही download करो Ulka app. Install now पर click करें और Ulka app download करें.

comp_format: AI-Generated: Synthetic 3D talking-phone avatar (animated face) + live actor + Oolka chat/app screens, narrator VO
reframe: Copy the surreal synthetic 'talking-phone face' device: an animated smartphone with a cartoon 3D face banters with a live actor, intercut with app chat/email screens, narrator VO and a bold problem-hook ('even your no-cost EMI got rejected'). Reframe 'fix your score for lower interest' into the talking-phone savings buddy roasting the actor for chasing no-cost EMIs and instead nudging him to save ₹100/day on Bachatt so he can buy outright, no EMI.
hook: No-cost EMI ka chakkar chhodo — roz ₹100 bachao, cash mein khareedo!
script: HOOK (0-3s): [Animated talking-phone face actor se baat karta] VO: 'No-cost EMI ka chakkar chhodo — roz ₹100 bachao, cash mein khareedo!' | BEAT 1: [Phone-face chidhaata] 'Tu har cheez EMI pe leta hai — phir score, phir reject.' | BEAT 2: [Actor] 'To kya karoon?' [Phone-face] 'Mujh pe Bachatt khol, roz ₹100 daal.' | BEAT 3: [App screen — daily SIP, goal fund] Kuch mahine mein cheez khareedne layak fund. | TURN: [Savings graph upar] 'EMI nahi, apna paisa — bina interest.' | CTA (end): [Bachatt app screen] VO: 'Aaj se roz ₹100 bachao — Bachatt.'

src.hook: Even your no-cost EMI got rejected — fix your score first.
src.key_message: Oolka AI scans your full report, catches hidden errors, emails the bank, files disputes and follows up — score 800+ means lower interest. Fix your report with Oolka.
src.transcript: ఎక్స్క్యూs మీ నన్ను కొంటావా? అరే నీ నో కాస్ట్ emi కూడా రిజెక్ట్ అయిపోయిది. నీ స్థాయికి మించినవి. ముందు ఆ 18% వడ్డీ పర్సనల్ లోంతో మీ స్కోర్ ని సరి చేసుకో? ఉల్కా ఏఐ పూర్తి రిపోర్ట్ స్కాన్ చేసి, దాగి ఉన్న తప్పులను పట్టుకుంటుంది. అదే బ్యాంకుకు ఇమెయిల్ చేసి, డిస్ప్యూట్ ఫైల్ చేస్తుంది మరియు ఫాలో అప్ కూడా చేస్తుంది. స్కోర్ 800 పైన వడ్డీ తక్కువ మరియు అన్ని లోన్లు. కార్డులు మరియు ఈఎంఐ రిమైండర్లు అన్నీ ఒకే స్క్రీన్ పై. కేవలం ఒక ఇమేజ్ తో ఈ గొడవ నుండి విముక్తి welcome సర్. మీ డేటా అంతా మీ పాత డివైస్ లో నుండి ట్రాన్స్ఫర్ అయిపోయింది. ఇక నేను మీ సేవలో ఉంటాను కాబట్టి దేనికైనా లోన్ తీసుకునే ఉంది? ఉల్కా ద్వారా మీ రిపోర్ట్ ని సరి చేసుకోండి. స్కోర్ ఎంత ఎక్కువ ఉంటే వడ్డీ అంత తక్కువ.

comp_format: Non-Skit: Single man street testimonial to 'Viral News' mic, crowd behind
reframe: Copy the 'Viral News' street-interview device: an ordinary man speaks to a branded reporter mic with a crowd of onlookers behind him, a relatable rejection-rant delivery, then a clean glowing-phone app endcard on black. Reframe 'rejected by 7 banks & 4 apps, Oolka for ₹100 fixed it' into a savings flex: 'I was rejected everywhere for loans, so I stopped chasing loans — I put ₹100/day into Bachatt and built my own fund so I never have to beg a bank again'.

src.hook: Rejected everywhere — 7 banks, 4 apps. CIBIL was 520 and nobody would tell me why.
src.key_message: For just Rs 100, Oolka's AI Plus showed why my CIBIL was bad, emailed banks to clear it (score to 700+) and even found low-interest lenders. Try Oolka.
src.transcript: सात bank चार apps हर जगह से reject CIBIL पांच सौ बीस था और कोई बता भी नहीं रहा था क्यों मेरी EMI bounce हो गई थी. उसके बाद CIBIL इतना गिर गया कि bank बात तक नहीं कर रहे थे. मैं समझ ही नहीं पा रहा था problem है क्या और ठीक कैसे होगी? उस time मुझे Ola के बारे में पता चला सिर्फ़ सौ रुपए देकर मुझे Ola का AI plus feature मिल गया. इतने कम दाम में मेरी पूरी problem clear हो गई. Ola ने मुझे बताया मेरी CIBIL क्यों ख़राब हुई? EMI bounce और पुरानी entries की वजह से banks को mail करके Ola ने सब clear कराया. मेरा CIBIL 700 plus हो गया और सबसे अच्छी बात Ola ने मुझे कम interest पर loan देने वाली bank भी बता दी अगर आप app download करके छोड़ देते हो तो आप solution miss कर रहे हो मैं तो बोलूंगा सौ रुपए में इतना बड़ा tension ख़त्म हो गया अगर आपका भी CIBIL ख़राब है तो Ola try करो. तो install button पर click करो और Ola app download करो.

comp_format: Non-Skit: Single man testimonial to branded mic + Oolka app chat/email screen demo

src.key_message: Oolka AI Plus built my penalty-waiver case (attached medical bills, highlighted history, wrote a sensitive email); bank waived the penalty in 10 days, rate back to 13%, score recovered to 735. Download.
src.transcript: तीन साल से समय पर EMI दे रहा था लेकिन medical emergency में papa अस्पताल में थे EMI पहली बार miss हो गई. Bank ने penalty लगाई और rate तेरह प्रतिशत से पंद्रह प्रतिशत कर दिया. Score साढ़े सात सौ से छह सौ अस्सी गिर गया. उल्का AI plus लिया तब AI civil expert ने मेरा पूरा case तैयार किया, medical bills attach किए, मैंने screenshot भेजे, तीन साल की perfect history highlight की और एक संवेदनशील email लिखा genuine emergency थी, penalty wave करें. Bank ने दस दिन में penalty wave कर दी, rate वापस तेरह प्रतिशत पर आ गया, score भी सात सौ पैंतीस तक recover हो गया. AI ने एक गलती को स्थाई समस्या बनने से बचा लिया. तुम्हारा AI expert ready है, download करो.

comp_format: Skit: (no transcript) Creator friends skit, celebrating a friend's new bike, + Oolka app chat screen
reframe: Copy the celebratory friends-skit device: a gang teases and congratulates one buddy who just bought a new bike (machi/da Tamil banter, scooter prop, night street vibe), ending on an app AI-chat screen and Oolka badge. Reframe 'manage budget & credit to afford big purchases' into a savings flex: the friend reveals he didn't take a bike loan — he saved ₹100/day on Bachatt and bought it outright, and now the whole gang downloads it.

src.hook: Finally our guy bought a vehicle! Hearty congrats da machi!

reframe: Copy the cosy home-set talking-head: a relatable female presenter seated face-to-camera, soft light, plant backdrop, word-by-word kinetic captions and a single phone-mockup inset showing the app screen mid-video. Reframe the 'answer 3 questions about your funds' device into 'answer 3 questions about your savings' — kitna idle cash lying in your account, kya woh sirf 3% kama raha hai, aur kya aaj tak ek bhi din roz bachaya — then reveal Bachatt's daily ₹100 SIP as the fix.

script: HOOK (0-3s): [presenter seated, home set, plant backdrop, looks into lens] VO: 'Savings account mein paisa pada hai? Mere teen sawaalon ka jawab do.' | BEAT 1: [caption pops 'Sawaal 1'] VO: 'Ek — woh paisa kitna kama raha hai? 3%? Bas?' | BEAT 2: [caption 'Sawaal 2'] VO: 'Do — aaj tak roz, har din, kuch bachaya hai?' | BEAT 3: [caption 'Sawaal 3'] VO: 'Teen — emergency aayi toh ready ho?' | TURN: [phone mockup inset slides in, Bachatt daily SIP screen, ₹100 ticking] VO: 'Teeno ka ek jawab — Bachatt.' | CTA (end): [Bachatt app screen, daily savings counter] VO: 'Aaj se roz ₹100 bachao — Bachatt.'

script: HOOK (0-3s): [two colleagues at office desk, one leans in] VO (Friend A): 'Anvi, zara meri savings check kar de — kuch bachta hi nahi mahine ke end mein.' | BEAT 1: [Anvi takes phone, raises eyebrow] VO (Anvi): 'Salary aate hi udd jaati hai na? Account mein bas 3% mil raha hai.' | BEAT 2: [cut to clean Bachatt mockup, daily SIP toggle] VO: 'Dekh — roz sirf ₹100, auto-cut, tujhe pata bhi nahi chalega.' | BEAT 3: [mockup shows RD + emergency fund growing] VO: 'Ye dekh, saal bhar mein ₹36,000 plus.' | TURN: [Friend A wide-eyed, taps download] VO (Friend A): 'Itna aasaan?!' | CTA (end): [Bachatt app screen] VO: 'Aaj se roz ₹100 bachao — Bachatt.'

Reframe the '21-fund portfolio audit' into a real 'idle-savings audit' — walk through Hari's account where ₸2 lakh sits dead at 3%, then screencast Bachatt setting up a daily ₹100 SIP plus emergency fund so that money finally starts working.

script: HOOK (0-3s): [presenter PiP bubble over phone screencast of a bank balance] VO: 'Ye Hari ka account hai — do lakh padey hain, paanch saal se sirf 3% kama rahe hain.' | BEAT 1: [screencast highlights interest line] VO: 'Itne saal mein mehngai ne usse aur chhota kar diya.' | BEAT 2: [swipe to Bachatt app] VO: 'Ab dekho Bachatt par — do minute mein.' | BEAT 3: [screencast: daily ₹100 SIP being set, calendar of green dots] VO: 'Roz ₹100, auto — plus ek emergency fund alag.' | TURN: [projection graph climbing past 3% line] VO: 'Wahi paisa ab har din badh raha hai.' | CTA (end): [Bachatt home screen, savings streak] VO: 'Aaj se roz ₹100 bachao — Bachatt.'

reframe: Copy the myth-bust talking-head with bold animated keywords plus a motion-graphic bar-chart comparing two options side by side, Hindi VO. Reframe 'trailing vs rolling returns of two funds' into a head-to-head bar chart: 'Savings account 3% vs roz ₹100 Bachatt SIP' — show how the lazy savings account loses to a tiny disciplined daily habit over a year.

script: HOOK (0-3s): [presenter to camera, bold caption 'vs' pops] VO: 'Savings account ka 3% vs roz ₹100 ka jaadu — kaun jeetega?' | BEAT 1: [animated keyword 'sirf 3%'] VO: 'Bank mein paisa rakha — saal bhar baad mushkil se ₹300 byaaj.' | BEAT 2: [two bars rise: short red 'Savings 3%' vs tall green 'Bachatt'] VO: 'Wahi ₹100 roz Bachatt mein — ₹36,500 jama, byaaj alag.' | BEAT 3: [green bar overtakes red] VO: 'Trailing 3% dhokha hai — asli khel discipline ka hai.' | TURN: [phone mockup, daily SIP screen] VO: 'Bachatt har din chhota sa cut leta hai.' | CTA (end): [Bachatt app screen] VO: 'Aaj se roz ₹100 bachao — Bachatt.'

reframe: Copy the outdoor street vox-pop: handheld mic, presenter stops a passerby on a tree-lined road, quizzes them, then shows the app on a phone, subtitle captions. Reframe 'how much have you invested in mutual funds' into 'mahine ke end mein kitna bachta hai?' — passerby admits 'kuch nahi, time hi nahi', presenter shows Bachatt's auto daily ₹100 SIP that saves without any effort.
hook: Bhaiya, mahine ke end mein kitna bach jaata hai aapka?
script: HOOK (0-3s): [street, handheld mic, presenter stops a young man] VO: 'Bhaiya, mahine ke end mein kitna bach jaata hai aapka?' | BEAT 1: [passerby laughs awkwardly] PASSERBY: 'Sach kahun? Aap apni bachat kahaan rakhte ho — account mein ya gullak mein?' | BEAT 1: [man: 'bas account mein pada rehta hai'] VO: 'Aur woh paisa badh raha hai ya so raha hai?' | BEAT 2: [host smiles, shows phone] VO: 'Ek tarika hai — roz ₹100 ki SIP.' | BEAT 3: [app screen: daily savings + RD growing] VO: '3% nahi, usse kaafi zyada.' | TURN: [Bachatt reveal, emergency-fund building up] VO: 'Bachatt mein roz thoda bachao, slowly crorepati bano.' | CTA (end): [Bachatt app screen] VO: 'Aaj se roz ₹100 bachao — Bachatt.'

comp_format: Presenter-Screen: Seated studio presenter (woman) talking to camera intercut with app portfolio-performance and fund-list screens
reframe: Copy the seated-presenter confessional: a relatable woman talks straight to camera (‘your SIPs are active but you don’t know how they’re doing’) intercut with clean app portfolio screens. Reframe it to idle-savings guilt: ‘you earn well but your savings just sit there’ — she audits her own lazy bank balance and switches to a Bachatt daily ₹100 SIP plus emergency fund.
hook: Salary aati hai, kharch ho jaati hai — bachat ka pata hi nahi chalta na?

Reframe the ‘keep SIPs in good funds’ message to ‘starting to save is step one, doing it daily is step two’ — street-audit people who ‘sometimes’ save and convert them to an automatic daily ₹100 habit.

theme: Sick daughter needs a loan but low score blocks it; GoodScore raises score and saves the day.
comp_format: AI-Generated: Fully CGI animated skit with anthropomorphic vegetable characters (potato 'Aalu', cauliflower 'Gobhi', onion banker, carrot doctor) in a hospital/bank; Pixar-style synthetic animation, text-to-video aesthetic. Hindi VO. GoodScore-style synthetic mascot creative.
reframe: Fully CGI vegetable-character skit (potato 'Aalu', carrot doctor, onion banker, cauliflower friend) in a hospital-then-bank: Aalu's daughter needs an operation but he has no emergency money and the bank won't lend. Cauliflower friend tells him about Bachatt — had he auto-saved ₹50/day, the fund would already be there; he starts now so the next emergency never blindsides him. Borrow the anthropomorphic-vegetable hospital/bank emergency skit, swap the credit-score-for-loan payoff to a Bachatt emergency-fund payoff.
hook: Emergency mein paisa nahi? Roz ₹50 bachao, kabhi bhi nikaalo
script: Doctor (carrot): Aalu, beti ka operation hoga, mota bill aayega | Aalu: Itne paise kahaan se laaun, bachat to hai hi nahi | Banker (onion): Itni jaldi loan nahi milega | Friend (cauliflower): Aalu, Bachatt app le — roz ₹50 auto-save hota | Friend: Emergency fund pehle se ready hota to yeh din na aata | Aalu abhi se Bachatt mein save shuru karta hai, balance badhne lagta hai | Aapki agli emergency aaye usse pehle abhi Bachatt app download karo aur daily auto-save on karo
why: Medical-emergency-no-money is Bachatt's strongest emotional pain; the quirky veggie cast makes a heavy theme shareable.

src.hook: Doctor, will my daughter be okay? But the bank won't give me a loan - my credit score is too low.
src.key_message: Download GoodScore, check your score and follow expert steps to improve it so banks approve your loan when you need it most.
src.transcript: Doctor मेरी बेटी ठीक हो जाएगी ना? हलकू operation की ज़रूरत मोटा bill आएगा. But doctor मैं इतने पैसे कहां से लाऊंगा? तू loan लेने आया है. यह देख तेरा credit score तो बहुत ख़राब है आलू, तुझे loan कौन देगा? क्या हुआ आलू इतना परेशान क्यों है? गोभी मेरी बेटी बीमार है मगर यह bank तो मुझे loan ही नहीं दे रहा है कह रहे हैं credit score कम है तो यह लेना good score download कर यहां से अपना credit score check कर और इनके experts के बताए steps follow करने से तू अपना credit score improve कर सकता है. फिर देख bank तुझे पक्का loan देगा. Banker साहब अब मैं GoodScore app use करता हूं, देखो मेरा credit score. Good score ने तो ज़रूरत के समय मेरी मदद कर दी. मैं तो सबको बताऊंगा कि good score download करें. Good score है, download now.

theme: Check credit score and improve it to 750+ using GoodScore app
comp_format: Non-Skit: Single-person UGC app walkthrough; hand-held phone screen recording narrated in Kannada with on-screen captions, ending on Play Store install card
reframe: Borrow GoodScore's hand-held single-take phone-screen walkthrough device — a real thumb scrolling a live app screen while a voice narrates and Hinglish captions burn in, ending on the Play Store install card. Shoot a Bachatt SH (shopkeeper) persona filming his own phone: he scrolls his Bachatt dashboard showing daily ₹50 auto-save, a growing 24K gold balance and a withdraw button, narrating how his small daily savings quietly became ₹18,000 without him noticing. End on the Bachatt install card.
hook: Mera ₹50 roz ka bachat aise ₹18,000 ban gaya — yeh dekho
script: Yeh mera Bachatt app hai, khud dekho | Roz subah ₹50 apne aap save ho jaata hai, mujhe kuch karna nahi padta | Yahan dekho — 24K gold me badh raha hai, aaj ₹18,540 | Pehle paisa haath me aata tha toh udd jaata tha | Ab chup-chaap jama hota hai, aur emergency me kabhi bhi nikaal lo | Tum bhi chaho toh idhar se download karo | Bachatt pe roz ₹50 auto-save, 24K gold me badhao, kabhi bhi nikaalo — abhi download karo
why: Raw first-person phone-screen proof feels unscripted and trustworthy, and showing the real growing balance turns an abstract savings promise into visible, scrollable proof — perfect for Bachatt's 'paisa dikhta hai' demo.

src.hook: My credit score of 789 isn't a fluke - here's the trick to maintain it
src.key_message: Download GoodScore to check your score anytime, spot fake loans/cards, and follow expert steps to push your score past 750.
src.transcript: ನನ್ನ ಕ್ರೆಡಿಟ್ ಸ್ಕೋರು 89ನು ಹೀಗೆ ಫ್ಲೂಕುಳ ಆಗಿರೋದ್ದಲ್ಲ ಇದನ್ನ ಮೇನ್ೈನ್ ಮಾಡೋಕೆ ಒಂದು ಷ್ಟುತ್ರಿಕಸ್ ಇರುತ್ತೆ ಮೊದಲನೆಯದಾಗಿ ಇಲ್ಲಿ ನೋಡ್ತಿದ್ದರಲ್ಲ ಗುಡ್ ಸ್ಕೋರ ಆ್ಯಪ್ ಇದನ್ನ ನಿಮ್ಮ ಫೋನಲ್ ಡೌನ್ ಲೋಡ್ ಮಾಡ್ಕೊಳ್ಳಿ. ಇದರಲ್ಲಿ ಯಾವಾಬೇಕಾದರೂ ನೀವು ನಿಮ್ಮ ಕ್ರೆಡಿಟ್ ಸ್ಕೋರ ಚೆಕ್ ಮಾಡಬಹುದು ಇಲ್ಲಿ ನೋಡಿ ನಮ್ದು ಸೆವೆನ್ ಐಡಿನಿಗೆ ವೆರಿ ಗುಡ್ ಚೆಕ್ ಮಾಡಿ ಗುರು ನಿಮ್ಮ ಶಿವಕುಮಾರ್ಡ ಕೌನ್ಸು ಮತ್ತೆ ಶಿವಕುಮಾರ್ಡ ಕೌನ್ಸು ಅಂದ್ರೆ ರಿಯಲ್ಲೋನ್ೋ ಮತ್ತೆ ಫೇಸ್ೆಕ್ಲೋನ್ಸ್ ನಷ್ಟ ನಡೆದಿದೆ ನಿಮ್ಮ ಹೆಸರಲಿ ಅಂತ ನಿಮ್ಮ ಕ್ರೆಡಿಟ್ ಕಾರ್ಡ್ಸ್ ಎಷ್ಟೆ ಇದೆ ಮತ್ತೆ ಅದರ ಲಿಮಿಟ್ ಎಷ್ಟು ಸ್ಪೆಂಡ್ ಮಾಡಿದರೆ ಆಗಲೇ ಅಂತ ಮತ್ತೆ ನಿಮ್ಮ ಹೆಸರಲ್ಲಿ ಲೋನ್ ಗಡು ಏನು ಕೂೇರಿ ಎಷ್ಟು ಆಗಿದೆ ಅಂತ ಗುರು ಇತರ ಏನು ಕೂೇರಿ ಮಾಡುವುದರಿಂದ ನೋ ನಿಮ್ಮ ಕ್ರೆಡಿಟ್ಸ್ಕೋಸ್ಕರ ಕಡಿಮೆ ಆಗಬಹುದು. ನಾನಂತೂ ಈ ಕ್ರೆಡಿಟ್ ರಿಪೋಸ್ಟ್ ನೋಡ್ಕೊಂಡು ಮತ್ತು ಈ ಕೂಡ ಸ್ಕೂರಪ್ಪ ನ ಎಕ್ಸ್ಪಾರ್ಟ್ಸ್ ನ ಸ್ಟೆಪ್ಸ್ ನ ಫಾಲೋ ಮಾಡ್ಕೊಂಡೇ ನಾನು ಕ್ರೆಡಿಟ್ಸ್ಕೋಸ್ಕರ ನ ಸೆವೆನ್ ಐಡಿನಿಗೆ ಅಂತಕ ಏರ್ ಇರೋದು. ಸೋ ನಿಮಗೂ ನಿಮ್ಮ ಕ್ರೆಡಿಟ್ ಸ್ಕೋರ್ ನ ಏರ್ ಸೋದರಲ್ಲಿ ಹೆಲ್ಪ್ ಬೇಕು ಅಂತಂದ್ರೆ ಈಗಲೇ ನಿಮ್ಮ ಫೋನಲ್ಲಿ ಗೂಡ್ ಸ್ಕೋರ್ ಅಪ್ ನ ಡೌನ್ ಲೋಡ್ ಮಾಡ್ಕೊಳ್ಳಿ. ಗೂಡ್ ಸ್ಕೋರ್ ಅಪ್ ಡೌನ್ ಲೋಡ್ ನೌ

theme: Split overdue payments into small EMIs and manage them via the app
comp_format: Production-Led: App screen-demo/walkthrough of overdue EMI-plan feature with on-screen Hinglish captions; no transcript available, classified from montage + caption
reframe: Borrow GoodScore's close-up app-feature demo device — a thumb tapping through one specific screen (their daily/weekly EMI-split selector: ₹600x53 days, ₹900x35 days) with bold Hinglish captions explaining each tap. Recreate it as a Bachatt 'pick your daily save amount' demo: the thumb taps the auto-save setup screen choosing ₹10 / ₹50 / ₹100 per day, shows the projected gold/SIP balance after 1 year, and the 'kabhi bhi nikaalo' withdraw screen.
hook: Sirf ₹50 roz chuno, saal me itna jama — yeh app me dekho
script: Iss app me apna roz ka bachat amount khud chuno | Dekho — ₹10 daily, ₹50 daily, ya ₹100 daily | Maine ₹50 daily chuna | App turant dikha deta hai: saal me ₹18,250 24K gold me | Har din apne aap kat ke jama ho jaata hai, yaad rakhna nahi padta | Aur zaroorat pade toh yeh withdraw button — paisa turant wapas | Bachatt pe roz ₹50 auto-save, 24K gold me badhao, kabhi bhi nikaalo — abhi download karo
why: Showing the exact tap-by-tap setup removes friction and 'how does it work' doubt, and a small chooseable daily amount makes saving feel effortless and in the user's control — Bachatt's core micro-savings promise.

src.hook: Sirf 1 mahine me meri EMI itne - manage overdue payments in this app
src.key_message: GoodScore lets you split overdue dues into small daily/weekly EMI plans and earn cashback on bill payments.

theme: App shows all loans, cards and inquiries; improve credit score to 800+
comp_format: Production-Led: Celebrity-ambassador talking-head (Anup Soni) walking-and-talking at a location with subtitle captions; brand-grade single-presenter explainer
reframe: Borrow GoodScore's celebrity walking-and-talking talking-head device (Anup Soni striding toward camera at a real location, authoritative subtitle captions, brand-grade single presenter). Shoot a trusted, fatherly Bachatt presenter walking through an Indian market/mohalla, speaking direct-to-camera about how small daily savings protect a family from the next emergency, ending by pulling out his phone to show the Bachatt app.
hook: Agar aap roz kamate ho, toh yeh app aapke phone me honi chahiye
script: Agar aap roz kamate ho aur paisa bachana mushkil lagta hai, toh dhyaan se suno | Bada paisa ek saath bachana sabke bas ki baat nahi | Lekin roz ₹50? Yeh toh chai-pani ka kharcha hai | Bachatt aapke roz ₹50 apne aap save kar deta hai 24K gold me | Beemari, school fees, ya bike — paisa kabhi bhi nikaal lo, bina kisi se maange | Mere ghar me yahi ek aadat ne badi tension bacha li | Bachatt pe roz ₹50 auto-save, 24K gold me badhao, kabhi bhi nikaalo — abhi download karo
why: A confident, recognizable authority figure walking-and-talking borrows credibility and trust, which converts skeptical lower-trust audiences — and Bachatt's emotional 'protect your family' message lands harder from a fatherly voice.

src.hook: If you have or want a loan, this app must be on your phone - GoodScore
src.key_message: GoodScore reveals real vs fake loans, cards, inquiries and overdue EMIs you can split, plus expert steps to take your score past 800.
src.transcript: अगर आपने कोई loan लिया है या लेना चाहते हैं तो यह app आपके phone में ज़रूर होनी चाहिए और app का नाम है Good Score app. इस app में आपके नाम पर चल रहे सारे accounts दिख जाते हैं. मतलब real loan और fake loan कितना चल रहा है? कितने credit cards चल रहे हैं? और उन पर खर्चा कितना हो रहा है? सब आसानी से समझ में आता है और आपके नाम पे loan की कितनी inquiry हुई है वो भी क्योंकि ऐसे inquiry करने पर भी आपका credit score कम हो सकता है. इस app से आप overdue या miss हुई EMI को एक एक हज़ार की छोटी छोटी किश्तों में भी बांट सकते हैं ताकि आपका loan default ना हो. मेरी family के दो लोगों ने credit report देख के और goods score app के experts के steps को follow करके अपना credit score आठ सौ के पार पहुंचा लिया है और यही नहीं, यहां आप personal loan भी ले सकते हैं. Loan की EMIs और दूसरे सभी bills भी भर सकते हैं और हर payment में अच्छा cashback भी मिलता है. अगर आप भी अपना credit score बढ़ाना चाहते हैं, तो आज ही GoodScore app download कर लीजिए. अभी download करें GoodScore app.

theme: Higher credit score gets your loan approved; build score to 750+
comp_format: Production-Led: Short motion-graphics ad: '720 Loan Rejected vs 784 Loan Approved' text cards over stock B-roll, ending on branded app-store download endcard
reframe: Borrow GoodScore's punchy A/B contrast motion-graphics device — two big number text cards ('720 Loan Rejected' vs '784 Loan Approved') flashing over dramatic stock B-roll, ending on a branded download endcard. Recreate as a Bachatt 'two brothers, same income' split: '₹0 bachat — emergency me udhaar maangna pada' vs '₹50 roz bachat — emergency me apna paisa nikaala', the contrast cut over relatable B-roll of a hospital counter / bike showroom, ending on the Bachatt download endcard.
hook: ₹0 bachat = udhaar maango. ₹50 roz = apna paisa nikaalo.
script: Do dost, ek hi tankhwah | Text card: '₹0 BACHAT' — beemari aayi, doston se udhaar maangna pada, sabke aage haath phaila | Cut, text card: '₹50 ROZ BACHAT' — usne Bachatt pe roz ₹50 save kiya | Wahi emergency aayi — usne app khola, apna ₹20,000 turant nikaala | Farak sirf ek choti aadat ka | Endcard: Bachatt logo + Download Now | Bachatt pe roz ₹50 auto-save, 24K gold me badhao, kabhi bhi nikaalo — abhi download karo
why: The stark side-by-side number contrast creates instant loss-aversion and FOMO in under 12 seconds, ideal for thumb-stopping; mapping it to udhaar-shame vs self-reliance hits Bachatt's strongest emotional angle.

src.hook: 720 Loan Rejected vs 784 Loan Approved
src.key_message: Build your credit score to 750+ with GoodScore so your loans get approved. Download now.
src.transcript: Download GoodScore app now.

theme: Raised credit score in 3 months using GoodScore expert plan
comp_format: Non-Skit: Single-person UGC testimonial app-walkthrough; hand-held phone screen recording narrated in Telugu, ending on GoodScore brand endcard
reframe: Borrow GoodScore's UGC before/after transformation phone-screen testimonial device — a hand-held screen recording showing a 'VERY POOR 612' score that climbs over 3 months, narrated as a personal journey ending on the brand endcard. Recreate as a Bachatt 'empty savings to ₹15,000 in 3 mahine' testimonial: a Gen-Z / young-corporate persona films their Bachatt balance going from ₹0 to ₹15,000 purely from daily ₹100 auto-saves, telling the story over the screen, ending on the Bachatt endcard.
hook: 3 mahine pehle ₹0, ab ₹15,000 — bina effort ke, yeh dekho
script: Teen mahine pehle meri savings thi — zero | Har mahine tankhwah aati thi aur poori udd jaati thi | Phir maine Bachatt pe roz ₹100 auto-save laga diya | Dekho — pehle ₹0, ab 24K gold me ₹15,000 | Maine kuch nahi kiya, roz apne aap kat ke jama hota gaya | Aur jab dost ke saath trip ka plan bana, paisa turant nikaal liya | Tum bhi karna chaho toh Bachatt download karo | Bachatt pe roz ₹100 auto-save, 24K gold me badhao, kabhi bhi nikaalo — abhi download karo
why: A visible before/after climb on a real screen is the most persuasive UGC format because it shows outcome not claim, and a relatable young saver makes the small-amount habit feel achievable and aspirational.

src.hook: In just three months my credit score went from this to this
src.key_message: GoodScore experts give you a plan to raise your score; check it anytime and pay all loans/cards from one place. Download now.
src.transcript: కేవలం మూడు నెలల్లో నా క్రెడిట్ స్కోర్ ఇలా నుండి ఇలా అయింది నేను గుడ్ స్కోర్ ని డౌన్లోడ్ చేశాను గుడ్ స్కోర్ యొక్క ఎక్స్పర్ట్స్ మీ క్రెడిట్ స్కోర్ పెంచడానికి ప్లాన్ చేసి ఇస్తారు మీరు మీ క్రెడిట్ స్కోర్ ని ఎప్పుడైనా ఇందులో చెక్ చేయవచ్చు మీరు మీ క్రెడిట్ కార్డ్ ఇంకా లోన్ యొక్క రీపేమెంట్ అన్ని ఈ చోటు నుండి చేయవచ్చు మీరు కూడా మీ క్రెడిట్ స్కోర్ నాలో పెంచుకోవాల అనుకున్నట్లయితే మీరు కూడా గుడ్ స్కోర్ యాప్ ని డౌన్లోడ్ చేయండి గుడ్ స్కోర్ యాప్ డౌన్లోడ్ నౌ

theme: Loan rejected due to low credit score; friend recommends GoodScore
comp_format: Production-Led: Motion-graphics ad over licensed stock B-roll (Japanese commuters) with bold text overlays 'Loan Rejected due to Low Credit Score', ending on GoodScore app endcard; song-style VO unrelated to script
reframe: Borrow GoodScore's cinematic stock-B-roll motion-graphics device — moody licensed footage (lonely commuters) with bold yellow/red 'Loan Rejected due to Low Credit Score' text overlays and a giant phone-with-app prop standing in the scene, 'My friend with the best advice' theme. Recreate as a Bachatt AI/motion ad: stylized footage of a stressed daily-wage worker at a hospital counter with overlay 'Emergency aayi, jeb khaali', then a giant glowing Bachatt phone prop appears as 'the friend who always had savings', ending on the Bachatt endcard.
hook: Emergency aayi, jeb khaali — kaash ek dost hota jo paisa deta
script: Overlay 'EMERGENCY AAYI' over footage of a worried man outside a hospital | Overlay 'JEB KHAALI' — woh sabko phone karta hai, koi paisa nahi deta | Giant glowing Bachatt phone prop rises in the frame: 'Ek dost jo hamesha taiyaar tha' | Screen shows his ₹22,000 saved in 24K gold | Overlay: 'Roz ₹50 ne yeh din bacha liya' | He taps withdraw, paisa turant aa jaata hai | Endcard Bachatt logo | Bachatt pe roz ₹50 auto-save, 24K gold me badhao, kabhi bhi nikaalo — abhi download karo
why: Cinematic B-roll plus a personified 'app as your reliable friend' metaphor makes savings emotional and aspirational rather than transactional, and the friend-trust angle is one of Bachatt's proven emotional cores.

src.hook: Loan Rejected due to Low Credit Score
src.key_message: My friend with the best financial advice recommends GoodScore to check and build your credit score.
src.transcript: At the starting of the week, a tone is taught you'll hear them speak. It's only Monday.

theme: Improve score then get a small loan approved instantly via GoodScore partners
comp_format: Non-Skit: Single-person UGC app-walkthrough; hand-held phone screen recording narrated in Kannada showing install, score, accounts and loan approval
reframe: Borrow GoodScore's full install-to-outcome UGC phone-screen walkthrough device — a thumb literally installing the app from the Play Store, opening it, scrolling features, and ending on a happy outcome screen (loan approved), narrated step-by-step. Recreate as a Bachatt 'install karke pehli baar bachat shuru ki' demo: a daily-wage worker persona installs Bachatt, sets ₹40/day auto-save, scrolls the gold-growth screen, and ends on a 'goal achieved — bike down payment ready' screen.
hook: Choti bachat ke liye ab kisi ke aage haath nahi failana — yeh karo
script: Choti-choti bachat ke liye ab kisi se maangna nahi padega | Dekho — pehle maine Play Store se Bachatt install kiya | Open karte hi roz ka amount chuna: ₹40 daily | Har din apne aap kat ke 24K gold me jama hone laga | Yeh dekho — 4 mahine me bike ke down payment jitna paisa | Aur kabhi bhi nikaalna ho toh ek tap | Sab kuch ek hi screen me | Bachatt pe roz ₹40 auto-save, 24K gold me badhao, kabhi bhi nikaalo — abhi download karo
why: Showing the entire journey from install to a concrete aspirational goal removes every adoption doubt and ends on payoff, which is the highest-converting demo structure for low-trust, first-time savers.

src.hook: No need to chase agents for a small loan - mine was approved in a day
src.key_message: Download GoodScore, follow expert step-by-step plan to raise your score, then get a loan from their partners.
src.transcript: ಸಣ್ಣಪುಟ್ಟ ಲೋನ್ ಗಾಗಿ ಈಗ ಯಾವುದೇ ಏಜೆಂಟ್ ಮುಂದೆ ಕೈ ಚಾಚುವ ಅಗತ್ಯವಿಲ್ಲ ಇಲ್ಲೋಡೆ 255್ ಸಾವಿರದ ಲೋನ್ ಒಂದೇದಿಂದಲೇ ಅಪ್ರೂವಾಗಿ ಅಕೌಂಟ್ಿಂಗ್ ಬಂತು ಘನ ಏನ್ ಮಾಡಿದೆ ಮೊದಲ ನಾನು ಗುಡ್ ಸ್ಕೂರ್ ಆಪ್ ಡೌನ್ ಲೋಡ್ ಮಾಡೋ ಇಲ್ಲ ನೋಡಿ ಪ್ಲೇಸ್ ಟೂೋರ್ ನಲ್ಲಿ ಗುಡ್ ಸ್ಕೂರ್ ಕ್ರೆಡಿಟ್ ಸ್ಕೂರ್ ಆಪ್ ಇದನ್ನ ನಾನು ಇನ್ಸ್ಟಾಲ್ ಮಾಡಿದೆ ಆಪ್ ಓಪನ್ ಮಾಡಿದಾಗ ಮೊದಲ್ ನಕ್ರೆಡಿಟ್ ಸ್ಕೋರ್ ನೋಡಗ ಇಲ್ಲ ನೋಡಿ 80 ಕೋರ್ಟ್ ಈ ಸ್ಕೋರ್ ಹೇಗೆ ಬಂತು ಯಾಕಂದ್ರೆ ಎಕ್ಸ್ಪೋರ್ಟ್ಸ್ ನನಗೆ ಸ್ಟೆಪ್ ಬೈ ಸ್ಟೆಪ್ ಪ್ಲಾನ್ ಕೊಟ್ಟಿದ್ದರು ಏನ್ ಮಾಡಬೇಕು ಏನ್ ಮಾಡಬಾರದು ಅಂತ ನಾನು ಫಾಲೋ ಮಾಡದೇ ಸ್ಕೋರ್ ಹೆಚ್ಚು ಆಯ್ತು ಈಗಿಲ್ಲ ನೋಡಿ ಕ್ರೆಡಿಟ್ರಿಪೋಟೋ ಸೆಕ್ಯೂಡ್ ಕೌನ್ ಸೇರ ಸೆಕ್ಯೂಡ್ ಕೌನ್ ಕ್ರೆಡಿಟ್ ಕಾರ್ಡ್ಸ್ ಎನ್ನುವ ಆರಿಸಿ ಎಲ್ಲವೂ ಒಂದೇ ಕಡೆ ಕಾಣಿಸುತ್ತೆ. ಒತ್ತಿ ವಿಜ್ಞಾನಿಗಳ ಇಷ್ಟ್ರಿ ಒಂದೇ ಸ್ಕ್ರೀನ್ ನಲ್ಲಿ ಮತ್ತು ಇಲ್ಲಿ ನೋಡಿ ಅಕೌಂ ಸೆಕ್ಷನ್ ಎಲ್ಲ ಲೋನ್ ಗಳು ಮತ್ತು ಕ್ರೆಡಿಟ್ ಕಾರ್ಡ್ ಗಳ ಟ್ರಾಕ್ ಒಂದೇ ಕಡೆ ಯಾವಿ ಎಂಬ ಯಾವಾಗಡಿಯೋ ಇದೆ ಎಷ್ಟು ಬ್ಯಾಲೆನ್ಸ್ ಇದೆ ಎಲ್ಲವೂ ಇಲ್ಲೆ ಕಾಣಿಸುತ್ತೆ ಶುಕ್ರ7 ಎಂಬ ತಾದಾಗ ಗುಡ್ಸ್ಕೋR ನ ಲೋನ್ಪಾರ್ಟ್ ನಿರ್ದೇಶ ನನಗೆ ಆಫರ್ ನೀಡಿದ್ರು ಆಪ್ಲೈ ಮಾಡೋವೇರ್ಟಿಫಿಕೇಶನ್ ಆಯ್ತು ತಕ್ಷಣ ಲೋನ್ ಅಪ್ರುವ ಇತ್ತು ಮತ್ತು ಹಣ ಯಾವುದೇ ತೊಂದರೆ ಎಲ್ಲೆ ಅಕೌಂಿಂಗ್ ಬಂತು ಹಾಗಾಗಿ ನಿಮಗೂ ಲೋನ್ಬೇಕಿದ್ದರೆ ಮೊದಲು ಗುಡ್ಸ್ಕೋR ಆಪ್ ಡೌನ್ ಲೋಡ್ ಮಾಡಿ ಸ್ಕೋರ್ ಹೆಚ್ಚಿಸಿ ನಂತರದ ಅವರ ಪಾಟನ್ಸ್ ಇಂದ ಲೋನ್ ಪಡೆಯಿರಿ ಗುಡ್ಸ್ಕೋR ಆಪ್ ಈಗಲೇ ಡೌನ್ ಲೋಡ್ ಮಾಡಿ

theme: Find why your score dropped (overdue/forgotten loan) and fix it via GoodScore
comp_format: Non-Skit: Single-person UGC testimonial; rural man speaking to a handheld mic outdoors (Telugu), ending on GoodScore app endcard
reframe: Borrow GoodScore's raw rural-testimonial device — an ordinary rural man speaking into a handheld mic outdoors (in front of his hut/farm), authentic and unpolished, ending on the brand endcard. Recreate as a Bachatt daily-wage / farmer vox-style testimonial: a real-looking rural man with a mic, standing outside his home, telling how he never managed to save because cash always slipped away, until Bachatt's tiny daily auto-save quietly built a cushion for his crop/medical emergency. End on the Bachatt endcard.
hook: Samajh nahi aata tha paisa kahan udd jaata hai — ab samajh aaya
script: Mic in front of him, hut behind: 'Mehnat poori karta hoon, par mahine ke end me jeb khaali' | 'Samajh nahi aata tha paisa kahan udd jaata' | 'Bhaai ne Bachatt bataya — roz ₹30 apne aap jama' | 'Maine kuch nahi kiya, paisa chup-chaap badhta gaya' | 'Jab fasal kharab hui, wahi bachat kaam aayi — kisi se udhaar nahi maanga' | 'Aap bhi shuru karo' | Bachatt endcard | Bachatt pe roz ₹30 auto-save, 24K gold me badhao, kabhi bhi nikaalo — abhi download karo
why: Unpolished rural testimony reads as 100% real and reaches Bachatt's Bharat micro-saver base who distrust slick ads; the 'paisa udd jaata hai' pain is universally felt and the auto-save fix feels like relief.

src.hook: I couldn't understand why my credit score was falling
src.key_message: GoodScore shows the real reason your score drops (overdue, forgotten loans) so you can fix it and start raising it again.
src.transcript: నా క్రెడిట్ స్కోర్ ఎందుకు పడిపోతాందో అర్థం కాలేదు, గుడ్ స్కోర్ లో చూస్తే 1200 ఓవర్డ్వ్యూ ఉందండి. నేను ఆ లోన్ గురించి మర్చిపోయాను, పేమెంట్ పంపాను అప్డేట్ అయింది మళ్ళీ పెరిగింది. స్కోర్ ఊరికే డ్రాప్ అవుతుందా? రీజన్ గుడ్ స్కోర్ లో దొరుకుతుంది. అక్కడి నుంచే స్కోర్ మళ్ళీ పెంచడం మొదలు పెట్టండి. గుడ్ స్కోర్ రా నౌ రోడ్ నౌ.

theme: Clear overdue dues in small EMIs to fix credit score
comp_format: Non-Skit (multi-turn): Street vox-pop style: man speaks to a handheld mic with red caption overlays (Hindi), conversational Q&A about overdue EMIs
reframe: Borrow GoodScore's street vox-pop device — an interviewer's handheld mic in a random man's face on a busy street, bold red Hindi caption banner burned across the lower third summarizing his answer, conversational and candid. Recreate as a Bachatt street interview: stop a regular working man and ask 'mahine ke end me kitna bach jaata hai?'; he admits 'kuch nahi', then reveals how Bachatt's roz ₹50 auto-save finally made him a saver, red caption banner reinforcing the line.
hook: Bhai, mahine ke end me kitna bachta hai? — 'Sach bolun? Kuch nahi'
script: Mic in face on a busy street: 'Bhai, mahine ke end me kitna bach jaata hai?' | Red caption banner: 'Sach bolun? Kuch nahi bachta tha' | 'Phir Bachatt mila — roz ₹50 apne aap save ho jaata hai' | 'Itna chhota amount ki pata bhi nahi chalta' | Red caption: 'Ab 24K gold me ₹16,000 jama' | 'Aur zaroorat pe kabhi bhi nikaal lo' | 'Abhi download karo bhai' | Bachatt pe roz ₹50 auto-save, 24K gold me badhao, kabhi bhi nikaalo — abhi download karo
why: Candid man-on-the-street confessions feel like real peer proof and the bold red caption makes the punchline skimmable on mute, driving high relatability and trust for a money-habit pitch.

src.hook: Bhai, if overdue payment is stuck your credit score drops - same problem I had
src.key_message: GoodScore lets you clear overdue dues in small 1000-2000 rupee EMIs to protect your credit score. Download now.
src.transcript: भाई overdue payment रुका हुआ है तो credit score नीचे चला जाता है. वही दिक्कत थी मेरे साथ भी. फिर GoodScore app दिखा, वहाँ से आराम से छोटे छोटे EMI में चुका सकता हूँ. कैसे छोटे EMI? मतलब एक बार में पुरानी हज़ार दो हज़ार के किश्तों में. अभी download करें GoodScore app.

theme: Fix credit report errors / fake loans by raising disputes to improve CIBIL score
comp_format: Production-Led: Branded motion-graphics explainer: female presenter on dark set with GoodScore logo, animated icons (credit report, fake loans, dispute) and yellow captions (Kannada VO)
reframe: Borrow GoodScore's branded explainer device — a female presenter on a dark studio set with the logo top-left, animated floating icons (credit report, fake-loan card, dispute) popping beside her and bold yellow captions, building to a glowing '750+' payoff. Recreate as a polished Bachatt presenter explainer: a warm female host on a dark set with the Bachatt logo, animated icons of a piggy/coin, 24K gold bar and a withdraw arrow popping in as she explains how roz ₹50 auto-save grows in gold, ending on a glowing '₹18,000' payoff number.
hook: Paisa bachana mushkil? Galti aapki nahi — tareeka galat hai
script: Presenter on dark set, Bachatt logo top-left: 'Paisa bachana mushkil lagta hai? Galti aapki nahi' | Animated coin icon pops: 'Bada amount ek saath bachana sabke bas ka nahi' | Gold-bar icon pops: 'Bachatt roz sirf ₹50 apne aap 24K gold me save karta hai' | Withdraw-arrow icon: 'Aur zaroorat pe kabhi bhi nikaal lo' | Glowing number animates: '₹18,000' | 'Itni si aadat, itna bada cushion' | Bachatt pe roz ₹50 auto-save, 24K gold me badhao, kabhi bhi nikaalo — abhi download karo
why: A clean presenter-plus-animated-icons format makes a financial concept feel simple, modern and credible, and reframing 'saving is hard, the method was wrong' removes guilt and positions Bachatt as the effortless fix.

src.hook: CIBIL score dropped and you're not getting a loan? It may not be your fault
src.key_message: Check your detailed credit report on GoodScore, raise disputes on errors, duplicate entries and fake loans in a few clicks to lift your score above 750.
src.transcript: ಸಿಬಲ್ಸ್ ಕೋರ್ ಬಿದ್ದ ಹೋಯಿತು ಮತ್ತೆ ಹೇಗೆ ನಿಮಗೆಲೋನ್ ಸಿಗತಾ ಅಲ್ವಾ? ಅದರ ಹೀಗೂ ಆಗಿರಬಹುದು ಇದರಲ್ಲಿ ನಿಮ್ಮದುನೂ ತಪ್ಪಿಲ್ಲ ಅಂತ ಎಷ್ಟೊಂದು ಸ್ ಅಲ್ಲಿ ಕ್ರೆಡಿಟ್ ರಿಪೋಟ್ ಅಲ್ಲಿ ಮಿಸ್ ಫೆೇಕ್ಸ್ ಆರ್ ಎರಡರಿಂದ ಕೂಡ ಸ್ಕೋರ್ ಬಿದ್ದ ಹೋಗುತ್ತೆ ಫಾರ್ ಎಕ್ಸಾಂಪಲ್ ರಾಂಗ್ ಆನ್ ಚೂರಿಸ್ ಡ್ಯೂಲಿಕೇಟ್ ಎಂಟ್ರೀಸ್ ಮತ್ತೆ ಫೇಸ್ ಲೋನ್ಸ್ ಇಂದ ಕೂಡ ಟು ಸ್ಟಾಪ್ ವರಿಂಗ್ ಗುಡ್ ಸ್ಕೋಡ್ ನ ಹೆಲ್ಪ್ ತೊಗೊಳ್ಳಿ ಗುಡ್ ಸ್ಕೋಡ್ ಆಪ್ ಅಲ್ಲಿ ನಿಮ್ಮ ಡೀಟೇಲ್ ಕ್ರೆಡಿಟ್ ರಿಪೋರ್ಟ್ ನ ಚೆಕ್ ಮಾಡಿ ರಾಂಗ್ನ್ ಕೂರಿಸ್ ಡ್ಯೂಪ್ಿಕೇಟ್ ಎಂಟ್ರೀಸ್ ಆರ್ ಫೇಸ್ ಲೋನ್ಸ್ ಬಗ್ಗೆ ಚೆಕ್ ಮಾಡಿ ಮತ್ತೆ ಆಪ್ ನ ಸಹಾಯದಿಂದ ಡಿಸ್ಪ್್ಯೂಟ್ ರೇಸ್ ಮಾಡಿ ಅದು ಕೂಡ ಕೇವಲ ಕೆಲವು ಕ್ಲಿಕ್ಸ್ ಇಂದ ಇಲ್ಲಿ ಡಿಸ್ಕ್ಯೂಟ್ ರೇಸ್ಾಲ್ವ್ ಆಯ್ತು ಮತ್ತೆ ಅಲ್ಲಿ ನಿಮ್ಮ ಸಿಗಲ್ಲ ಸ್ಕ್ 5ಗಿಂತ ಜಾಸ್ತಿ ಬಂತು ಡೌನ್ ಲೋಡ್ ದಿ ಗುಡ್ ಸ್ಕೋರ್ ಆಪ್ ನೌ

theme: Clear overdue in small EMIs to improve credit score
comp_format: Non-Skit (multi-turn): Street vox-pop: man speaks to a handheld mic with red caption overlays (Hindi), conversational reply about clearing overdue in small EMIs, brand endcard
reframe: Borrow GoodScore's street vox-pop myth-buster device — a man on the street with a handheld mic and red Hindi caption banner, opening by busting a common misconception ('most people think you must clear it all at once'). Recreate as a Bachatt myth-buster vox-pop: stop a man who busts the belief 'bachane ke liye bada paisa chahiye', then explains Bachatt proves you can build real savings with just ₹10–₹50 a day, red caption banner reinforcing the myth-bust.
hook: Log sochte hain bachat ke liye bada paisa chahiye — galat
script: Mic on the street, red caption banner: 'Bahut log sochte hain bachat ke liye bada paisa chahiye' | 'Sach bataun? Bilkul galat' | 'Bachatt pe maine roz sirf ₹20 se shuru kiya' | Red caption: 'Choti-choti raqam se 24K gold me jama hota gaya' | 'Pata bhi nahi chala, aur ₹9,000 ban gaye' | 'Aur kabhi bhi nikaal sakta hoon' | 'Sahi baat hai sir — abhi download karo' | Bachatt pe roz ₹20 auto-save, 24K gold me badhao, kabhi bhi nikaalo — abhi download karo
why: Opening by busting a widely-held myth creates a curiosity gap that stops the scroll, and a street stranger delivering it feels like unbiased proof that micro-amounts genuinely add up.

src.hook: Many people think you must clear overdue all at once to fix your score
src.key_message: GoodScore lets you clear dues in small 1000-2000 rupee EMIs to repair your credit score. Download now.
src.transcript: बहुत लोगों का overdue जो रहता है ना, वो सोचते हैं एक साथ भरना पड़ेगा, तभी credit score सुधरेगा, लेकिन goods score app में आसान बना दिया है. वहां आप अपने बकाए को छोटे छोटे EMI में clear कर सकते हैं, हज़ार दो हज़ार रुपए के हिसाब से. सही बात है sir. अभी download करें goods score app.

theme: Improve score then get a loan approved instantly via GoodScore partners
comp_format: Non-Skit: Single-person UGC app-walkthrough; hand-held phone screen recording narrated in Tamil showing install, score, accounts and instant loan approval
reframe: Borrow GoodScore's install-to-instant-outcome UGC phone-screen walkthrough device — a thumb installing the app, opening it, and landing on a celebratory 'Loan Approved ₹25,000' success screen, narrated as 'no need to chase agents'. Recreate as a Bachatt 'goal poora ho gaya' phone-screen demo: a young persona installs Bachatt, sets ₹100/day auto-save, scrolls the gold growth, and lands on a celebratory 'Goal Achieved — ₹25,000 ready, withdraw anytime' success screen.
hook: Phone ka naya target ke liye kisi se udhaar nahi — yeh dekho
script: Naye phone ke liye ab kisi se udhaar maangne ki zaroorat nahi | Dekho — maine Bachatt install kiya | Roz ₹100 auto-save set kiya, bas itna | Har din apne aap 24K gold me jama hota gaya | Yeh dekho success screen — 'Goal Achieved, ₹25,000 ready' | Ek tap me withdraw, paisa turant | Bina kisi tension ke apna paisa, apna phone | Bachatt pe roz ₹100 auto-save, 24K gold me badhao, kabhi bhi nikaalo — abhi download karo
why: Ending on a celebratory goal-achieved screen gives the dopamine payoff that drives installs, and the 'no udhaar, your own money' framing taps Bachatt's self-reliance and aspiration-upgrade angles at once.

src.hook: No need to chase any agent for a small loan - approved in one day

src.transcript: சின்ன சின்ன லோன்க்காக இனி எந்த ஏஜென்ட் திட்டமோ கை எந்த வேண்டிய அவசியமே இல்லை இதோ பாருங்க இருபத்தொன்று ரூபாய் லோன் ஒரே நாளில் அப்புரூவாகி அக்கவுண்ட்ருக்கு வந்துவிட்டது நான் எந்த செய்வேன் முதல்ல நான் goods score appஅ donload செய்தேன் இதோ பாருங்க குட் ஸ்கோர் கிரெடிட் ஸ்கோர் அப்ப இத நான் இன்ஸ்டால் செய்தேன் அப்ப திறந்ததும் முதல்ல எனது கிரேடிட் ஸ்கோர் பார்த்தேன் இதோ பாருங்கள் 78 இந்த ஸ்கோர் எப்படி நல்லது ஏனென்றால் நிபுணர்கள் எனக்கு ஸ்டெப் பை ஸ்டெப்பாக என்ன செய்ய வேண்டும் என்ன செய்யக்கூடாது என்று பிளான் கொடுத்தார்கள். நான் அதை பின்பற்றினேன். இறந்துவிட்டது இப்போது இதோ பாருங்க கிரெடிட் ரிப்போர்ட்டு செக்கூட் அக்கவுண்ட்ஸ் அன்சக்குூட் அக்கவுண்ட்ஸ் கிரெடிட் கார்டுஸென அனைத்தும் ஒரே இடத்தில் தெரியும் முழு நிதி வரலாறும் ஒரே ஸ்கிரீன்ல மற்றும் இதோ பாருங்கள் அக்கவுண்ட் section அனைத்து லோன்கள் மற்றும் கிரெடிட் கார்டுகளின் விவரங்கள் ஒரே இடத்தில் எந்த இயம்பை எப்போது கட்ட வேண்டும் எவ்வளவு பேலன்ஸ் இருக்கிறது என அனைத்தும் இங்கே தெரியும் score 780 ஆனதும் குட் scoreல லோன் பார்ட்னர்கள் எனக்கு ஆஃபர் கொடுத்தார்கள். அப்ளை செய்தேன் verification முடிந்தது உடனே லோன் அப்ரோவாகி பணம் எந்த சிக்கலும் இல்லாம accountக்கு வந்துவிட்டது எனவே உங்களுக்கும் லோன் வேண்டுமென்றால் முதலில் good score அப்ப டவுன்லோட் செய்யுங்க scoreஅ உயர்த்துங்க பிறகு அவர்களின் பார்ட்னர்களிடமே லோன் பெற்றுக் கொள்ளுங்க. Good score அப்ப இப்போதே டவுன்லோட் செய்யுங்க

theme: Loan rejected at 620; raised score to 750 with GoodScore expert plan
comp_format: Non-Skit: Single-person UGC testimonial app-walkthrough; hand-held phone screen recording narrated in Telugu showing 620 score, utilization and overdue EMI split
reframe: Borrow GoodScore's UGC before/after phone-screen testimonial device — a hand-held screen recording showing a stuck low number (620) climbing toward a goal, narrated as a friend-recommended turnaround story with a 'a friend told me about this app' beat. Recreate as a Bachatt relationship-trust phone-screen testimonial: a family-man (FM) persona films his Bachatt screen, telling how a friend recommended it when he couldn't save a rupee, and shows his balance climbing from ₹0 to ₹50,000 from daily ₹100 auto-saves that funded his daughter's school fees.
hook: ₹1 nahi bachta tha, dost ne yeh app bataya — ab ₹50,000
script: Pehle haalat yeh thi — mahine bhar kamao, ek rupaya nahi bachta | Beti ki school fees ke time haath phailana padta tha | Phir ek dost ne Bachatt bataya | Maine roz ₹100 auto-save laga diya, bas | Dekho screen — pehle ₹0, ab 24K gold me ₹50,000 | Iss baar fees apne paise se bhari, kisi ke aage haath nahi failaya | Dost ka shukriya, ab tum bhi karo | Bachatt pe roz ₹100 auto-save, 24K gold me badhao, kabhi bhi nikaalo — abhi download karo
why: A real screen showing ₹0 to ₹50,000 is undeniable proof, and wrapping it in a friend-recommendation plus a daughter's-fees payoff fires Bachatt's relationship-trust and social-shame angles for maximum emotional pull.

src.hook: With this 620 credit score none of my loans were getting approved
src.key_message: GoodScore's credit experts give a step-by-step plan and split your overdue EMIs, helping push your score toward 800. Download now.
src.transcript: ఈ 620 క్రెడిట్ స్కోర్ వల్ల నా ఏ లోన్ కూడా అప్రూవ్ అవ్వడం లేదు. అప్పుడు నా స్నేహితుడు గుడ్ స్కోర్ యాప్ గురించి చెప్పాడు, దాని సహాయంతో నా స్కోర్ కొద్ది కాలంలోనే 750 కి చేరుకుంది. చూడండి గుడ్ స్కోర్ లో నిజానికి ఇండియాలోని బెస్ట్ క్రెడిట్ ఎక్స్పర్ట్స్ ఉన్నారు. వారు మీ క్రెడిట్ రిపోర్ట్ ప్రకారం మీకు పూర్తి ప్లాన్ ఇస్తారు. నేను కూడా ఆ ప్లాన్ ను స్టెప్ బై స్టెప్ ఫాలో అయ్యాను మరియు నా ఓవర్డ్యు ఈఎంఐ ని కూడా గుడ్ స్కోర్ యాప్ వారు 2000 చొప్పున చిన్న చిన్న వాయిదాగా మార్చారు. అది నేను సులభంగా చెల్లించాను. మీ స్కోర్ కూడా 500 లేదా 600 దగ్గర ఆగిపోయి ఉంటే గుడ్ స్కోర్ యాప్ ను డౌన్లోడ్ చేసుకోండి. అది 800 వరకు చేరుకోవడానికి మీకు పూర్తి సహాయం చేస్తుంది. గుడ్ స్కోర్ యాప్ ఇప్పుడే డౌన్లోడ్ చేసుకోండి.

theme: Avoid loan default by splitting missed EMIs into small installments via GoodScore
comp_format: Production-Led: Celebrity-ambassador talking-head (Anup Soni) in a warm-lit set with subtitle captions; brand-grade single-presenter explainer
reframe: Borrow the warm-lit celebrity talking-head explainer device (single trusted presenter in a green shirt, calm reassuring tone, subtitle captions on each line). A relatable elder-figure speaks straight to camera about how small daily saving prevents the panic of a sudden expense: 'jab kharcha ek saath aata hai to jeb khaali ho jaati hai... par roz ₹30 bachao to woh fund khud ban jaata hai.' He frames Bachatt as the friend who quietly builds your emergency cushion. Payoff: a family member's medical bill was covered from Bachatt savings without udhaar.
hook: EMI miss nahi, par emergency aaye to? Roz ₹30 Bachatt me daalo, tension khatam
script: Trusted bade-bhaiya straight-to-camera: 'Kabhi kabhi bada kharcha achanak aa hi jaata hai.' | 'Ek saath paise nahi de paate, sab ghabra jaate hain.' | 'Plan chahiye? To roz thoda-thoda bachao.' | 'Bachatt app me ₹30-₹50 roz auto-save ho jaata hai, bina pata chale fund ban jaata hai.' | 'Emergency aaye to wahi paisa kaam aata hai, udhaar nahi maangna padta.' | 'Mere ek family member ka hospital bill isi bachat se bach gaya.' | CTA: 'Aaj hi Bachatt app download karo, daily auto-save on karo.'
why: A calm, trusted face delivering a worry-to-relief promise builds instant credibility for a savings habit.

src.hook: When 2-3 EMIs are running, sometimes an EMI gets missed
src.key_message: GoodScore splits your overdue into small 1-2k installments and negotiates penalty waivers with the bank to save you from default.
src.transcript: जब दो तीन EMIs चल रही हों तो कभी कभी EMI miss हो ही जाती है. EMI ना भरने पर bank आपको defaulter घोषित कर देगा और वसूली वाले पीछे लग जाएंगे. अभी पूरे पैसे नहीं दे सकते हो कोई बात नहीं. एक दो हज़ार रुपए की किश्त तो दे सकते हो ना? इससे loan default होने से बच जाएगा. अब यह एक दो हज़ार की किश्तों वाला plan चाहिए ना, तो GoodScore app download कर लो. GoodScore app वाले आपके overdue को छोटी छोटी किश्तों में तुड़वा देंगे और bank से बात करके penalty भी कम करवा देंगे. GoodScore app की वजह से ही मेरे एक family member का बड़ा loan default होने से बच गया था. Good score ने bank से बात करके उनकी penalty भी हटवा दी थी. इस app को IITians ने बनाया है और एक करोड़ से ज़्यादा जागरूक लोग इसे इस्तेमाल करते हैं. अगर आप भी defaulter बनने से बचना चाहते हैं ना, तो good score app download कर लीजिए.

theme: Improve credit score to 750+ with expert plan
comp_format: Non-Skit: Single-narrator UGC voiceover over hand-held app screen-recording walkthrough; subtitle captions burned in; Tamil
reframe: Borrow the hand-held phone-screen-recording UGC walkthrough device (thumb tapping through real app screens, burned-in Hinglish subtitle fragments like 'chek kar raha', 'follow kiya aur', 'aapki poori madad'). A narrator screen-records the Bachatt app: shows a small ₹0 savings start, turns on daily auto-save, then shows the balance climbing to a real goal amount over weeks. Persona: a Gen-Z saver who 'tried saving for 3 months but money never stayed' until Bachatt auto-deducted it daily. Payoff: on-screen balance hits ₹9,000 for a new phone.

script: Hand holds phone, opens Bachatt: 'Main 3 mahine se bachane ki koshish kar raha tha par paisa ruka hi nahi.' | Taps daily-save toggle: 'Yahan dekho, roz ₹50 auto-save on kar diya.' | Scrolls savings tracker: 'Har din thoda-thoda jMta gaya.' | Shows goal screen: 'Naya phone ka goal set kiya - ₹9,000.' | Balance climbs on screen: 'Bina pata chale fund ban gaya.' | Withdraw screen: 'Aur kabhi bhi nikaal sakte ho.' | CTA: 'Bachatt app download karo, daily auto-save set karo abhi.'

src.hook: I checked my credit score daily for 3 months but it wouldn't rise above 620
src.key_message: GoodScore's expert team builds a step-by-step plan and splits EMIs into small parts to lift your score toward 800.
src.transcript: மூன்று மாதங்களாக தினமும் கிரெடிட் ஸ்கோர சரிபார்த்து வந்தேன் ஆனா அது 620ல இருந்து உயரவே இல்ல அப்போதய நண்பன் gudscore ஆ பத்தி சொன்னா அதன் உதவியால் என் score கொஞ்ச காலத்திலயே 70 ஆகிவிட்டது. ஆறுங்க குட் ஸ்கோர்ல உண்மையில் இந்தியாவின் சிறந்த கிரெடிட் நிபுணர்கள் இருக்கிறார்கள் அவர்கள் உங்கள் கிரெடிட் ரிப்போட்டுக்கு ஏற்ப ஒரு முழு திட்டத்தை உருவாக்கி தருகிறார்கள் நானோ அந்த திட்டத்தை படிப்படியாக பின்பற்றின எனது நிலவியில் எம்ஐயும் குட் ஸ்கோர் ஆப் குழுவினர் இரண்டாயிரம் இரண்டாயிரம் சிறிய பிரித்துக் கொடுத்தார்கள். அதை நான் எளிதாக செலுத்திவிட்டேன் உங்கள் ஸ்கோர் 5600 லயே தேங்கி நின்றால் உடனே குட் ஸ்கோர் அப்ப டவுன்லோட் செய்யுங்கள் அதை 800 வர கொண்டு செல்ல உங்களுக்கு முழுமையாக உதவி செய்வார்கள் குட் ஸ்கோர் அப்ப இப்போதே டவுன்லோட் சீசன்

theme: Check credit score and detailed report to get loans
comp_format: Micro-Drama: 2D cartoon animation illustrating a two-character dialogue (friend reassures another about loan rejection); animated story format, Hindi
reframe: Borrow the 2D cartoon-animation two-character dialogue device (flat-art friend reassures a stressed friend, red caption bars with one highlighted word, simple looped office/home backgrounds). One cartoon friend panics that he can never save and money vanishes every month; the calmer friend says 'tension mat le, Bachatt download kar le.' Persona: young salaried 'majdoor' who keeps failing to save. Payoff: by month-end he shows a small but real savings balance built from ₹20/day.
hook: Yaar mahina khatam, paisa gayab? Tension mat le - Bachatt se roz ₹20 bach jaate hain
script: Cartoon friend A (worried): 'Yaar har mahine paisa udd jaata hai, kuch bachta hi nahi.' | Friend B (calm): 'Are ruk, shaant ho ja, bas bachat ki aadat nahi hai.' | 'Bachatt app download kar le, sab solve ho jaayega.' | A: 'Bachatt? Ye kya hai?' | B: 'Roz sirf ₹20 auto-save, digital gold ya savings me - bina socha jama hota rehta hai.' | A: 'Par itna chhota se kya hoga?' | B: 'Mahine ke end me dekh - ₹600, saal me 7000+.' | CTA: 'Aaj hi Bachatt download kar, daily save on kar.'
why: Cheap, fast cartoon dialogue makes the 'I can't save' objection relatable and resolves it in 30 seconds.

src.hook: Bro, my loan got rejected again, my credit score is low, what do I do now?
src.key_message: GoodScore app shows a full credit report plus expert steps to fix the habits hurting your score, all in one place.
src.transcript: यार राज फिर loan reject हो गया, credit score कम था, पता नहीं क्या करूं अब? कुछ समझ नहीं आ रहा. अरे रुक रुक, पहले आराम से शांत हो जा, बस credit score ही कम है ना, मैं बताता हूं. Good score app download कर लें, सारी दिक्कत solve हो जाएगी. Good score? यह क्या है? देख, loan के लिए चाहिए credit score और credit score check करने की सबसे बढ़िया जगह है good score app क्योंकि यहां सिर्फ़ score नहीं, पूरी detailed report दिखती है. Score कितना है? कितने खाते हैं? कितने loans और cards हैं? सारा कुछ एक जगह. फिर यहां यह भी दिखता है कि तुम्हारी किन आदतों के कारण score नहीं बढ़ रहा. पर यार, यह सब तो बहुत मुश्किल होगा समझने के लिए. यही तो सबसे बड़ी चीज़ है इनके experts, जो सिर्फ़ यह दिक्कतें नहीं बताते, उन दिक्कतों को सुलझाने के आसान steps भी देते हैं और हर step पे तेरी मदद भी करेंगे ताकि तुझे दफ्तरों के चक्कर ना काटने पड़े. सब एक ही जगह से, आसानी से, मैंने खुद यह use किया है अपने घर के loan के लिए. अरे, यह तो बहुत बढ़िया है यार. क्या नाम बताया था? Good score app? हाँ, सारे app stores पे है. Good score app download now.

theme: Check all accounts and improve credit score to 800

reframe: Borrow the polished multi-location actor talking-head device (well-dressed presenter delivering a scripted explainer across several staged spots - shopfront, stool, beside a scooter - with subtitle captions). A SH (shopkeeper) persona presenter declares 'har dukaandaar ke phone me ye app hona chahiye': Bachatt auto-saves a small cut of each day's sale so the shopkeeper builds capital instead of spending it all. script: Presenter at shopfront: 'Har dukaandaar ke phone me ye app hona chahiye - naam hai Bachatt.' | Moves to stool: 'Din bhar bikri hoti hai par shaam tak paisa kahan jaata hai pata hi nahi chalta.' | 'Is app se roz ki bikri ka thoda hissa auto-save ho jaata hai.' | Beside scooter: 'Chahe ₹50 ho ya ₹100, savings ya 24K gold me jama.' | 'Saal bhar me itna jama ho jaata hai ki bada kharcha bina udhaar ho jaaye.' | 'Mere dost ne isi bachat se dukaan ka naya fridge le liya.' | CTA: 'Aaj hi Bachatt download karo, daily auto-save shuru karo.'

src.hook: Every credit card user must have this app
src.key_message: GoodScore shows all your accounts, fake loans and enquiries, lets you split missed EMIs, and helped families reach 800+.
src.transcript: క్రెడిట్ కార్డ్ ఉపయోగించే ప్రతి ఒక్కరి దగ్గర ఈ యాప్ తప్పనిసరిగా ఉండాలి. యాప్ పేరు గుడ్ స్కోర్ యాప్ ఈ యాప్ లో మీ పేరు మీద ఉన్న అన్ని అకౌంట్స్ కనిపిస్తాయి. అంటే రియల్ లోన్ మరియు ఫేక్ లోన్ ఎన్ని ఉన్నాయి, ఎన్ని క్రెడిట్ కార్డ్స్ ఉన్నాయి, మరియు వాటిపై ఎంత ఖర్చు అవుతుందో అంత సులభంగా అర్థమవుతుంది. మరియు మీ పేరు మీద లోన్ కోసం ఎన్ని ఎంక్వయిరీలు జరిగాయో కూడా తెలుస్తుంది. ఎందుకంటే అటువంటి ఎంక్వయిరీలు చేయడం వల్ల కూడా మీ క్రెడిట్ స్కోర్ తగ్గే అవకాశం ఉంది. ఈ యాప్ ద్వారా మీరు ఓవర్ డూ లేదా మిస్ అయిన ఈఎంఐ ని కూడా ₹1000 రూపాయలు చొప్పున చిన్న చిన్న వాయిదాగా మార్చుకోవచ్చు. తద్వారా మీ లోన్ డిఫాల్ట్ అవ్వదు. మీకు తెలుసా, మా ఫ్యామిలీలో ఇద్దరు వ్యక్తులో క్రెడిట్ రిపోర్ట్ చూసి మరియు గుడ్ స్కోర్ యప్ నిపున్ల సూచనలు పాటించి తమ క్రెడిట్ స్కోర్ ను 800 పైకి తీసుకెళ్లారు. అంతేకాకుండా ఇక్కడ మీరు పర్సనల్ లోన్ కూడా తీసుకోవచ్చు. లోన్ ఈఎంఐలు మరియు ఇతర బిల్లులన్నీ చెల్లించవచ్చు మరియు ప్రతి పేమెంట్ పై మంచి క్యాష్ బ్యాక్ కూడా లభిస్తుంది. గుడ్ స్కోర్ యాప్ ను ఐఐటి విద్యార్థులు తయారు చేశారు మరియు దీనిని కోటి మందికి పైగా ఉపయోగిస్తున్నారు. మీరు కూడా మీ క్రెడిట్ స్కోర్ ను పెంచుకోవాలనుకుంటే ఈరోజే గుడ్ స్కోర్ యాప్ ను డౌన్లోడ్ చేసుకోండి. ఇప్పుడే డౌన్లోడ్ చేయండి గుడ్ స్కోర్ యాప్

theme: GoodScore experts vs shady credit-fix tricks

src.transcript: నాకు నాలుగు లోన్లు ఉన్నాయి ఆరు క్రెడిట్ కార్డులు ఉన్నాయి. ఏదో ఒక పేమెంట్ మిస్ అవుతూనే ఉంటుంది. అందుకే నేను గుడ్ స్కోర్ యాప్ వాడుతున్నాను. మీ ప్రతి లోన్ ఇక్కడ ఒకే యాప్ లో కనిపిస్తుంది మరియు ఒకే యాప్ నుండి మీరు ప్రతి లోన్ పేమెంట్ కూడా చేయవచ్చు. దీనిలో ప్రతి పేమెంట్ పై మీకు క్యాష్ బ్యాక్ కూడా లభిస్తుంది. ఒకవేళ పేమెంట్ మిస్ అయినా లేదా లోన్ విషయంలో బ్యాంక్ ఏదైనా పొరపాటు చేసినా గుడ్ స్కోర్ అప్ క్రెడిట్ నిప్పునులో మీ తరపున బ్యాంకు తో మాట్లాడతారు, నెగోషేట్ చేస్తారు మరియు మీకు బెస్ట్ డీల్ కూడా ఇప్పిస్తారు. నాకైతే ఇప్పుడు ఒక్క ఈఎంఐ కూడా మిస్ అవ్వదు. మరియు నా క్రెడిట్ స్కోర్ ఎప్పుడు 7500 కంటే తగ్గదు. ఇదంతా కేవలం గుడ్స్కో యప్ వల్లే సాధ్యమైంది. గుడ్స్కో యప్ ఇప్పుడే డౌన్లోడ్ చేసుకోండి.

src.transcript: तुमको जब बोला कि EMI चुका दूंगा तो बार बार घर पर आकर परेशान क्यों कर रहे हो? तुमको क्या लगा EMI नहीं भरोगे तो bank चुपचाप बैठेगा. अरे EMI भरो मैं नहीं आऊंगा. पैसे नहीं है अभी मेरे पास. अरे तो loan क्यों लिया? अरे भाई साहब भाई साहब यार इतना गुस्सा मत करो आप जाओ अभी इनकी EMI मैं चुका दूंगा. मैंने तो तुम्हें पहले ही कहा था. अगर EMI time पर नहीं भरोगे तो यह bank वाले तुम्हें परेशान करेंगे. Defaulter घोषित कर देंगे और आगे से कोई loan भी नहीं मिलेगा. पर तुमने मेरी बात मानी नहीं. अब एक solution दे रहा हूं तुम्हें. ध्यान से sun. Goodscore नाम का एक app है उसे download कर लो और जो तुम्हारी छूटी हुई EMI है ना, इसे हज़ार दो हज़ार की छोटी छोटी किश्तों में बांट दो. Goodscore app पर किसी भी overdue को तुम हज़ार दो हज़ार की छोटी छोटी किश्तों में बांट सकते हो और उसकी पहली किश्त भरकर loan defaulter होने से बच सकते हो. नहीं पहले तो यह सब सुविधाएं होती नहीं थी loan default हो गया तो हो गया लेकिन अब तो यह Good Score app, कई व्यापारी इस Good app को download करके अपने इस loan default होने की मुसीबत से निकल चुके हैं, बच चुके हैं. तो तुम भी यह Good Score app download कर लो और हज़ार दो हज़ार की किश्तों में अपना overdue बांट दो और loan खत्म कर दो. अभी download करें Good Score app.

src.transcript: ಅಂತೂ ಇಂತೂ ಹೊಸ ಗಾಡಿ ತಗೊಂಡುಬಿಟ್ಟೆ ಆದ್ರೆ ನನ್ನ ಲೋನ್ ರಿಜೆಕ್ಟ್ ಆಗಿದೆ ಬ್ಯಾಂಕ್ ನೂರು ಕ್ರಿಕೆಟ್ ಸ್ಕೋರ್ ಕಮ್ಮಿ ಇದೆ ಅಂತ ಲೋನ್ ರಿಜೆಕ್ಟ್ ಮಾಡಿದ್ದಾರೆ ಅದಕ್ಕೆ ಯಾಕಶ್ ಡ್ರಾಮಾ ಮಾಡ್ತೀಯಾ ಮೊದಲು ನನ್ನ ಬೈಕ್ ತಗೊಂಡುಿದ್ದೀನಿ ಖುಷಿ ಪಡೆದು ಆಮೇಲೆ ಲೋನ್ ಬಗ್ಗೆ ಏನೋ ಒಂದು ಗತಿ ಕಾಣಿಸಲ್ಲನ ನೋಡು ನನ್ನ ನಾಟಕ ಮಾಡ್ತಾ ಇಲ್ಲ ಎಷ್ಟೊಂದ್ ಡ್ರಿಮ್ ನ ಕಟ್ಟಿಕೊಂಡಿದ್ದೆ ಆದರೆ ಈ ಲೋ ಕ್ರೆಡಿಟ್ ಸಂಸ್ಕೃತ ಇಂದಾನೆ ಎಲ್ಲ ಹಾಳಾಗುತ್ತಿದೆ ಅದಕ್ಕೆ ಗ್ಯಾ ಸ್ಪೇಸ್ ಮಾಡಿಗೋ ವ್ಯಾ ನಾನಿದ್ದ ಒಂದು ಅಪ್ಲಿಕೇಶನ್ ಯೂಸ್ ಮಾಡ್ತೀನಿ ಬುಡಸ್ಕೊ ಯಾರ ಅಪ್ ಅಂತ ತುಂಬಾ ಸಿಂಪಲ್ ಆಗಿದೆ ಸಿಕ್ಕಾಪಟ್ಟೆ ಹೆಲ್ಪ್ ಆಗುತ್ತೆ ಹೌದಾ ಹೇಗೆ ಈ ಅಪ್ಲಿಕೇಶನ್ ನ್ನು ನಾನು ಕ್ರೆಡಿಟ್ ಸ್ಕೋರ್ ಯಾಕ್ ಲೂ ಇದೆ ಯಾದರು ಪೇಮೆಂಟ್ ನಮ್ಮ ಇಸ್ ಮಾಡಿದೀನಿ ಕ್ರೆಡಿಟ್ ಯೂಟ್ಯೂಬರ್ಸ್ಷನ್ ಎಷ್ಟು ಮಾಡಿಕೊಳ್ಳ್ತಾ ಇದೀನಿ ಒಂದು ಬೆಳೆದಾದರೂ ರಾಂಗ್ ಎಂಟ್ರಿ ಆಗಿದ್ರೆ ಅದನ್ನು ಕಣ್ ಹಿಡಿಯುತ್ತೆ. ವೆಸ್ಟ್ ಸ್ಪಾಟ್ ಏನ್ ಅಂದ್ರೆ ಕ್ರೆಡಿಟ್ ರಿಪೋಸ್ಟ್ ನ ತುಂಬಾ ಕ್ಲಿಯರ್ ಆಗಿ ಎಕ್ಸಾಂಪಲ್ ಮಾಡುತ್ತೆ ವಿಥ್ ವಿಡಿಯೋ ಗೈಡೆನ್ಸ್ ಹಾಗೇನೇ 25 ಬಾರ್ ಸೆವೆನ್ ಚಾಟ್ ಸಪೋರ್ಟ್ ಕೂಡ ಇರುತ್ತೆ. ಓ ಸೂಪರ್ ಹಾಗಾದರೆ ಇನ್ನು ಮುಂದೆ ನೋಡು ಹೆಂಗೆನ ಕ್ರೆಡಿಟ್ ಸ್ಕೂರಣ ಜಾಸ್ತಿ ಮಾಡಿ ಕೊಡ್ತೀನಿ. ರಾಣಿ ತರ ಬ್ಯಾಂಕ್ ಗೆ ಎಂಟ್ರಿ ಕೋರ್ಟ್ ಹೆಂಗೆನ ರೀಜೆಕ್ಟ್ ಮಾಡ್ತಾ ರೋಲ್ ಅಂತ ಅಂತ ನೋಡೇ ಬಿಡ್ತೀನಿ ಓಕೆ ಗುಡ್ ಸ್ಕor ಬೇಟೆಗಾರ ಸ್ಕor ಬೇಟೆಗಾರ ಚಾನ್ಸಸ್
