src.key_message: GoodScore detects fraud loans on your account, gets them removed and pushes your credit score past 750.
src.transcript: तुमने bank वालों के सामने मेरी इज़्ज़त का फालूदा कर रखा है? सब मेरे गिरे हुए score को देखकर reject कर देते. क्यों नहीं भरते हो time पर EMI? क्यों आख़िर क्यों? अरे मैंने आज तक अपनी सारी EMI time पर भरी है, तुम्हारी कसम. झूठी कसम खाता है, शर्म नहीं आती. अरे इसके ऊपर मत चिल्लाओ. यह निर्दोष हैं. पक्का इसके ऊपर किसी ने fraud loan चढ़ा दिया है और भाई इस credit score को ख़ुश करने के लिए तुम्हें good score app download करना होगा. अरे यह good GoodScore app क्या है? GoodScore app, वह app हैं जो तुम्हारे account पर चढ़े fraud loan का पता लगाकर उसे remove कराने के साथ तुम्हारे credit score को साढ़े सात सौ के पार ले जाने में तुम्हारी मदद करेगा और फिर यह तुम्हारा credit score तुमसे हमेशा खुश रहेगा. अरे अब देख क्या रहे हो? Download करो GoodScore app और मेरी बिगड़ी credit health का इलाज करो. GoodScore app download now.

theme: Low score rejects loans; GoodScore explains why your score is low (missed payments, utilisation, wrong entries) with clear video guidance.
comp_format: Skit: Two-person acted skit (Telugu, num_speakers=2): two friends discuss loan rejection over low score, enhanced with motion-graphic illustrations and GoodScore app screen-demo cutaways plus a brand logo sting.
reframe: Borrow GS048's two-person acted skit (friends discuss money trouble) enhanced with motion-graphic illustrations and clean app screen-demo cutaways plus a brand logo sting. Reframe: one friend brags he bought a new bike, the other admits he can never save a rupee; friend one shows Bachatt with animated explainers and screen-demos - a daily ₹10-₹100 auto-save slider, savings/digital-gold balance, instant withdraw. End on a Bachatt logo sting.
hook: Tu gaadi le aaya, mere paas ₹500 bhi nahi bachte - Bachatt se roz bachao
script: Tu to nayi bike le aaya, mere paas to mahine end mein ₹500 bhi nahi bachte | Yaar bachat hoti hi nahi mujhse | Main bhi aisa hi tha, phir Bachatt use kiya | (screen-demo + motion graphic) Yahan roz ka ₹10 se ₹100 apne aap save hota hai | Savings, 24K digital gold ya SIP - jaise chaaho | Aur kabhi bhi withdraw kar sakte ho | Sach mein? Itna simple? | Haan, abhi Bachatt app download kar aur Daily Save ON kar
why: Friendly bike-envy banter plus motion-graphic screen-demos makes effortless daily saving feel achievable and simple, like the source.

src.hook: "You just bought a bike, but my loan application keeps getting rejected over my low credit score!"
src.key_message: GoodScore shows why your score is low - missed payments, utilisation, wrong entries - and explains your report clearly with video guidance.
src.transcript: ఈ, మీ డ్రeing Bరికే కొనేశావుగా, నాన్ క్రెడిట్ స్కోర్ లో అని బ్యాంకులు నాన్న లోన్ అప్లికేషన్ అన్ని రిజెక్ట్ చేస్తున్నాయిరా! డ్రామా ఆపురా, ముందు నా గురించి కృషిగా ఉండు, నీ లోన్ సంగతి చూద్దాం డ్రామా కాదురా, ఈ లో క్రెడిట్ స్కోర్ వల్ల నా కలలన్నీ కలలుగానే ఉండిపోయాయి. తీసుకోక్రా నేను కూడా ఇదే సిచువేషన్ ఫేస్ చేశాను గుడ్ స్కోర్ అని ఒక అప్లికేషన్ ఉంది దాన్ని యూస్ చేసిన తర్వాత ప్రాబ్లం సాల్వ్ అయింది చాలా హెల్ప్ ఫుల్ ను సింపుల్ కూడా అవునా అదేలా ఈ అప్లికేషన్ లో నీ క్రెడిట్ స్కోర్ ఎందుకు లోగో ఉంది ఏదైనా పేమెంట్ మిస్ చేసావ ఎంత క్రెడిట్ యుద్ధాలుజేషన్ అయింది ఏదైనా రాంగ్ ఎంట్రీస్ ఉంటే దాన్ని కూడా డిటెక్ట్ చేస్తుంది best పార్ట్ ఏంటంటే నీ క్రెడిట్ రిపోర్ట్ ని క్లియర్ గా ఎక్స్ప్లెయిన్ చేస్తుంది విత్ వీడియో గైడెన్స్ అలానే 247 చాట్ సపోర్ట్ దొరుకుతుంది. అబ్బా ఇప్పుడు నా క్రెడిట్ స్కోర్ ఇంప్రూవ్ చేసుకొని దర్జాగా బ్యాంక్ వెళ్తాను. ఎవడు నా లోన్ రిజెక్ట్ చేస్తారో చూస్తా? గుడ్ స్కోర్ బెటర్ స్కోర్ బెటర్ ఛాన్సెస్.

theme: Son wants to buy his mother a new car but a low credit score blocks the loan; GoodScore experts give a plan to improve the score so the car loan is approved.
comp_format: AI-Generated: AI text-to-video: a Hulk-like green superhero and a Captain-America-style figure act out a car-showroom story; obvious synthetic rendering and frame-to-frame inconsistencies (shifting proportions/details) mark it as AI-generated. Narrated dialogue over the synthetic scenes.
reframe: Borrow GS055's AI text-to-video superhero spoof (a Hulk-like figure and a Captain-America-style hero act out a car-showroom story; obvious synthetic rendering, narrated dialogue). Reframe: a son wants to buy his mother a gift/scooter but has 'zero bachat'; the Bachatt-caped hero arrives and shows that roz ka chhota ₹10-₹100 auto-save into savings/gold/SIP would have built the money easily. Keep the over-the-top synthetic superhero spectacle and narrated Hinglish dialogue.
hook: Maa ko gift dena tha par bachat zero? Bachatt roz thoda jod ke sapna pura karega
script: Maa ke liye nayi scooty lana hai, par paisa hai hi nahi re! | Bachat kabhi ki hi nahi, ab kahan se laaun? | Ruk ja, main madad karunga - ye le Bachatt app | Isme roz ka ₹10 se ₹100 apne aap save hota | Savings, 24K digital gold aur SIP mein paisa badhta jaata | Chhote chhote steps, har din - aur sapna pura | Maa khush, tu khush! | Aaj hi Bachatt download karke Daily Save shuru kar
why: An absurd AI superhero spectacle grabs the scroll, while the maa-aspiration payoff ties it to Bachatt's emotional savings core.

src.hook: "Hey, when will you get me a new car? I don't have the money - looks like I'll need a loan."
src.key_message: GoodScore lets you check your credit report and gives an expert step-by-step plan to improve your score so your car loan gets approved.
src.transcript: अरे निकम्मे हलकू रे, मेरे लिए नई car कब लाएगा रे तू रे? मेरे पास तो इतने पैसे है ही नहीं रे, लगता है रे loan ही लेना पड़ेगा रे. ओए, showroom वाले भैया रे जल्दी से मेरी मां के लिए नई car दिखा दे रे. और पैसे कहां से लाएगा हल्कू? तेरा तो credit score ही ख़राब है. Car loan नहीं मिलेगा. हल्कू रुक जा रे मैं तेरी मदद करूंगा. यह ले good score app. Captain रे यह क्या है रे मुझे car मिल जाएगी क्या इस app से रे? हल्कू good score app पर तू अपनी credit report check कर सकता है. यहां expert तेरी report के हिसाब से तेरा credit score improve करने का plan भी देंगे आसान छोटे छोटे steps हर हफ़्ते follow कर और देख तेरा credit score कैसे improve होता है? Salesman देख मेरा credit score. अब जा रे जल्दी से मेरे loan के paper और मेरी नई गाड़ी के paper ले आओ रे. कौन है रे जिसने हलकू का loan reject किया रे. Good score के बाद कोई rejection नहीं रे. Good score है, download now.

theme: A farmer explains how GoodScore experts raised his score from 580 to 710, letting the bank approve a loan for a new water pump
comp_format: AI-Generated: Hindi dialogue skit between two villagers at a petrol pump (one bought a new pump after getting a loan). Montage shows clear AI text-to-video artifacts: the two men's faces and features morph and stay inconsistent across the 6 frames with the waxy, distorted look typical of synthetic video. Burned-in Hinglish captions. Structurally a 2-person skit but rendered with AI.
reframe: Borrow GS059's AI text-to-video village skit (two villagers at a petrol pump; one bought a new pump after a bank loan; obvious morphing-face AI artifacts, burned-in Hinglish captions, 2-person rural dialogue). Reframe: one farmer asks how the other suddenly bought a new water-pump/tractor part; he reveals he didn't sell anything - he quietly saved with Bachatt, roz ka thoda paisa into savings and 24K digital gold, and it grew into enough. Keep the rural petrol-pump AI-skit look.
hook: Naya pump le liya? Gaay nahi bechi - Bachatt se roz thoda bachaya tha
script: Are Ram, naya pump le liya, gaay bech di kya? | Nahi re Shyam, kuch becha nahi - Bachatt se bachaya tha | Ye kaisa jaadu? | Roz ka chhota ₹50 apne aap Bachatt mein save hota tha | Savings aur 24K digital gold dono mein paisa badhta gaya | 4 mahine mein itna jud gaya ki pump aa gaya | Aur zaroorat pade toh kabhi bhi nikaal lo | Tu bhi aaj Bachatt app download kar le, Daily Save shuru kar
why: A rural before/after success story makes daily micro-saving feel powerful and attainable, matching the source's aspirational village payoff.

src.hook: Wow Ram, you bought a new pump - did you sell your cow?
src.key_message: GoodScore experts guide you step by step to raise your credit score so banks approve your loans; download GoodScore now.
src.transcript: अरे वाह राम ताऊ नया pump ले लिए, अपनी गाय बेच दिए क्या? नहीं रे शाम loan लिया है. बेटे ने good score के बारे में बताया था और अब तो सुविधाएं ही सुविधाएं हैं. Bank हमें भी loan देती है. यह कैसा जादू किया है good score ने? देख bank loan देती है तेरा credit score देखकर और good score पर माहिर लोग बैठे हैं इसे बढ़ाने के लिए और सब यह अपने mobile से ही घर बैठे हो जाता है. यह देख चार महीने पहले जब मैंने पहली बार देखा तब मेरा score पांच सौ अस्सी था. फिर यह जो expert होते हैं good score पर, उन्हीं ने बताया कि क्या कदम लेने चाहिए ताकि यह बढ़ जाए. जैसे कि उन्होंने बताया कि सारे बिजली और पानी की bill सही समय पर भरूं. मेरा जो घर का loan था उसकी किश्त सही समय पर भरूं, पूरी बची किश्त भी छोटे टुकड़ों में तोड़ दी ताकि मैं उसे भी चुका कर सकूं. और अब देख आज मेरा score सात सौ दस है. Bank के पास यह लेकर गया तो उन्होंने खुद ही loan दे दिया यह pump के लिए. और मज़े की बात बताऊं इतना बड़ा score देखकर वह इतना चौंक गए कि नींबू पानी भी ला दिया सिर्फ़ मेरे लिए बर्फ़ डालकर. देख मैं कहता हूं तू भी यह app ले ले good score का. किसे पता कब loan की ज़रूरत पड़ जाए. Good score है, download now.

theme: Using the GoodScore app to raise your score and then get a personal loan through the app
comp_format: AI-Generated: Transcript unavailable (Malayalam; Deepgram model error); classified from montage + caption. A consistent Pixar-style 3D-animated "uncle" avatar talks to camera while a GoodScore app screen (Score Improvement Plan, score 602) is inset. Burned-in Hinglish captions (ka loan, sabse pehle, isi app se, personal loan). The synthetic talking-avatar style is characteristic of AI avatar generation.
reframe: Borrow GS061's AI talking-avatar format (a consistent Pixar-style animated 'uncle' avatar talks to camera while a phone-screen with an in-app 'plan' is inset; burned-in Hinglish captions). Recreate with a friendly Bachatt animated 'uncle' avatar explaining, step by step, how to start saving: 'sabse pehle isi app se' set up daily auto-save of ₹10-₹100 into savings, 24K digital gold and SIP, withdraw anytime - while a Bachatt savings-plan screen (daily target, total saved) shows inset.
hook: Bachat kaise shuru karein? Sabse pehle, isi app se roz ₹10-₹100
script: Beta, bachat karni hai par samajh nahi aata kahan se shuru karein? | Sabse pehle, Bachatt app download karo | Isi app se roz ka ₹10 se ₹100 auto-save set karo | (screen inset) Dekho - daily target aur total saved yahin dikhta hai | Paisa savings, 24K digital gold ya SIP mein jaata hai | Aur zaroorat pade toh kabhi bhi withdraw | Roz thoda thoda, aur dekhte hi dekhte fund taiyaar | Aaj hi Bachatt download karke Daily Save ON karo
format: AI avatar explainer (Cartoon-AI talking-uncle) + phone-screen inset
why: A warm animated-uncle walkthrough with a real savings-screen inset makes starting daily saving feel guided and trustworthy, like the source avatar.

src.hook: Animated uncle: first, by adopting this app you can raise your score
src.key_message: Raise your CIBIL score past 750 with GoodScore for just Rs 99 and get a personal loan through the app; book now.

theme: A couple's joint loan is rejected for a low score, then approved after following GoodScore's improvement plan; don't let your score block your dreams
comp_format: AI-Generated: Clay/stop-motion-styled story with a 2-speaker dialogue (couple rejected for a joint loan, then approved after using GoodScore). A "Veo" watermark in the final frame confirms this is Google Veo AI text-to-video; the clay aesthetic is synthetically generated. App "Detailed Report" screen shown; burned-in captions.
reframe: Clay/stop-motion (Veo-style) skit: a young couple stands outside a bank, dreaming of their first home, but the loan officer says they can't afford the down-payment. The same couple returns months later having auto-saved ₹50/day in Bachatt, and the screen shows a Bachatt 'Goal: Ghar ka Down-payment' tracker hitting target. Borrow the rejected-then-approved couple device but swap to a savings-down-payment payoff instead of a credit-fix.
hook: Down-payment ke liye paisa nahi? Roz ₹50 bachao, sapno ka ghar pao
script: Loan officer: Sorry, itne down-payment ke bina ghar ka loan nahi hoga | Patni: Hamare paas to savings hi nahi | Pati: Papa ne bataya tha ek app — Bachatt | Patni: Roz sirf ₹50 auto-save, withdraw bhi kabhi bhi | 4 mahine baad: Bachatt goal tracker full, down-payment ready | Officer: Congratulations, ghar approved! | Ab aap bhi Bachatt app download karke 'Ghar' goal banao aur ₹50/day auto-save shuru karo
why: Same aspirational rejected-to-approved arc, but the payoff is the user's own savings discipline, not a score hack.

src.hook: Sorry, your joint loan application is rejected - your credit score doesn't meet requirements.
src.key_message: GoodScore gives you a credit report, a personalized plan and experts to raise your score so joint loans get approved; download today.
src.transcript: Sorry ma'am, sir, आपका joint application is rejected. Credit score requirements meet नहीं करते. छह महीने बाद try करें. मेरा score 07:42 था. तुम्हारा? 5 68. शायद car loan की EMI late हुई थी. मैं तो credit card भी use करता हूं. Papa ने बताया था एक app Good Score. मैं यही use करती हूं. यहां credit report देते हैं, personalized plan भी और qualified experts भी हैं मदद करने के लिए. तुम्हारे report के हिसाब से हम भी plan कर सकते हैं. विक्रम ने चार महीने credit score का plan follow किया और धीरे धीरे score improve हुआ. Joint application approved, preapproved offer भी. अपने सपनों के beach अपने credit score को मत आने दीजिए. आज ही download करें GoodScore app.

theme: A banker's secret: your credit score is what matters most for a loan, and GoodScore is the easiest way to raise it and find low-interest loans
comp_format: AI-Generated: A suited "BANKER" at a desk shares a banker's secret about credit scores and GoodScore. One frame shows the customer literally replaced by a photorealistic squirrel sitting at the desk - a clear AI text-to-video surreal artifact. Cinematic hyperreal lighting with subtly inconsistent features confirm synthetic generation. Burned-in Hinglish captions.
reframe: Hyperreal AI 'BANKER' at a LOANS desk turns to camera after a customer walks off, and shares a banker's insider secret — not about scores, but about why most people never have an emergency fund. He reveals the trick: auto-save ₹10-100/day into Bachatt so you never have to beg a bank again. Borrow the suited-banker-secret talking-head device (keep the surreal AI flavour) and swap the message to micro-savings independence.
hook: Banker ka secret: loan ki nahi, bachat ki aadat banao
script: Customer: Sir, thoda loan chahiye tha | Banker: Aapke account mein to savings hi nahi, aise loan mushkil hai | Customer chala jaata hai | Banker (camera ki taraf): Ab ek banker ka secret suniye | Banker: Loan ke peeche bhaagne se behtar hai roz ₹10-100 auto-save karo Bachatt mein | Banker: Emergency aaye to apna paisa, kisi ke aage haath nahi failana padega | To meri baat maaniye aur abhi Bachatt app download karke daily auto-save on kar do
why: The authoritative banker-secret reveal feels insider, and reframes the pain from 'low score' to 'no savings buffer' — Bachatt's core promise.

src.hook: Sir, your credit score is too low - you can't get a loan with this.
src.key_message: A banker's secret: your credit score decides your loan - use GoodScore to raise it and find the lowest-interest loan in one app; download now.
src.transcript: भैया, loan लेना था. Sir, आपका credit score तो बहुत कम है. इतने में loan नहीं मिल पाएगा. क्या? अरे, ये तो चले गए. अब आप ही sun लीजिए एक banker की तरफ से secret. Loans लेने के लिए सबसे ज़रूरी होता है आपका credit score और अपना credit score बढ़ाने का सबसे आसान तरीका है GoodScore app. यहां आप अपना score check कर सकते हैं. आपको आपके credit score के हिसाब से loan भी ढूंढ के देगा सबसे कम interest rate के साथ. वह भी एक ही app पर. तो मेरी बात मानिए और आप भी download करिए GoodScore app. GoodScore app. Download now.

theme: Fix credit report errors (close cards officially)
comp_format: AI-Generated: Synthetic 3D Pixar-style animated farmer character lip-syncing the narration; clearly AI/CGI generated avatar with GoodScore app endcard.
reframe: Pixar-style AI farmer character (turban, hoe over shoulder, village field backdrop) lip-syncs a confession: every month he 'thought' he was saving by keeping cash in a tin, but it kept getting spent on small things and never grew. He switches to Bachatt auto-save and shows a phone with a growing savings/gold balance. Borrow the CGI-farmer single-narrator confession device, swap the credit-report angle to a savings-leak angle.
hook: Tin ke gullak mein paisa nahi tikta? Roz auto bachao Bachatt mein
script: Maine socha gullak mein paisa jama ho raha hai | Par har hafte kuch na kuch nikal ke kharch ho jaata | Saal bhar mein kuch bhi nahi bacha, pata hi nahi chala | Phir Bachatt try kiya — roz ₹20 apne aap kat ke save ho jaate hain | Ab woh 24K digital gold ban raha hai, kabhi bhi nikaal sakta hoon | Aaj se bharosa nazar pe nahi, auto-save pe | Abhi Bachatt app download karo aur daily auto-save shuru karo
why: Rural relatable 'my savings kept leaking' confession converts informal saving into a disciplined Bachatt auto-save habit.

src.hook: I cut up my card, but the system still showed it open and fees kept piling up.
src.key_message: Cards aren't closed until confirmed; GoodScore shows full history, confirms closures and improves your score.
src.transcript: నేను కార్డ్ ను కట్ చేసి పడేసాను. కానీ సిస్టం లో అది ఇంకా ఉంది. కార్డ్ క్లోజ్ అయిందని అనుకున్నాను. కానీ అఫీషియల్ గా క్లోజ్ అవ్వలేదు. యాన్యువల్ ఫీజులు పడుతూనే ఉన్నాయి. లేట్ ఫీజులు పెరుగుతూనే ఉన్నాయి. నాకు అసలు తెలియనేవేద. గుడ్ స్కోర్ లో పూర్తి హిస్టరీ చూశాను. ఈ బ్యాంక్ నుండి క్లోజర్ ను కన్ఫర్మ్ చేయించింది. రివర్స్ చేయించింది. BUరోలో అప్det రిఫ్లెక్ట్ అయింది. ఈ స్కోర్ ఇంప్రూవ్ అయింది. ఈరోజు నేను ప్రతిదీ వెరిఫై చేస్తాను. క్లోజ్ అయిందనే అనుకుంటే సరిపోదు. ఇప్పుడే గుడ్ స్కోర్ యాప్ ను డౌన్లోడ్ చేసుకోండి.

src.transcript: கடனே வாங்கவில்லை பிறகு என் பெயரில 2000 கடன் எப்படி வந்தது... இப்பதெல்லாம் இது அதிகமா நடக்கலுக்கு மக்களுமல் பான் கடைப் பயன்படுத்திக் கடன் வாங்கிகிறார்கள் அதனால் உங்கள் கிரெடிட் ஸ்கோர் பாதிக்கப்படுகிறது அப்படியான இதை எப்படி சரி செய்வது வெறும் குட் ஸ்கோர் செயலிய பதிவிரக்கம் செய்சா இதில் கடன் யார் வாங்கினார்கள், எப்போது வாங்கினார்கள் என்பதை நீங்கள் தெளிவாக பார்க்கலாம். மேலும் இந்த ஆப் இதை நீக்கவும் உங்களுக்கு உதவும். இந்த ஆப் மூலம் லட்சக்கணக்கான மக்கள் தங்கள் பெயரிலுள்ள போலிக்கடங்களை நீக்கி தங்கள் கிரேவிட்ஸ் கூற மேம்படுத்தியுள்ளனர். அதுமட்டுமல்லாம தேவைப்படும் போது இந்த ஆப் நம்பகமான இடங்களில் இருந்து கடன்களையும் பேச்சு தருகிறது மேலும் ஒவ்வொரு பேமெண்ட்லையும் காஷ்பாக் வழங்குகிறது எனவே நீங்கள் இப்போது கவலைப்பட தேவையில்லாம் உடனே குட் ஆஃப் டவுன்லோட் செய்யுங்க குட் ஸ்கோர் ஆஃப் இப்போதே டவுன்லோட் செய்யாள்
